sentence: The last day of the week is the day of rest.

sentence: So I put 'get food' on the day after that?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, that is a good idea.

sentence: I will do that now. Done.

sentence: Good. Now you have the third thing on your list.

sentence: That is a good start. You are getting the idea.

sentence: Right, now have a look at the time list.

sentence: I see it. The things are colored bits.

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. That makes your week clear.

speaker: B
sentence: Can I make a note on a day?

sentence: Yes, put your finger on the day and a note box comes up.

speaker: B
sentence: I will put 'meeting at three' two days from now.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. Let us make a note for that.

speaker: B
sentence: I see a note at the lower part. One day before?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, that is good. Touch it.

sentence: Done. It says 'note is fixed'.

speaker: A
sentence: Now let us see the week view.

sentence: I will put my finger on the top right.

speaker: A
sentence: Good, that gives you all seven days.

sentence: I see my note on the third day.

sentence: You may put a thing on another day.

speaker: A
sentence: Put your finger on the work and pull it.

speaker: B
sentence: I will have a go now.

speaker: A
sentence: Did it go to the new day?

sentence: Yes, it is there. That is simple.

sentence: Now put a bell on it for the day before.

sentence: A bell? Where is that?

speaker: B
sentence: I see it. I will put the bell on.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. Now go back to the first page.

speaker: B
sentence: I am there. What is this blue button?
zh: 我到了。这个蓝色按钮是什么？

speaker: A
sentence: That is for a list of all your works.
zh: 那是查看所有任务的列表。

speaker: B
sentence: I will give it a push.

speaker: A
sentence: Do you see all your works there?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, and I see the one I did.
zh: 是的，而且我看到了已完成的那个。

speaker: A
sentence: Now mark that one as done.
zh: 现在把那个标记为完成。

speaker: B
sentence: I push the button. It is not there.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. You have your first work done.
zh: 好，你完成了第一个任务。

speaker: B
sentence: That was quick. I like this place.

speaker: A
sentence: It is simple, is it not?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. I will put in more works for the week.
zh: 对，我打算把这周的工作都加进去。

speaker: A
sentence: Do that. You will see them on the day list.
zh: 加吧，你会在日历上看到它们。

speaker: B
sentence: I will. Thanks for your help.

speaker: A
sentence: No trouble. Say if they say no.
zh: 不客气。他们要是拦你，就说一声。

speaker: B
sentence: I will. get some rest.

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I will make a list for the week.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Put the days and times.
zh: 不错，把日期和时间填上。

speaker: A
sentence: Done. Five days a week, nine to five.
zh: 搞定了，一周五天，朝九晚五。

speaker: B
sentence: That is a full week. Do not work too hard.

speaker: A
sentence: I will take a rest at night.

speaker: B
sentence: That is clear now.

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. I can see all my work in one place.
zh: 是的，所有工作一目了然。

speaker: B
sentence: That is the idea. Keep it simple.
zh: 就是这个意思，简单就好。

speaker: A
sentence: I will. rest up, and thank you again.
zh: 我会的，好好休息，再次感谢。

speaker: B
sentence: Good night. Sleep well.

speaker: A
sentence: I am turned round, sir.

speaker: B
sentence: Oh, no trouble. Where are you going?

speaker: A
sentence: I am looking for a place named 'Afternoon' that has drink.
zh: 我在找一家叫‘午后’的店，有饮料的。

speaker: B
sentence: Right, I see. Your phone is dead?
zh: 好的，我知道了。你手机没电了？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it went dark. I am new to this town.
zh: 对，没电了。我刚来这个镇子。

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. Go two streets that way.
zh: 没问题。往那边走两个路口。

speaker: A
sentence: Two streets? And then what do I do?

speaker: B
sentence: Turn right at the bakery. Then go about a hundred steps.
zh: 在面包店右转，再走大约一百步。

speaker: A
sentence: A hundred steps. And the sign is green, is that right?
zh: 一百步。招牌是绿色的，对吧？

speaker: B
sentence: That's it. Green sign on the left side. You will see it.
zh: 没错。左边绿色招牌。你会看到的。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I will go that way now.

speaker: B
sentence: Best of hope. It is not far.

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for your help.

speaker: B
sentence: No trouble. Have a good day.

speaker: A
sentence: You too. okay.

speaker: B
sentence: You are kind. I will go now.
zh: 您真是太好了。我现在就走。

speaker: A
sentence: Take the second street on your right.
zh: 在你右边第二条街拐弯。

speaker: B
sentence: Second right. Got it.

speaker: A
sentence: Then walk straight for a bit.

speaker: B
sentence: How far is a bit?

speaker: A
sentence: About three minutes, no more.

speaker: B
sentence: Three minutes. That is short.

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. The place is on the left.

speaker: B
sentence: Left side. With a green sign.

speaker: A
sentence: That is right. You will not miss it.

speaker: B
sentence: So I go two roads, then right.
zh: 所以走两个路口，然后右转。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. At the bakery.

speaker: B
sentence: Then walk for three minutes.

speaker: A
sentence: About that. Not more.

speaker: B
sentence: And the place is on the left.

speaker: A
sentence: With a green sign. You will see it.
zh: 有个绿色招牌。你会看到的。

speaker: B
sentence: What if I go past it?

speaker: A
sentence: Then you see a place for disease. Too far.
zh: 那你会看到药店。就走过了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. I will keep an eye out.

speaker: A
sentence: You will be all right. sure.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. Two roads across, then turn right at the bakery.
zh: 对。两个路口，然后在面包店右转。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. And then a hundred steps, more or less.
zh: 是的。然后走一百步左右。

speaker: B
sentence: Left side, green sign. That is clear.

speaker: A
sentence: You have it. No need to be troubled.

speaker: B
sentence: Thank you. I will go now.

speaker: A
sentence: I will walk on now. Two roads, then right.
zh: 我现在就走。两个路口，然后右转。

speaker: B
sentence: That is right. Keep your eyes open for the bakery.

speaker: A
sentence: And after that, a hundred steps. Left side, green sign.
zh: 然后走一百步。左边，绿色招牌。

speaker: B
sentence: You have it all in your head. No need for a box.
zh: 你都记住了。不需要手机。

speaker: A
sentence: I hope I do not get mixed up. The streets all look the same.
zh: 希望我不会搞混。这些街道看起来都一样。

speaker: B
sentence: Do not be troubled. The bakery has a red front. Hard to miss.
zh: 别担心。面包店门面是红色的。很难错过。

speaker: A
sentence: Oh, red front. That is a good sign. I will look for that.
zh: 哦，红色门面。那是个好标志。我会找那个。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. And after the turn, the green sign will be clear.
zh: 是的。转弯后，绿色招牌就会很显眼。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I am off now. Thank you for your help.
zh: 好的。我现在出发了。谢谢你的帮助。

speaker: B
sentence: Go on. You will be at the cafe in no time.
zh: 去吧。你很快就到饮品店了。

speaker: A
sentence: I am walking now. Two streets, then right.
zh: 我现在走了。两条街，然后右转。

speaker: B
sentence: That is the way. Keep your eyes on the red front.
zh: 就是那条路。眼睛盯着红色门面。

speaker: A
sentence: I see a red front. Is that the bakery?
zh: 我看到一个红色门面。那是面包店吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, that is it. Turn right there.

speaker: A
sentence: I am at the turn now. The street is quiet.
zh: 我现在在转弯处。这条街很安静。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now look for the green sign on the left.
zh: 好。现在找左边的绿色招牌。

speaker: A
sentence: I see a green sign! It is about a hundred steps away.
zh: 我看到一个绿色招牌！大约一百步远。

speaker: B
sentence: That is the place. You are almost there.
zh: 就是那个地方。你马上就到了。

speaker: A
sentence: I am at the door now. The sign says 'Afternoon'.
zh: 我现在在门口了。招牌上写着‘午后’。

speaker: B
sentence: Well done. You got it without a box.
zh: 干得好。你没用手机就找到了。

speaker: A
sentence: I will go in now. Thank you for your help.
zh: 我现在进去了。谢谢你的帮忙。

speaker: B
sentence: No trouble at all. Have a good time.

speaker: A
sentence: The drink smells good from here.
zh: 这里就能闻到饮品的香气了。

speaker: B
sentence: They make a good cup. I go there now and then.
zh: 他们家的咖啡不错。我偶尔去那儿。

speaker: A
sentence: I will have their special today.
zh: 我今天试试他们的特调。

speaker: B
sentence: The one with milk and a bit of sweet? That is mine.
zh: 加牛奶和一点甜的那种？那是我的。

speaker: A
sentence: I will keep that in mind. Thanks again.

speaker: B
sentence: That is all right. Have a good drink.

speaker: A
sentence: I will. sure for now.

speaker: B
sentence: sure. be safe.

speaker: A
sentence: I will start walking now.

speaker: B
sentence: Have a safe walk. It is a nice day.
zh: 路上小心。今天天气不错。

speaker: A
sentence: The sun is bright, I do not mind the walk.
zh: 阳光很好，我不介意走一走。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, and the street is quiet today.
zh: 是的，而且今天街上挺安静的。

speaker: A
sentence: I see the red front of the bakery now.
zh: 我现在看到面包店的红色门面了。

speaker: B
sentence: That is it! Turn right there.

speaker: A
sentence: I am turning now. I see the green sign.
zh: 我这转弯了。我看到绿色招牌了。

speaker: B
sentence: Perfect. You will find the door easily.
zh: 很好。你会很容易找到门口的。

speaker: A
sentence: I am at the door now. The sign says Afternoon.
zh: 我现在到门口了。招牌写着“午后”。

speaker: B
sentence: Great. Enjoy your drink inside.
zh: 太好了。去里面喝点饮料吧。

speaker: A
sentence: I will. Thank you for your kind help.
zh: 我会的。谢谢您热心的帮助。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Have a wonderful day.
zh: 不客气。祝你今天过得愉快。

speaker: A
sentence: I will go inside now.

speaker: B
sentence: Sure. It is warm inside.

speaker: A
sentence: The door is open.

speaker: B
sentence: The server is waiting.

speaker: A
sentence: I see a clean table near the window.
zh: 我看到窗户旁有一张干净的桌子。

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good spot.

speaker: A
sentence: I will sit there.

speaker: B
sentence: Enjoy the tea.

speaker: A
sentence: The place has a nice feeling.

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it is very popular.

speaker: A
sentence: I see my friend now.

speaker: B
sentence: Oh, good. Have fun.
zh: 哦，太好了。祝你们玩得开心。

speaker: A
sentence: He is waving at me.

speaker: B
sentence: Go say hello.

speaker: A
sentence: I will. Thanks again for your time.
zh: 我会的。再次感谢您的时间。

speaker: B
sentence: That is the way. You will see it.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. I will go now. Thank you for your help.
zh: 好的。我现在就走。谢谢你的帮忙。

speaker: B
sentence: That is all right. Have a good day.

speaker: A
sentence: Well, you too. okay.

speaker: B
sentence: sure. Go straight, then right.

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I have it in my head now.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Off you go.

speaker: A
sentence: I am at the red door. Is this the place?
zh: 我到红色门了。是这里吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, that is it. The place for drink is inside.
zh: 对，就是这里。喝东西的地方在里面。

speaker: A
sentence: Great! I made it. Thanks again.
zh: 太好了！我到了。再次感谢。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Go in and have a good rest.
zh: 不客气。进去好好休息一下。

speaker: A
sentence: I will. The drink will be good after that walk.
zh: 我会的。走了这么久，那杯饮料一定很香。

speaker: B
sentence: Have your drink. Goodbye for now.

speaker: A
sentence: Good morning. Please take your seats.

speaker: B
sentence: Good morning, sir. I am a bit late. My error.
zh: 老师早。我迟了一点点。是我的错。

speaker: A
sentence: That is all right. Take your seat and get ready.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I have my book and pen here.

speaker: A
sentence: Today we get some new words.
zh: 今天我们来学几个新词。

speaker: B
sentence: New words? I hope they are not too hard.

speaker: A
sentence: They are simple. I will put them on the board.

speaker: B
sentence: We say them after you, right?
zh: 我们跟着您念一遍，行吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, that is a good idea. Let me say it, then you say it back.
zh: 好主意，我先说，然后你跟着说。

speaker: B
sentence: I am ready. Let's start.

speaker: A
sentence: Now I will give you a paper with some work to do.
zh: 现在发一张练习纸给你们做。

speaker: B
sentence: A paper? What do we do with it?

speaker: A
sentence: Make new words say things. It is not hard.
zh: 用新词表达意思，不难的。

speaker: B
sentence: I see. I will give it a go.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. Take your time and do your best.

speaker: B
sentence: I am looking at the last one. It is not clear to me.
zh: 我在看最后一道题，不太明白。

speaker: A
sentence: Which bit is hard? Say it for me.
zh: 哪部分卡住了？念给我听听。

speaker: B
sentence: It says 'make a story with these words.' But how long?
zh: 它说‘用这些词编个故事’，但要多长呢？

speaker: A
sentence: Ah, good question. Three or four lines is enough.
zh: 啊，问得好。三四行就够了。

speaker: B
sentence: And do we have to use all the words on the list?
zh: 那得用上列表里所有的词吗？

speaker: A
sentence: No, take three or four. The rest are for you to take what you like.
zh: 不用，拿三四个就行，剩下的你随便拿。

speaker: B
sentence: Right, that makes sense now. Thank you, Miss.
zh: 好了，这下清楚了。谢谢老师。

speaker: A
sentence: You are welcome. Now get on with it, time is short.
zh: 不客气。赶紧写吧，时间不多了。

speaker: B
sentence: I will put it down now. I have a thought for a short story.
zh: 我现在就写，有个小故事的思路了。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. I will come round to see your work in a minute.
zh: 好，我一会儿过来看看你写的。

speaker: B
sentence: I have a story about a cat and a bird.
zh: 我有个关于猫和鸟的故事。

speaker: A
sentence: That sounds good. Let me see what you have.
zh: 听起来不错。让我看看你写的。

speaker: B
sentence: Here it is. The cat saw a bird in the tree.
zh: 写好了。猫看见树上有只鸟。

speaker: A
sentence: Good start. What is after that?

speaker: B
sentence: The bird said, 'I am not for your meal.'
zh: 鸟说：‘我才不是你的午餐。’

speaker: A
sentence: Oh, a bird that talks. That is a laugh.
zh: 哦，一只会说话的鸟。真好笑。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, the cat was surprised and went off.
zh: 嗯，猫吓了一跳，就跑掉了。

speaker: A
sentence: A short story with a smile. Well done.
zh: 一个让人会心一笑的小故事，写得不错。

speaker: B
sentence: Thank you, Miss. I will put it down clean now.
zh: 谢谢老师。我现在把它清楚地写下来。

speaker: A
sentence: Do that. Then hand it in before the bell.
zh: 好，然后在下课前交上来。

speaker: B
sentence: Miss, I have a question about the last one.
zh: 老师，最后一题我有问题。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, what is troubling you?

speaker: B
sentence: The words say 'make a new story'. But how long?
zh: 题目说‘编一个新故事’，但要多长呢？

speaker: A
sentence: Three or four lines is enough. Keep it simple.
zh: 三四行就够了，简单写就行。

speaker: B
sentence: Ah, I see. So a short one like the cat story.
zh: 哦，明白了。那就写个像猫故事那样短的。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I will make one about a dog and a ball.
zh: 好，我写一个关于狗和球的故事。

speaker: B
sentence: A good start. What will the dog do with the ball?
zh: 开头不错。狗会拿球做什么？

speaker: A
sentence: The dog sees the ball in the garden. He runs and gets it.
zh: 狗在花园里看到球，跑过去叼起来。

speaker: B
sentence: Then what? Does he give it back?
zh: 然后呢？他会把球还回去吗？

speaker: A
sentence: No, he takes it to his bed and plays with it there.
zh: 不，他把球叼回窝里，在那儿玩。

speaker: B
sentence: That story is simple. Put it down now.
zh: 那故事很简单。现在写下来吧。

speaker: A
sentence: I have done it. Here is my paper.

speaker: B
sentence: Let me see... Good. The words are clear and the story is short.
zh: 我看看……不错，字迹清楚，故事也简短。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you, Miss. I was not clear about the last question.
zh: 谢谢老师，我刚才对最后一题不太清楚。

speaker: B
sentence: That was a good question. Now put your things away.
zh: 问得好，现在把东西收起来吧。

speaker: A
sentence: Miss, I still have a question about the last part.
zh: 老师，我最后一题还有点问题。

speaker: B
sentence: Which part? The one about the dog?
zh: 哪部分？关于狗的那题吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. The paper says 'put what the dog does after that'.
zh: 对，要求写‘狗之后做什么’。

speaker: B
sentence: That is right. You made a good start.
zh: 没错，你开头写得挺好的。

speaker: A
sentence: But I am not certain if I need to put in more words.
zh: 但我不确定要不要多写几句。

speaker: B
sentence: A short story is good. Three or four lines will do.
zh: 短故事就行，三四行就够了。

speaker: A
sentence: So I can say 'He goes to sleep after the play'?
zh: 那我可以写‘玩完后他就去睡觉’？

speaker: B
sentence: That works well. Keep it simple and clear.

speaker: A
sentence: I will put that down now. Thank you, Miss.
zh: 我现在就记下来，谢谢老师。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Take your time. No need to go quick.

speaker: A
sentence: I have it now. 'He goes to sleep after the play.'
zh: 我写好了，‘玩完后他就去睡觉’。

speaker: B
sentence: Very good. You see? Not so hard.

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. I was troubled for no reason.

speaker: B
sentence: That is normal. New words take time.
zh: 正常，新词总要花时间消化。

speaker: A
sentence: May I say my story out loud?
zh: 我能大声说出我的故事吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Right. Let us have it.

speaker: A
sentence: 'The dog runs and plays. He goes to sleep after the play.'
zh: ‘小狗跑啊玩啊，玩完后他就去睡觉。’

speaker: B
sentence: Clear and true. Well done.

speaker: A
sentence: Do the other words now?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. You have ten more minutes. Go on.

speaker: A
sentence: I will do the word 'jump'.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Make a short story with it.

speaker: A
sentence: The cat jumps on the wall. Then it jumps down.

speaker: B
sentence: Do the one after this.

speaker: A
sentence: What about 'run'? I have a story.

speaker: B
sentence: Let me get that.

speaker: A
sentence: The boy runs to the door. He is late.
zh: 男孩跑到门口，他迟到了。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. Now do 'sleep'.

speaker: A
sentence: The baby sleeps in the bed. It is soft.

speaker: B
sentence: Very good. You are quick today.
zh: 非常好，你今天反应很快。

speaker: A
sentence: I am not clear on the last one.

speaker: B
sentence: Which bit is not clear?

speaker: A
sentence: Do I make a story from what comes after 'put down'?
zh: '写'后面的词。是要我编个故事吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, a short story with the new words.

speaker: A
sentence: Oh, I see. So I put them all in one story?
zh: 哦，懂了。所以我把它们都放进一个故事里？

speaker: B
sentence: That is the idea. Keep it short.

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I will have a go now.

speaker: B
sentence: Take your time. No need to go quick.

speaker: A
sentence: I have it. 'The cat sleeps on the soft bed.'
zh: 我写好了：‘猫在软床上睡觉。’

speaker: B
sentence: Good. That works well.

speaker: A
sentence: What about the word after that? 'Warm'?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. Put 'warm' in a line too.

speaker: A
sentence: I put 'The sun is warm today.'

speaker: B
sentence: Simple and clear. Good work.

speaker: A
sentence: Now I need to put all words in one story.
zh: 现在我得把所有词放进一个故事里。

speaker: B
sentence: That is the last step. You can do it.
zh: 这是最后一步。你能做到的。

speaker: A
sentence: I will have a go. 'The warm sun and the soft bed...'
zh: 我试试：‘温暖的阳光和软软的床……’

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good start. Keep going.

speaker: A
sentence: I do not see how to end it.

speaker: B
sentence: What do you do after you get up?

speaker: A
sentence: I get up and go to school.

speaker: B
sentence: There you go. Put that in.

speaker: A
sentence: Right. 'I get up and go to school.' That is the end.
zh: 好的，‘我起床去上学。’这就是结尾。

speaker: B
sentence: The bell is about to go. Time to go back.

speaker: A
sentence: I will put my paper in my bag. Thank you for your help.
zh: 我把卷子收进书包。谢谢您帮忙。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Have a good day.

speaker: A
sentence: You too. I will leave.

speaker: B
sentence: See you tomorrow. And do your best on that last question.
zh: 明天见。最后那道题好好做。

speaker: A
sentence: I will. I get it now. Thanks again.
zh: 我会的。现在懂了。再次感谢。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Off you go. Do not be late for the one after this.
zh: 好。快走吧。后面的别迟到。

speaker: A
sentence: Good morning. The place is quiet today.

speaker: B
sentence: Good morning. Yes, it is early. How can I help you?
zh: 早上好。是啊，还早。您办什么业务？

speaker: A
sentence: I would like to put my money in my account.

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. Do you have your card with you?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, here it is. And I would like a new card as well.
zh: 带了，给你。我还想办一张新卡。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. A new card for this account?
zh: 好的。新卡也是这个账户吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, that is right. A second card for this account.
zh: 对，同一个账户再办一张卡。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. Take a seat. I will get the papers ready.
zh: 好的。您先坐，我准备一下表格。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. I will keep an eye for my number.

speaker: B
sentence: No need. You are after this one. Come when I say.
zh: 不用等。您就是下一位。我叫您时过来。

speaker: A
sentence: Table twenty three, please. This way.

speaker: B
sentence: That's me. Good morning.

speaker: A
sentence: Good morning. How can I help?

speaker: B
sentence: Here is my money. I would like to put it in my account.
zh: 这是我的工资。我想存进账户。

speaker: A
sentence: And you said a new card too. I have the form here.
zh: 您还说要办张新卡。表格在这儿。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. Please put your name and number here.
zh: 好的。请在这儿填上您的姓名和号码。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. Is this line for the number?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. And put your name at the end.

speaker: A
sentence: Done. Here is the form.

speaker: B
sentence: Let me see the money first.

speaker: A
sentence: Go on. It is all there.

speaker: B
sentence: That number is right. Two thousand.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. Now for the new card, what name?

speaker: B
sentence: Same as the account. My name.

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I will make the card now.

speaker: B
sentence: Here is your new card. Keep it safe.

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. And the PIN? Do I get that now?
zh: 谢谢。密码呢？现在能设吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. Put your finger here.
zh: 可以。请把手指放在这里。

speaker: A
sentence: Like this? OK. What number do I put?

speaker: B
sentence: Any six numbers you keep in mind.
zh: 任何六个你记得住的数字。

speaker: A
sentence: I will use my birth month and day. 0 8 1 5.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now put your finger on the green key. Done.
zh: 好。现在把手指放在绿色键上。好了。

speaker: A
sentence: That was quick. Now I have the card and the money in the account.
zh: 真快。现在卡和钱都到位了。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. Your balance is two thousand and thirty eight.
zh: 是的。您的余额是两千零三十八。

speaker: A
sentence: Great. Thank you for your help. Have a good day.
zh: 太好了。谢谢帮忙。祝您愉快。

speaker: B
sentence: Here is your new card and the receipt for the money.
zh: 这是您的新卡和存款回执。

speaker: A
sentence: Let me see the name and number. Yes, all good.
zh: 我看看姓名和号码。嗯，没问题。

speaker: B
sentence: Keep the card safe. Do not give your number to another person.
zh: 保管好卡片。密码别告诉任何人。

speaker: A
sentence: I will put it in my money bag now. Thanks for the word.
zh: 我这就放钱袋里。多谢提醒。

speaker: B
sentence: That is all done. Anything more?
zh: 都办妥了。还有其他需要吗？

speaker: A
sentence: No, that is all. You have been a great help.

speaker: B
sentence: Happy to help. Have a good week.
zh: 乐意效劳。祝您一周顺利。

speaker: A
sentence: You too. I will come back if I need anything.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. We are open every day from nine to five.
zh: 好的。我们每天九点到五点开门。

speaker: A
sentence: I will keep that in mind. sure.

speaker: B
sentence: sure. be safe of your card.

speaker: A
sentence: I will. It is in my pocket now.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. Have a good day.

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. You too.

speaker: B
sentence: sure.

speaker: A
sentence: What do I do now?

speaker: B
sentence: I will take a picture of you and get your name. Please look here.
zh: 我给您拍张照，再签个字。请看这里。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. Like this?

speaker: B
sentence: Right. Put your name on this line.
zh: 好的。请在这条线上签名。

speaker: A
sentence: Here? Or there?

speaker: B
sentence: Here, at the base. Use the pen, not your finger.
zh: 这里，底部。用笔，别用手指。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. Done.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. I will put the money in your account. Two thousand three hundred, yes?
zh: 好的。我把钱存进您的账户。两千三百，对吧？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, that is the number. Please look at it again.
zh: 对，就是这个数。麻烦再看一下。

speaker: B
sentence: All good. Here is your new card and the paper. Keep them safe.
zh: 全部没问题。这是您的新卡和回单。请收好。

speaker: A
sentence: This card is good. Does it have a small bit inside?
zh: 这张卡不错。里面有小芯片吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, all new cards have a small bit. Safer that way.
zh: 有的，新卡都带一个小东西，更安全。

speaker: A
sentence: And I can use it at any machine?

speaker: B
sentence: Any machine that takes a card. No trouble at all.
zh: 只要是能插卡的机器都行，没问题的。

speaker: A
sentence: What about the old account? Still open?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, still open. You have two accounts now.
zh: 开着呢，您现在有两个账户了。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. I will put some money in the new one by and by.
zh: 那就好。回头我再往新卡里存点钱。

speaker: B
sentence: You may do that on the hand talker or at a machine.
zh: 手机银行或机器上都能操作。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I have it on my hand box.
zh: 好的，我手头的小盒子里已经有了。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. That is all done. Anything more?
zh: 好的，都办好了。还要别的吗？

speaker: A
sentence: No, that is all. Thank you for your help.

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Here is your receipt and the new card.
zh: 不客气。这是您的回单和新卡。

speaker: A
sentence: May I put my name on the back of the card?
zh: 要不要在卡背面签个名？

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good idea. Use a pen, not a sharp thing.
zh: 好主意。用笔写，别用尖东西。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I will do that now. Is the money all safe in the account?
zh: 好，我这就写。钱都安全进账了吧？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, the full amount is in. You may see it on your hand box.
zh: 是的，全额到账。您可以在手机上查看。

speaker: A
sentence: I will do that after this. The new card works from now?
zh: 回头查。新卡现在就能用吗？

speaker: B
sentence: From this minute. The system is up and running.
zh: 从此刻起就能用。系统已经上线了。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. I will keep it safe. Have a good day.

speaker: B
sentence: You too. be safe of your things.
zh: 您也是。保管好随身物品。

speaker: A
sentence: I will put the card in my money bag now.

speaker: B
sentence: Do you have the receipt for the new card?
zh: 新卡的回执单您拿了吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it is here. And the paper for the money.
zh: 拿了，在这儿。还有存款凭条。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Keep them together, you may need them.

speaker: A
sentence: Is it right to put my name on the back now or after?
zh: 我现在在背面签名，还是等会儿？

speaker: B
sentence: Now is best. Use the pen on the table.
zh: 现在签最好。用桌上的笔。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I will do it. Is this the right side?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, the white line. Make it clear, please.

speaker: A
sentence: Done. I will put the card away now.

speaker: B
sentence: All done. Anything more?
zh: 都办妥了。还需要什么吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for helping me.

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Have a good day.

speaker: A
sentence: You too. I will come again if I need anything.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. The door is on your right.

speaker: A
sentence: Right. sure then.

speaker: B
sentence: Well, sure. be safe of your card.

speaker: A
sentence: I will. Thanks again.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. okay after.

speaker: A
sentence: okay. And keep that card safe.

speaker: B
sentence: I will put it in my pocket now.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. The new card works from today.

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. I will use it for my money.
zh: 那挺好。我以后工资就用它。

speaker: A
sentence: A good idea. The old one was a bit slow.

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. I hope the new one is quicker.

speaker: A
sentence: It is. Have a great week.

speaker: B
sentence: Thanks. You too. Good day.

speaker: A
sentence: okay. be safe.

speaker: B
sentence: I will. sure.

speaker: A
sentence: See you. Take care.

speaker: B
sentence: You too. Good day.

speaker: A
sentence: Good evening, ready to start?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, a bit on edge.

speaker: A
sentence: No need. First, watch my steps.

speaker: B
sentence: Right, I will keep my eyes on you.

speaker: A
sentence: Left foot, then right. Like this.

speaker: B
sentence: I see. Go slow.

speaker: A
sentence: Now you have a go. One, two, three.

speaker: B
sentence: One, two, three... Is this right?

speaker: A
sentence: Good, but keep your back straight.

speaker: B
sentence: Got it. Like this?

speaker: A
sentence: Now let us do the full steps with music.
zh: 现在跟着音乐跳完整支舞。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I hope I do not go wrong.

speaker: A
sentence: You will be all right. Take your time.

speaker: B
sentence: One, two, three, four. Turn, then stop.

speaker: A
sentence: I did it! That was not so hard.

speaker: B
sentence: Well done! Now again, but with more feeling.
zh: 做得好！再来一次，但带点感情。

speaker: A
sentence: More feeling? Like a happy jump?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, see the happy time. You are the chief one.
zh: 对，想想欢乐时光。你是主角。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I will smile and move my arms.
zh: 好。我会微笑，手臂也动起来。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. And keep your head up. Ready?
zh: 很好。头抬起来。准备好了吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Ready. One, two, three, four...

speaker: B
sentence: Stop. Your turn was a bit late. Again.

speaker: A
sentence: I am sad. I will keep time better.
zh: 抱歉。我会更好地把握时间。

speaker: B
sentence: No need for that. You are learning.

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks. Let me have another go.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. From the top. One, two, three, four.

speaker: A
sentence: Left foot back, then turn. Keep your arms up.
zh: 左脚后退，然后转。手臂保持抬起。

speaker: B
sentence: Like this? Am I doing it right?

speaker: A
sentence: Almost. You are a bit early. Keep time with the music.
zh: 差不多。你有点早。跟上音乐的拍子。

speaker: B
sentence: I will keep still till the third time.
zh: 我会保持不动，直到第三下。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. Again. One, two, three, turn. Good.

speaker: B
sentence: That was better. What about the arm move?

speaker: A
sentence: Go smooth. Not quick. Like this, see?
zh: 要流畅。别急。像这样，看到了吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. I will make it soft. One, two, three...
zh: 好的。我会做得柔和些。一、二、三……

speaker: A
sentence: Much better. Now the last part. Smile.
zh: 好多了。现在最后部分。微笑。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. Let us do it from the top again.

speaker: A
sentence: One, two, three, turn. Keep your arms soft.

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, that is the way. Now turn round.
zh: 对，就是这样。现在转一圈。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. You are getting it. One more time.

speaker: B
sentence: And that is all. Well done. You have it now.

speaker: A
sentence: Right, do it with the music now?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, I am ready. Let me take a breath.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. Keep your eyes up, not on your feet.

speaker: B
sentence: One, two, three, four. That was a bit quick.

speaker: A
sentence: Take your time. One... two... three... four.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I will go as you go. Again from the start.

speaker: A
sentence: Better. Now turn on three. Yes.
zh: 好多了。现在第三拍转身。对。

speaker: B
sentence: I am getting the trick of it. This is a pleasure.

speaker: A
sentence: You are doing well. One more time and we will have it.
zh: 你做得不错。再来一次我们就完成了。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. Let me put my water down first.

speaker: A
sentence: Ready? Music on three.
zh: 准备好了吗？数到三放音乐。

speaker: B
sentence: One, two, three. Go.

speaker: A
sentence: Step, step, turn. Good.

speaker: B
sentence: I am keeping my eyes up now.

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. Arms out on the turn.

speaker: B
sentence: Like this?

speaker: A
sentence: A bit higher. There you go.

speaker: B
sentence: That is more natural now.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. Last eight moves. Keep with me.

speaker: B
sentence: Five, six, seven, eight. And stop.

speaker: A
sentence: Right. Now we do it with the music.
zh: 好。现在我们跟着音乐来一遍。

speaker: B
sentence: One, two, three, four. Step, together, step.

speaker: A
sentence: Five, six, seven, eight. Turn and look.

speaker: B
sentence: I am a bit slow on the turn.

speaker: A
sentence: That is good. Keep the time. Again.

speaker: B
sentence: Step, turn, look back.

speaker: A
sentence: Like this? Am I turning too early?
zh: 这样吗？我是不是转太早了？

speaker: B
sentence: A short time after. Keep time with the music.
zh: 过一小会儿。跟上音乐的拍子。

speaker: A
sentence: One, two, three, four. Turn on five.

speaker: B
sentence: Five, six, seven, eight. Yes, that is it.

speaker: A
sentence: Now the arms. Up on three, down on seven.
zh: 现在手臂。三拍举起，七拍放下。

speaker: B
sentence: Arms up. Good. Keep them soft.

speaker: A
sentence: One more time from the top. Ready?
zh: 从头再来一次。准备好了吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, let us do it.

speaker: A
sentence: Right, now the music again. This time you do it on your own.
zh: 好，现在音乐再放一次。这次你一个人跳。

speaker: B
sentence: Oh, all right. Here goes.

speaker: A
sentence: Well, one, two, three, four. Turn on five.

speaker: B
sentence: Five, six, seven, eight. That is it.

speaker: A
sentence: Arms up on three. Down on seven.
zh: 三拍手臂举起。七拍放下。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. You did it all the way through.

speaker: A
sentence: I did it! I am out of breath.
zh: 我做到了！我喘不过气了。

speaker: B
sentence: Have some water. You did well for a first go.
zh: 喝点水。第一次跳成这样不错了。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. Same time seven days from now?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. alright then.

speaker: A
sentence: I will be here.

speaker: B
sentence: That is the right way.

speaker: A
sentence: I hope I do well at the get-together.

speaker: B
sentence: You will. It is in your body now.
zh: 你会的。动作已经在你身体里了。

speaker: A
sentence: Do it one more time?

speaker: B
sentence: No, you have done enough for today.

speaker: A
sentence: I seem to be getting better.

speaker: B
sentence: You are. Keep at it and you will be great.
zh: 是的。坚持练，你会跳得很好。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for your help.

speaker: B
sentence: My pleasure. See you after this week.

speaker: A
sentence: Well, this is not what I had in mind.

speaker: B
sentence: We are not going because of the rain.

speaker: A
sentence: I was so looking forward to the water.
zh: 我本来特别期待去水边。

speaker: B
sentence: We had a good idea, did we not?
zh: 我们之前想得多好啊，对吧？

speaker: A
sentence: The little house by the water is gone.

speaker: B
sentence: I booked everything for this day.
zh: 我为了今天把什么都订好了。

speaker: A
sentence: Now it is all for nothing.

speaker: B
sentence: What a waste of a good idea.

speaker: A
sentence: I am sad, but what can we do?
zh: 我很难过，但我们能怎么办呢？

speaker: B
sentence: We may get another chance.
zh: 也许我们还有别的机会。

speaker: A
sentence: I was hoping for that view.
zh: 我本来一心想着那个景色。

speaker: B
sentence: The weather took it all away.

speaker: A
sentence: I was going to take your picture there.
zh: 我本来要在那儿给你拍照的。

speaker: B
sentence: Now it is just a wet street.
zh: 现在只剩湿漉漉的街道了。

speaker: A
sentence: I am sad it did not go well.

speaker: B
sentence: Do you have any other idea?

speaker: A
sentence: Let us see what we can do.

speaker: B
sentence: I had a list of things to do.
zh: 我本来列了一堆事要做。

speaker: A
sentence: I am sad it all went wrong.

speaker: B
sentence: What about a day at the history house?
zh: 去历史馆待一天怎么样？

speaker: A
sentence: That is not the same at all.

speaker: B
sentence: I see, but it may be good.

speaker: A
sentence: I was so ready for the walk.

speaker: B
sentence: We could go to the plant house.

speaker: A
sentence: I would like that, yes.

speaker: B
sentence: Right, so the plant house it is.

speaker: A
sentence: But I had my heart on the water.
zh: 但我心心念念的还是那片水。

speaker: B
sentence: I am sad about that.

speaker: A
sentence: The weather is not our friend today.

speaker: B
sentence: No, it is not. I am tired of the rain.

speaker: A
sentence: Let us look at the plant house list?
zh: 要不看看植物园的介绍？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, what do they have there?

speaker: A
sentence: A warm room with trees and flowers.

speaker: B
sentence: That sounds soft and quiet.

speaker: A
sentence: It will be a good change.

speaker: B
sentence: I would like to see those flying things.
zh: 我想看那些会飞的小东西。

speaker: A
sentence: They say there is a room for them.
zh: 听说有个专门的蝴蝶房。

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. And after that, a warm drink?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, the place with the cat in the book store.
zh: 嗯，就是有猫的那家书店。

speaker: B
sentence: Right, I will put it on the list.

speaker: A
sentence: I am happy we have a new way.
zh: 很高兴我们有了新办法。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it is a good one.

speaker: A
sentence: I was so sad about the old one.
zh: 之前那个泡汤了，我特别难过。

speaker: B
sentence: I saw your face when you got the news.
zh: 我看到你收到消息时的表情了。

speaker: A
sentence: All that work for nothing.

speaker: B
sentence: But we will have a good time tomorrow.
zh: 不过明天我们照样能玩得开心。

speaker: A
sentence: I hope the weather is better.

speaker: B
sentence: Even if it rains, we are inside.

speaker: A
sentence: True. And the cat will be there.
zh: 也是。而且还有那只猫在。

speaker: B
sentence: That makes it better.

speaker: A
sentence: I keep seeing that water in my head.

speaker: B
sentence: Me too. But the plant place has water too.
zh: 我也是。但植物园也有水啊。

speaker: A
sentence: Not the same. That view was special.
zh: 不一样。那个景色很特别。

speaker: B
sentence: I see. But we will make new special views.
zh: 我明白。但我们会创造新的特别景色。

speaker: A
sentence: You are right. What time do we go?
zh: 你说得对。我们几点出发？

speaker: B
sentence: Ten in the morning. I have the tickets.
zh: 上午十点。我已经买好票了。

speaker: A
sentence: And the pot work group?

speaker: B
sentence: That is at two, after the meal.

speaker: A
sentence: Right. Let us get food at the place near the garden.
zh: 好的。我们在花园附近那家店吃饭吧。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. I saw a good list for it on the net.
zh: 好。我在网上看到它家菜单不错。

speaker: A
sentence: What do they have on the list?

speaker: B
sentence: Warm plates and cold plates, and a sweet list.
zh: 有热菜和冷盘，还有甜品单。

speaker: A
sentence: I would like a warm plate, not too sharp.
zh: 我想来份热菜，不要太辣。

speaker: B
sentence: Same for me. And a cold plate to start.

speaker: A
sentence: Right, let's get a sweet after.
zh: 好，我们之后来份甜品吧。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, if we have room. I saw a sweet cake.
zh: 好，如果吃得下的话。我看到有甜蛋糕。

speaker: A
sentence: That is good. I will have the cake.

speaker: B
sentence: I will get the fruit plate. Is that all right?

speaker: A
sentence: Right. What about the pot work?

speaker: B
sentence: We make a pot and paint it. Simple and good.
zh: 我们做陶罐然后上色。简单又有趣。

speaker: A
sentence: I thought we would be at the water now.

zh: 嗯，我会的。谢谢你花时间帮忙。

speaker: A
sentence: No trouble. I hope he gets well quick.
zh: 不客气。希望他快点好起来。

speaker: B
sentence: The man on the bed is opening his eyes.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. That is a good sign. Is he saying anything?
zh: 好。这是好兆头。他在说什么吗？

speaker: B
sentence: He is saying my name. He seems mixed up.
zh: 他在叫我的名字。他好像有点迷糊。

speaker: A
sentence: That is normal after a fall. Let him rest.

speaker: B
sentence: The door is open. The men with the bed are here.
zh: 门开了。推轮床的人到了。

speaker: A
sentence: They will put him on the bed now.
zh: 他们现在要把他抬上轮床了。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. I will go with him.

speaker: A
sentence: You have my number. Send word if you need anything.
zh: 你有我的号码。需要什么就传话。

speaker: B
sentence: Thank you. I will say how he is.
zh: 谢谢。我会告诉你他的情况。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. Keep your head up.

speaker: B
sentence: I will. He is my friend.

speaker: A
sentence: The man is ready. Get in.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I am going now.

speaker: A
sentence: I will be here for a bit. be safe.
zh: 我在这儿待一会儿。安全第一。

speaker: B
sentence: You too. And thank you again.

speaker: A
sentence: Is he breathing? I need to see.

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, slow but safe. Do not move him.

speaker: A
sentence: I put my coat over him. It's cold.
zh: 我把外套盖他身上了。天冷。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. The car is on its way.
zh: 好。救护车已经在路上了。

speaker: A
sentence: How long? It seems like hours.
zh: 要多久？感觉像过了几个小时。

speaker: B
sentence: About five more minutes. Keep talking.
zh: 大概再五分钟。继续说话。

speaker: A
sentence: I see a light. Is that them?
zh: 我看到灯光了。是他们吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, that is the car for ill persons. Wave your arm.

speaker: A
sentence: They are here. Thank you for your help.
zh: 他们到了。谢谢你的帮助。

speaker: B
sentence: You did well. I will let them take over.
zh: 你做得很好。我让他们接手了。

speaker: A
sentence: The men are out now. They have a box.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Let them do their work. Step back a bit.

speaker: A
sentence: They are putting something over his face.
zh: 他们在他脸上放了什么东西。

speaker: B
sentence: That is for air. It will help him get better.

speaker: A
sentence: His eyes are open now. He is looking at me.

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good sign. Talk to him in a low voice.

speaker: A
sentence: You are safe now. The men are here.
zh: 你现在安全了。他们到了。

speaker: B
sentence: He gave a small smile. I have a feeling he sees me.

speaker: A
sentence: Keep him warm. They will take him to the hospital now.
zh: 给他保暖。他们现在要送他去医院。

speaker: B
sentence: I will go with him. Thanks for waiting.
zh: 我跟他一起去。谢谢你等着。

speaker: A
sentence: The door is open. Come inside.

speaker: B
sentence: May I be by him?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, take that seat. Talk to him in a low voice.
zh: 行，坐那儿吧。低声跟他说话。

speaker: B
sentence: He has my hand. That is good.

speaker: A
sentence: Keep his head still. Do not let him move.

speaker: B
sentence: I will not let go. How long to the hospital?

speaker: A
sentence: About ten minutes. We are almost there.

speaker: B
sentence: His color is coming back. That is a good sign.

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, he is getting better. You did well.
zh: 对，他在好转。你做得很好。

speaker: B
sentence: Thank you for your help. I was very much in fear.

speaker: A
sentence: He is opening his eyes. Look.

speaker: B
sentence: Oh, that is a good thing. Hello there, friend.

speaker: A
sentence: He seems mixed up. Where are we?

sentence: We are in the car. You had a fall.

speaker: A
sentence: My head is giving me trouble. What is the trouble?

sentence: You had a fall in the street. But you are safe now.

sentence: I see it now. We were walking.

sentence: Yes, you went down hard. I was so troubled.

speaker: A
sentence: I am troubled. Thank you.

speaker: B
sentence: No trouble at all. Just rest now.

sentence: The man on the line said to keep talking to you.

speaker: A
sentence: Do you see the lights? They are getting nearer.

sentence: Yes, I see them. Red and blue. That is the car for the ill.

speaker: A
sentence: They are stopping. The door is opening.

speaker: B
sentence: Let them come. I will be all right.

speaker: A
sentence: They are here. You are in good hands now.

sentence: The men are quick. One is taking my arm.

speaker: A
sentence: They will put you on a board. Do not move.

speaker: B
sentence: I am on it now. It is not hard.

speaker: A
sentence: They are putting you in the car. I will come with you.

speaker: B
sentence: You are still on the line. Say thanks to him.

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you, sir. You were a great help.

speaker: B
sentence: The line is dead now. They have done their part.

speaker: A
sentence: The man is going quick. But the car is smooth.

speaker: B
sentence: We will be at the hospital in five minutes.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. I have my fingers back. That is a good sign.
zh: 太好了。我又能感觉到手指了。这是个好兆头。

speaker: B
sentence: The doctor is here. You will be all right.

speaker: A
sentence: I am with you. Do not be troubled.

speaker: B
sentence: The night is over. We made it.
zh: 天快亮了。我们挺过来了。

speaker: A
sentence: I had a hard day at work.

speaker: B
sentence: Oh? What went wrong?

speaker: A
sentence: They said I did wrong, but it was not my doing.
zh: 他们说我做错了，可那不是我的问题。

speaker: B
sentence: That is rough. Did you get a chance to say your side?

speaker: A
sentence: No one would let me talk. I kept it all in.

speaker: B
sentence: That is a hard thing to go through on your own.

speaker: A
sentence: It is better now that I am talking about it.

speaker: B
sentence: That is good to say. I am here for you.

speaker: A
sentence: I am a bit lighter now.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Let us walk a little more.

speaker: A
sentence: It was like no one saw me.

speaker: B
sentence: I okay and I get you.

speaker: A
sentence: I only needed one person to see.

speaker: B
sentence: Now I do. Go on if you like.

speaker: A
sentence: That is enough for now. Thank you.

speaker: B
sentence: I am pleased you said it.

sentence: It was hard to say at first.

speaker: B
sentence: But you did it. That is strong.

speaker: A
sentence: I am not so tight now.

speaker: A
sentence: You are right. I will keep that in mind.

speaker: B
sentence: Right, let's get a warm drink.

speaker: A
sentence: That sounds good. My throat is dry.

speaker: B
sentence: There is a place down the road.

sentence: That is a good thing you said.

sentence: Me too. It was hard at first.

speaker: B
sentence: Let us get a cold plate as well?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, that is a good idea.

speaker: B
sentence: I am pleased we came here.

speaker: A
sentence: Me too. The air is good for talking.

speaker: B
sentence: You are a good friend.

sentence: So are you. Now get on with your food.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. This place makes me happy.

speaker: A
sentence: I was not happy at work today.

speaker: A
sentence: They said I did wrong. It was not my doing.

sentence: That is hard. Did you say your side?

sentence: I said my bit, but no one gave ear.

speaker: B
sentence: That is a sad thing for you.

speaker: B
sentence: Let us walk a bit more.

sentence: I was so shut up all day.

speaker: B

sentence: Now I see it was not so great a thing.

speaker: B
sentence: But it seemed very great then.

sentence: I had the same last month.

sentence: What did you do?

speaker: B

speaker: A
sentence: Well, i am not so tight now.

speaker: B

speaker: A
sentence: You are right. It was like a stone in my chest.

sentence: I have been there. It is a hard feeling.

sentence: Sleep sounds like a good idea.

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. And tomorrow is a new day.

speaker: A
sentence: I will keep that in mind.

speaker: B

speaker: A
sentence: That sounds good. I would like a warm plate.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. There is a place down the road.

speaker: A
sentence: Do they have soft food? Not too sharp.

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, they keep it simple and soft.

speaker: A
sentence: Great. I am ready for some comfort.

speaker: B
sentence: A good meal will make you better.

speaker: A
sentence: I hope so. Today was a long day.

speaker: B
sentence: It is over now. You did well.

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for walking with me.

speaker: B
sentence: Any time. That is what friends are for.

speaker: A
sentence: I am feeling much better now.

speaker: B

sentence: Do not do that. Let it out.

speaker: A
sentence: I will have a go. You are a good friend.

sentence: You are the same. We be safe of one another.

speaker: A
sentence: I am ready to go to my house now.

speaker: B
sentence: Let us get a warm drink first?

speaker: A
sentence: That sounds good. A tea would be pleasing.

speaker: B
sentence: Come on then. My turn to put the money down.

speaker: A
sentence: I am feeling better now.

speaker: B
sentence: Well, good. Talking helps, does it not?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. I see things better.

speaker: B
sentence: That is the way. You are strong.

sentence: Coming up. You are all right now.

sentence: I will pull first.

sentence: My picture went still for a second.

speaker: B
sentence: I had to take the heat for you.

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks, man. Same time seven days from now?

speaker: A
sentence: I would like that. No more sharp bits.

sentence: We will be ready. I will get a better net.

sentence: Good. I will send you the list before then.

sentence: We are ready for the match.

sentence: Right. Let us start now.

speaker: B
sentence: Good play. You did well.

sentence: Nice work. We won.

sentence: Thanks. You too.

sentence: Okay, let us go.

sentence: Right, ready for the chief?

sentence: Watch the red circle on your left.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. I will make you well.

sentence: Jump on three. One, two, three!

sentence: We got through. His cover is down.

sentence: Now use your strongest move.

sentence: Done. He is almost dead.

speaker: B
sentence: My box is fixed. I am not moving.

sentence: Get back! I will take the blows.

sentence: It is working again. I am back.

sentence: Use all your power now. Quick!

sentence: Yes! He is down. We did it!

sentence: Well done. That was a near thing.

speaker: B
sentence: Your quick move saved us.

sentence: I thought we were done for.

sentence: That is a good idea. I am moving now.

sentence: Done! It is dead! We did it!

speaker: B
sentence: Good. I do not want to hear breaking sounds from behind us.
zh: 好，我不想听到后面传来碎裂声。

speaker: A
sentence: Nothing in those boxes can break. The glass things are in the soft part.
zh: 那些箱子里没有易碎的，玻璃东西都在软垫里包着。

speaker: B
sentence: I think I may fall asleep. My arms are dead.
zh: 我可能要睡着了，手臂完全没力气了。

speaker: A
sentence: Sleep. I will wake you when we get there.

speaker: B
sentence: Here we are.

speaker: A
sentence: Third floor, right side.

speaker: B
sentence: Open it. Let us see.

speaker: A
sentence: After you.

speaker: B
sentence: Empty. The floor is good wood.
zh: 空荡荡的，地板是好木头。

speaker: A
sentence: It will fill up fast. Where do you want the big seat?
zh: 很快就会满了，大沙发放哪里？

speaker: B
sentence: By the window. I want to sit there when the sun comes in.
zh: 靠窗户那边，阳光进来的时候我想坐那儿看看外面。

speaker: A
sentence: Good idea. I will bring it up first.
zh: 好主意，我先把它搬上来。

speaker: B
sentence: I will hold the door.

speaker: A
sentence: This is... very... heavy.

speaker: B
sentence: Lift from your legs, not your back.

speaker: A
sentence: Easy to say from where you are standing.
zh: 站在你那个位置说起来很轻松。

speaker: B
sentence: Do you want me to take a side?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes — the door end. Here.

speaker: B
sentence: Got it. On three — one, two, three.

speaker: A
sentence: It is through. Keep going.

speaker: B
sentence: Turn left — the room is to the left.

speaker: A
sentence: I see it.

speaker: B
sentence: Down — gently.

speaker: A
sentence: There. By the window.

speaker: B
sentence: It looks right here.

speaker: A
sentence: It does. What is next?

speaker: B
sentence: The sleeping thing. I can not sleep on the floor tonight.

speaker: A
sentence: The frame first, then the soft part.

speaker: B
sentence: The soft part — is that the one in the blue cover?
zh: 床垫——是套蓝色罩子的那个吗？

speaker: A
sentence: That is the one.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I will carry the frame. You take the boxes from the car.
zh: 好，我来抬床架，你负责把箱子从车上搬下来。

speaker: A
sentence: Done.

speaker: A
sentence: Last box.

speaker: B
sentence: Let me take it.

speaker: A
sentence: I am all right. Just... slow.

speaker: B
sentence: You did most of the work today.

speaker: A
sentence: That is what best friends are for.
zh: 这就是最好的朋友该做的。

speaker: B
sentence: Then this best friend will make dinner. That is what I will do.
zh: 那么这个最好的朋友来做晚饭，这是我要做的。

speaker: A
sentence: Done. But first — where does this box go?
zh: 成交，不过先说——这个箱子放哪儿？

speaker: B
sentence: That is the kitchen one. In there.

speaker: A
sentence: Done. I am sitting down now.

speaker: B
sentence: Sit on the seat by the window. You have earned it.
zh: 坐窗边的沙发，你赚到了。

speaker: A
sentence: It is a very good seat.

speaker: B
sentence: I have had it for four years.

speaker: A
sentence: It does not look four years old.
zh: 看起来不像用了四年的。

speaker: B
sentence: I be safe of my things.

speaker: A
sentence: This place looks like a home already.
zh: 这地方看起来已经像个家了。

speaker: B
sentence: Just from one seat?

speaker: A
sentence: And the light. It is warm in here.

speaker: B
sentence: I picked this room because of the window.
zh: 我选这个房间就是因为那扇窗户。

speaker: A
sentence: Good pick.

speaker: B
sentence: Thank you. For everything today.

speaker: A
sentence: Well, that is what best friends are for.
zh: 这就是最好朋友的用处。

speaker: A
sentence: What a dirty room this is.

speaker: B
sentence: You have not cleaned it for a week.

speaker: A
sentence: I see. I will do it now.

speaker: B
sentence: May I give you a hand?

speaker: A
sentence: That is kind, but I will do it.

speaker: B
sentence: You have many books on the floor.

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I will put them back on the shelf.

speaker: B
sentence: And your bed is not made.

speaker: A
sentence: I will do that after the floor.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I will be here then.

speaker: A
sentence: Right, first the floor.

speaker: B
sentence: I will get the brush.

speaker: A
sentence: Good, I will move my feet.

speaker: B
sentence: You are a great help.

speaker: A
sentence: That is right, I am only seated.
zh: 那当然，我只是坐着而已。

speaker: B
sentence: Right, here is the brush.

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks. I will start from the edge.

speaker: B
sentence: May I move those books?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, put them on the bed for now.

speaker: B
sentence: These are all over the place.

speaker: A
sentence: I see. I let them be for a week.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I will put them by size.

speaker: A
sentence: Good idea. Then they go on the shelf.

speaker: B
sentence: The shelf is full. What about these?

speaker: A
sentence: I will make space. Give me a minute.

speaker: B
sentence: I will take these to the shelf now.
zh: 我现在把这些拿上书架。

speaker: A
sentence: Do you have a place for them?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, I will put them on the top shelf.

speaker: A
sentence: That shelf is high. Do you need a hand?

speaker: B
sentence: No, I am tall enough. Thanks.

speaker: A
sentence: I will clean the floor while you do that.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. The dust is thick here.

speaker: A
sentence: I will get the thing for dust. Keep the dust together.
zh: 我去拿簸箕，你把灰扫成一堆。

speaker: B
sentence: I have a small group now. Ready for you.
zh: 我扫了一小堆了，等你来收。

speaker: A
sentence: Here I come. That is much dust.

speaker: B
sentence: Right, the floor looks clean now.

speaker: A
sentence: Good work. Now for the books on the table.
zh: 干得好。现在来弄桌上的书。

speaker: B
sentence: I will put them back on the shelf.

speaker: A
sentence: Give you the ones on the left?
zh: 要我把左边的递给你吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, please. Then we will make the bed.

speaker: A
sentence: Here are the books from the left.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I will put them in order by size.

speaker: A
sentence: That one has a loose page. Keep it separate.

speaker: B
sentence: I will put it on the end. Now for the bed.

speaker: A
sentence: Let us take off the old cloth first?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, and give it a good shake out the window.

speaker: A
sentence: The cushion is flat. I will make it soft.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Then we put on the clean cover.

speaker: A
sentence: Pull your side tight. That is straight now.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. The room is clean and ordered.
zh: 很好，房间干净又整齐了。

speaker: A
sentence: Now for the floor. I will get the brush.
zh: 现在弄地板，我去拿扫帚。

speaker: B
sentence: I will give you a hand. Where is the box for dust?
zh: 我帮你，装灰尘的盒子在哪儿？

speaker: A
sentence: Under the table. I will put the dust in a little mass.
zh: 桌子底下，我把灰扫成一堆。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I will keep the box still for you.

speaker: A
sentence: That is the last of it. Now for the books on the shelf.
zh: 扫干净了，现在弄书架上的书。

speaker: B
sentence: Some are the wrong way. Let us put them right.
zh: 有几本放反了，我们正过来。

speaker: A
sentence: I will take the great ones first. They go on the lowest part.

speaker: B
sentence: And the small ones on top. That looks better.
zh: 小的放上面，这样好看多了。

speaker: A
sentence: Put the clothes from the seat in the basket.
zh: 把座位上的衣服放进篮子里。

speaker: B
sentence: I will fold them for you. You do the rest of the room.
zh: 我帮你叠，你弄房间其他地方。

speaker: A
sentence: Now for the bed. It is a great mass of cloth.

speaker: B
sentence: Take the cover off first, yes?

speaker: A
sentence: Well, yes, and give it a good shake out the window.

speaker: B
sentence: I will get the other side. Pull hard.

speaker: A
sentence: Right, that is flat now. Make the head rest soft.
zh: 好了，现在平了，把枕头拍松。

speaker: B
sentence: I will give it a soft touch or two. There, soft again.
zh: 我轻轻拍两下，好了，又软了。

speaker: A
sentence: Now put the cover back. Push the ends under.
zh: 现在套上被罩，把边塞进去。

speaker: B
sentence: You are good at this. It is like new.

speaker: A
sentence: And the floor near the door.

speaker: B
sentence: I will get the brush. You have a rest.

speaker: A
sentence: Right, the floor is clean now. What about the books?
zh: 好了，地板干净了。书怎么办？

speaker: B
sentence: I will put them back on the shelf. Some are out of order.
zh: 我把它们放回书架。有些乱了。

speaker: A
sentence: Let me give you a hand. Which ones go where?

speaker: B
sentence: Great ones on the left, small ones on the right. That is the way.
zh: 大的左边，小的右边。就这样。

speaker: A
sentence: This one has a loose page. Do you have paste?
zh: 这本掉页了。你有胶水吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, in the drawer. I will put it right in a bit.
zh: 有，在抽屉里。我一会儿弄好。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. And the clothes on the seat?

speaker: B
sentence: I will fold them and put them away. Keep going.

speaker: A
sentence: You have a number of shirts. Do you put them on?

speaker: B
sentence: Not all, but I keep them. One day, if I have a use.
zh: 不全穿，但留着。哪天有用再说。

speaker: A
sentence: Right, the floor is clean now. What about the bed?

speaker: B
sentence: I will make it. Give me a minute.

speaker: A
sentence: You do well with the cloth. It is flat.
zh: 你床单铺得真顺。很平整。

speaker: B
sentence: It is not hard. Just a pull and a fold.

speaker: A
sentence: Now the room looks like a room again.

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. I am happy with it. Let me get the dust off the shelf.
zh: 嗯。我很满意。我来擦擦书架上的灰。

speaker: A
sentence: I will do that. You take a rest.

speaker: B
sentence: No, I am good. Two hands are quicker.
zh: 不用，我没事。两只手更快。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. Then I will put the last books in order.
zh: 好的。那我把最后几本书排好。

speaker: B
sentence: Done. The room is clean and the air is new.
zh: 搞定。房间干净，空气也新鲜。

speaker: A
sentence: Right, all that is done. Let us have a rest.
zh: 好了，都弄完了。我们歇会儿吧。

speaker: B
sentence: Good idea. My back is a bit tired.

speaker: A
sentence: Here, take the seat. I will be on the bed.

speaker: B
sentence: Thanks. This room is like a new place now.
zh: 谢了。这房间现在跟新的一样。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. Hard morning, but it was good.
zh: 是啊。忙了一早上，但挺好。

speaker: B
sentence: I will get us some water. You look dry.
zh: 我去倒点水。你看起来渴了。

speaker: A
sentence: That would be great. Two cups, please.
zh: 那太好了。请拿两个杯子。

speaker: B
sentence: Here you are. Not too cold, just right.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. So, what are you doing this week?
zh: 好的。那你这周有什么安排？

speaker: B
sentence: I have work on day two, but the other days are free.
zh: 周二有工作，但其他日子都空着。

speaker: A
sentence: I am free on day three. Are you free?

speaker: B
sentence: That sounds good. Where to?

speaker: A
sentence: What about the gardens? The sun is out.
zh: 去公园怎么样？出太阳了。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I will get some food.

speaker: A
sentence: Great. I will make some bread with meat.
zh: 太好了。我做点夹肉的面包。

speaker: B
sentence: No sharp bits, please. You have my number.
zh: 别放辣的。你知道我的口味。

speaker: A
sentence: Oh! Yes, I will keep it soft.

speaker: B
sentence: You are a good friend.

speaker: A
sentence: Right back at you. Now rest a bit.
zh: 彼此彼此。现在休息会儿吧。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. This is the best part of the day.
zh: 是啊。这是一天中最舒服的时候。

speaker: A
sentence: What a day! The sky is so blue.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. Not a cloud in the sky.

speaker: A
sentence: The sun through the trees is warm.
zh: 阳光透过树照下来暖暖的。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it makes them look gold.
zh: 是啊，它们都变成金色了。

speaker: A
sentence: I needed this walk. Work has been hard.
zh: 我正需要走走。工作太累了。

speaker: B
sentence: A walk in the open air does good.

speaker: A
sentence: These trees are like old friends.
zh: 这些树就像老朋友一样。

speaker: B
sentence: Quiet and strong. They make me quiet.
zh: 安静又结实。它们让我安静。

speaker: A
sentence: The air smells of grass and earth.
zh: 空气里有青草和泥土的味道。

speaker: B
sentence: Let us go at a low rate and take it all in.
zh: 我们慢慢走，好好感受吧。

speaker: A
sentence: Look at that cloud. It is like a sheep.

speaker: B
sentence: A sheep with a long tail. Quite a laugh.
zh: 一只长尾巴的羊，挺有趣的。

speaker: A
sentence: I am happy we came out today.
zh: 很高兴我们今天出来了。

speaker: B
sentence: Me too. The sun is good for the mind.

speaker: A
sentence: Let us go that way. The road is quiet.
zh: 我们走那边吧？那条路安静。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, let us go that way. It is quiet and green.

speaker: A
sentence: I see a bird on that branch. It is red and black.
zh: 我看到那根树枝上有只鸟，红黑相间的。

speaker: B
sentence: It is making a sweet sound. Do you get it?
zh: 它在发出好听的声音，你听到了吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it is a happy sound. It makes me smile.
zh: 嗯，听起来很快乐，让我也想笑。

speaker: B
sentence: Look at those flowers. They are all different colors.

speaker: A
sentence: The red ones are bright. I like them best.
zh: 红色的那几朵很鲜艳，我最喜欢。

speaker: B
sentence: The wind is soft today. It is good on my face.
zh: 今天的风很轻柔，吹在脸上很舒服。

speaker: A
sentence: It takes away my tired thoughts. I am free.
zh: 它吹走了我疲惫的思绪，我自由了。

speaker: B
sentence: Let us rest here a bit. The grass is dry.
zh: 我们在这儿歇一会儿吧，草是干的。

speaker: A
sentence: Good idea. I will put my head back and see the sky.
zh: 好主意，我仰起头看看天空。

speaker: B
sentence: The sky is very blue today. No cloud in the sky.
zh: 今天的天空真蓝，天上没有云。

speaker: A
sentence: It is a good day for a walk. I am happy we came out.
zh: 真是个散步的好天气，很高兴我们出来了。

speaker: B
sentence: Look at that bird. Its front is red.
zh: 看那只鸟，它的前胸是红色的。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it is a small bird. They are common here.

speaker: B
sentence: The flowers smell sweet. What are those yellow ones?
zh: 这些花闻起来很香，那些黄色的是什么？

speaker: A
sentence: I see yellow flowers. They come up on their own.
zh: 我看见黄花，自己长出来的。

speaker: B
sentence: The wind is blowing the grass. It looks like waves.
zh: 风吹着草地，看起来像波浪。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it is a beautiful view. I could be here all day.
zh: 是啊，真美，我可以在这儿待一整天。

speaker: B
sentence: Do you see the children playing? They are happy.
zh: 你看到那些玩耍的孩子了吗？他们很开心。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, they make me young again. Let us go a bit more.
zh: 嗯，他们让我又年轻了。我们再走走吧。

speaker: B
sentence: May we rest on that seat for a bit?
zh: 我们在那张椅子上歇一会儿吧？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, that is a good idea. My legs are tired.

speaker: B
sentence: The sun is warm on my face. I like this.
zh: 阳光照在脸上暖暖的，我喜欢。

speaker: A
sentence: It makes me put work out of my head.
zh: 它让我把工作抛到脑后。

speaker: B
sentence: Let us come here again after this week.

speaker: A
sentence: Look at that cloud. It is like a horse.

speaker: B
sentence: Oh, yes. I see its head and legs.
zh: 哦，是的，我看到它的头和腿了。

speaker: A
sentence: The wind is soft today. Not too sharp.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. It is good for a walk like this.

speaker: A
sentence: That bird has a sweet song.
zh: 听到那只鸟了吗？叫声很甜。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. It makes the place quieter.

speaker: A
sentence: I would like to rest here for a minute.
zh: 我想在这儿休息一会儿。

speaker: B
sentence: Let us get some water first?

speaker: A
sentence: That is all right. I have a bottle with me.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Then we can watch the flowers.
zh: 好，然后我们可以看看花。

speaker: A
sentence: The flowers are bright today.

speaker: B
sentence: Quite so. Red and yellow together.

speaker: A
sentence: I like the smell of the grass.

speaker: B
sentence: It is clean and sweet.

speaker: A
sentence: Look at that bee on the flower.

speaker: B
sentence: It is full of persons, like us at work.
zh: 人多得很，像我们上班一样。

speaker: A
sentence: But it seems happy.

speaker: B
sentence: It may be happy in the sun.

speaker: A
sentence: I am happy too now.

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. Let us keep walking.

speaker: A
sentence: The air is so soft today.

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it is like a warm cover.

speaker: A
sentence: I see a bird with a red front.

speaker: B
sentence: That bird has a sweet voice.

speaker: A
sentence: I would like to rest here for a time.

speaker: B
sentence: Let us take that seat under the tree.
zh: 我们坐树底下那张椅子吧。

speaker: A
sentence: The shade is good. My head is not warm now.
zh: 树荫真好，我脑袋不热了。

speaker: B
sentence: Look at the clouds. One is like a horse.

speaker: A
sentence: I see it. And that one is like a ship.

speaker: B
sentence: This is a good day. I am happy we came.
zh: 今天真好，我很高兴我们来了。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it is a good day for a walk.

speaker: B
sentence: The air is good here.

speaker: A
sentence: My body is less tight now.
zh: 我感觉身体没那么紧绷了。

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. The green does you good.
zh: 那就好。绿色对你有好处。

speaker: A
sentence: Look at those flowers. They are so bright.

speaker: B
sentence: Would you like to go nearer?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, let us go and see them.

speaker: B
sentence: I see a bee on that red one.
zh: 我看见一只蜜蜂在那朵红花上。

speaker: A
sentence: It is getting its food from the flower.

speaker: B
sentence: The open air is a good rest for the mind.
zh: 户外对心灵是很好的休息。

speaker: A
sentence: I like the sound of the wind in the trees.
zh: 我喜欢风吹过树的声音。

speaker: B
sentence: It makes everything seem quiet and far away.
zh: 它让一切显得安静又遥远。

speaker: A
sentence: Look at that bird with the blue feathers.

speaker: B
sentence: It is quite a bright blue, is it not?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it is like a bit of the sky come down.
zh: 是啊，像一小片天空落下来了。

speaker: B
sentence: The sun is warm on my face.

speaker: A
sentence: I am glad we are here today.
zh: 我很高兴今天咱们来这儿。

speaker: B
sentence: Me too. I was needing a change of view.
zh: 我也是。我正需要换个环境。

speaker: A
sentence: Do you see that cloud? It is like a small animal.
zh: 你看到那朵云了吗？像只小动物。

speaker: B
sentence: Oh, that is right. Or a dog with long ears.
zh: 哦，没错。或者像一只长耳朵狗。

speaker: A
sentence: The air is getting a bit cold now.

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, the sun is going down. Time to go back.
zh: 是啊，太阳要下山了，该回去了。

speaker: A
sentence: Come again same time?

speaker: B
sentence: I would like that. Same time?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, three. That is a good time.

speaker: B
sentence: Look at the sky. All orange and red-blue.
zh: 看天空，全是橙色和红蓝色。

speaker: A
sentence: It is a beautiful end to the day.
zh: 给这一天画了个美丽的句号。

speaker: B
sentence: I am much better now. Thank you for coming.
zh: 我现在感觉好多了，谢谢你陪我来。

speaker: A
sentence: That is what friends are for.

speaker: B
sentence: Let us go. I will make tea at my place.

speaker: A
sentence: Tea sounds good. What do you have?

speaker: B
sentence: Tea with a smell like a fruit or a simple black tea.
zh: 带果香味的茶或普通红茶。

speaker: A
sentence: A cup of tea with a little milk, please.

speaker: B
sentence: Same for me. I will put the kettle on.

speaker: A
sentence: This walk was what I needed.
zh: 这次散步正是我需要的。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, the air is so clean here.
zh: 是啊，这里的空气真干净。

speaker: A
sentence: The birds make a soft sound. So quiet.

speaker: B
sentence: I will come again after this week.

speaker: A
sentence: Let us make it a regular thing?
zh: 我们把它变成常规活动吧？

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. Every week on the same day?

speaker: A
sentence: I am so on edge.

speaker: B
sentence: What is wrong?

speaker: A
sentence: I have a test in one hour.
zh: 我一小时后就要考试了。

speaker: B
sentence: You have been working hard.

speaker: A
sentence: I am not certain I will do well.

speaker: B
sentence: That is a normal feeling.

speaker: A
sentence: What if my memory is gone?

speaker: B
sentence: You will not. You are ready.

speaker: A
sentence: I have my notes here.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Let us go through them.

speaker: A
sentence: I am still ill at heart.

speaker: B
sentence: That is all right. Have a look at the first line.

speaker: A
sentence: First part: the chief ideas.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now take a slow breath.

speaker: A
sentence: Take air in... out... That is better.

speaker: B
sentence: You see? You have it well.

speaker: A
sentence: I do, but my head is full of doubt.
zh: 是，但我脑子里全是怀疑。

speaker: B
sentence: Doubt is only a sign you care.
zh: 怀疑只是你在意的表现。

speaker: A
sentence: What if I have nothing in my head in the room?
zh: 万一我在房间里脑子里什么都没了呢？

speaker: B
sentence: Then you take three slow breaths again.
zh: 那你就再慢慢做三次深呼吸。

speaker: A
sentence: And if the words will not come?
zh: 要是想不起来怎么说呢？

speaker: B
sentence: You have the key points on that paper.
zh: 你那张纸上有关键要点。

speaker: A
sentence: True. I will keep it on my table.

speaker: B
sentence: And have some water now. It will help.
zh: 现在喝点水。会有帮助的。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. One more breath, and I am ready.
zh: 好。再吸一口气，我就准备好了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. You look a bit better now.
zh: 好。你现在看起来好一点了。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, the water did help a bit.

speaker: B
sentence: Now, say the first point out loud.
zh: 现在，把第一条大声说出来。

speaker: A
sentence: The first part of the first division.
zh: 第一个部分的第一部分。

speaker: B
sentence: That is right. You have it clear.

speaker: A
sentence: And the second point? The hard one.
zh: 那第二点呢？那个难的部分。

speaker: B
sentence: The rules for the long division.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. You see? It is all there.

speaker: B
sentence: I am more ready now, yes.
zh: 我现在确实更有准备了，是的。

speaker: A
sentence: Then we go. Time to do this.
zh: 那我们走吧。是时候上场了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now, take a deep breath with me.
zh: 好。现在，跟我一起深呼吸。

speaker: A
sentence: In for four, out for six. Like the slow bell.
zh: 吸四秒，呼六秒。像慢钟声一样。

speaker: B
sentence: The stiff feeling is going.

speaker: A
sentence: That is the way. One more time, together.
zh: 就是这样。再来一次，一起。

speaker: B
sentence: Better. Now, have some water before we go.
zh: 好多了。现在，出发前喝点水。

speaker: A
sentence: Here, take this cup. It is warm, not cold.
zh: 来，拿着这杯。是温的，不是凉的。

speaker: B
sentence: Thank you. My mouth was dry.

speaker: A
sentence: That is normal. The water will help your body.
zh: 正常。水能让身体稳下来。

speaker: B
sentence: I still have a knot here, in my stomach.
zh: 我这里还是有个结，在胃里。

speaker: A
sentence: That knot will go when you start writing.
zh: 等你开始写，那个结就解开了。

speaker: B
sentence: Is that so? I hope you are right.
zh: 你确定吗？希望你说得对。

speaker: A
sentence: I have been through this before. Take my word.

speaker: B
sentence: What if I see a question I do not have the answer to?
zh: 万一碰到不会的题怎么办？

speaker: A
sentence: Then do another one. Come back after.
zh: 那就先做另一题，回头再来。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. Go past and come back. That is a good idea.

speaker: A
sentence: Right. Now say your notes out loud. That will keep them in your head.
zh: 好了。现在把笔记大声说出来。这样就能记在脑子里。

speaker: B
sentence: I will have a go. 'Part three, chief points...'

speaker: A
sentence: Good. Your voice is getting stronger. Keep going.
zh: 好。你的声音越来越稳了。继续。

speaker: B
sentence: I did it. I am a bit better now.
zh: 念完了。现在感觉好一点了。

speaker: A
sentence: See? You are good at this. Now do it with me. In... keep... out.
zh: 看吧？你擅长这个。现在跟我做。吸……屏住……呼。

speaker: B
sentence: In... keep... out. My chest is less tight.
zh: 吸……屏住……呼。胸口没那么紧了。

speaker: A
sentence: One more time. In... keep... out. There. You are ready.
zh: 再来一次。吸……屏住……呼。好了。你准备好了。

speaker: B
sentence: Let us go now? The sun is up and the air is clean.
zh: 我们现在走吗？太阳出来了，空气很干净。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. I have my pen and my ticket. Let us go.
zh: 好。我带了笔和准考证。走吧。

speaker: B
sentence: That is the way. One step at a time. You have got this.
zh: 这才像话。一步一步来。你行的。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. Now, one last thing. A drink of water.

speaker: B
sentence: Here. Not too cold. It will help your throat.

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks. My mouth was dry.

speaker: B
sentence: That is normal. Now, what is the first thing you will do?
zh: 正常。现在，你进去第一件事做什么？

speaker: A
sentence: Look at the questions. All of them.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Then what?

speaker: A
sentence: Do the ones I see first. Keep the hard ones for after.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. You have a way. That is a start.
zh: 很好。你有办法了。这是个开始。

speaker: A
sentence: I will not let the time get to me.

speaker: B
sentence: That is the way. Now, let us go and do it.
zh: 这才像话。走吧，去把它搞定。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. One more deep breath before we go.
zh: 好。走之前再来一次深呼吸。

speaker: B
sentence: In through the nose, out through the mouth.

speaker: A
sentence: I am a bit better now.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Your mind is clear. That is what you need.
zh: 好。脑子清楚了。这就是你需要的。

speaker: A
sentence: What if I get a question I have not seen?
zh: 要是碰到没见过的题怎么办？

speaker: B
sentence: Then take a breath and do what you can. No one has all the answers.
zh: 那就吸口气，能做多少做多少。没人全知道。

speaker: A
sentence: You are right. I have done my best.
zh: 你说得对。我已经尽力了。

speaker: B
sentence: And that is enough. Now, are you ready?
zh: 那就够了。现在，准备好了吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. Let us go.

speaker: B
sentence: That is right. I will be here when you come out.
zh: 这才像样。我在这儿等你出来。

speaker: A
sentence: Let us go over the key points again.

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, that might help. Start with the first part.
zh: 好，可能有帮助。从第一部分开始吧。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. The chief ideas are clear now.
zh: 对。主要想法现在清楚了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now take a slow breath in, and out.
zh: 好。现在慢慢吸气，再呼出来。

speaker: A
sentence: I am a bit quieter after that.
zh: 做完这个我感觉平静些了。

speaker: B
sentence: Have some water. It will keep your throat wet.

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks. My heart is slower now.

speaker: B
sentence: You have done your best. Be certain of that.
zh: 你该做的都做了。相信自己。

speaker: A
sentence: I will keep that in mind.

speaker: B
sentence: That is the way. Now let us go.

speaker: A
sentence: I am ready now.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Let us go to the test place.

speaker: A
sentence: I will do my best.

speaker: B
sentence: That is all a man can do.

speaker: A
sentence: The sun is bright today.

speaker: B
sentence: A good sign, I would say.

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, a good sign.

speaker: B
sentence: Keep your head up.

speaker: A
sentence: I will. Go after the test.

speaker: B
sentence: Talk then. Go on.

speaker: A
sentence: Right, off you go.

speaker: B
sentence: Thanks for being here.

speaker: A
sentence: That is what family does.

speaker: B
sentence: I will not let you down.

speaker: A
sentence: You will not let you down.

speaker: B
sentence: This pen is my good sign.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. Use it well.

speaker: B
sentence: I will take my time.

speaker: A
sentence: That is the way.

speaker: B
sentence: See you in two hours.

speaker: A
sentence: Right, I need to get to my account.

speaker: B
sentence: Put in your name and secret word.

speaker: A
sentence: Done. The page is getting ready.

speaker: B
sentence: Take your time, no need to be quick.

speaker: A
sentence: The money is enough for the payment.

speaker: B
sentence: Good, then let us go to the send money part.
zh: 很好，那我们去转账页面。

speaker: A
sentence: I see the button for sending money.

speaker: B
sentence: Give it a push and we will make a start.

speaker: A
sentence: Right, the form is open. What is first?
zh: 好的，表格打开了。先填什么？

speaker: B
sentence: First, put in the account number of the man who gets the money.

speaker: A
sentence: I have his number here. Let me put it in.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Be certain every number is right.

speaker: A
sentence: What is after that?

speaker: B
sentence: Now the price. How much for the room?

speaker: A
sentence: One thousand two hundred. I will put that down.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now look at the number again.

speaker: A
sentence: It is the same as his note. All good.

speaker: B
sentence: Then put in the price. One thousand two hundred.

speaker: A
sentence: Done. The number is in the box.

speaker: B
sentence: See the name of the man who gets it.

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it is Green. That is right.

speaker: B
sentence: Now push the button to send it.

speaker: A
sentence: I will do that now. There it goes.

speaker: B
sentence: Keep still till the green light. It is done.

speaker: A
sentence: The money is sent. That is a weight off.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now see what money you have left.

speaker: A
sentence: I will go back to the first page.

speaker: B
sentence: What does it say?

speaker: A
sentence: It says eight hundred and fifty.

speaker: B
sentence: That is enough for this month, then?

speaker: A
sentence: I hope so. I have food and car to get.
zh: 希望吧，还得买吃的和车费。

speaker: B
sentence: You will be all right. Keep the numbers in your head.

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I will be more wise from now on.

speaker: B
sentence: Is there anything more I can do for you?

speaker: A
sentence: No, that is all. Thank you for your help.

speaker: B
sentence: Right, now please put in the number of the account.

speaker: A
sentence: I have it here. One, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight.
zh: 我这里有。一二三四五六七八。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now put in the amount.

speaker: A
sentence: Eight hundred and fifty. Done.

speaker: B
sentence: Make certain the details are right before you say yes.
zh: 请确认信息无误再点确认。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I have looked at them. They are right.

speaker: B
sentence: Then go on and say yes to send it.

speaker: A
sentence: I will. There, it is done.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. The money will go through in a short time.

speaker: A
sentence: That is a weight off my mind.
zh: 我心里一块石头落地了。

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. Would you like to see your balance?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, please. Let me go back to the front page.
zh: 好的，请稍等。我返回首页。

speaker: B
sentence: Take your time.

speaker: A
sentence: I see it now. It is lower, but still safe.

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. Anything more?
zh: 那就好。还有其他需要吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for helping me.

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Have a rest up.

speaker: A
sentence: You too. sure.

speaker: B
sentence: sure.

speaker: A
sentence: I will put the phone down now.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. be safe.

speaker: A
sentence: Well, you too. sure.

speaker: B
sentence: Good day.

speaker: A
sentence: The talk is done. I am free.

speaker: B
sentence: Time for a cup of tea.

speaker: A
sentence: Right, I am in my account now.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now go to the send money part.

speaker: A
sentence: I see it. What number do I put?

speaker: B
sentence: Put the number from your house owner.

speaker: A
sentence: I am putting it in now. Done.

speaker: B
sentence: Now the amount. How much?

speaker: A
sentence: One thousand two hundred fifty.

speaker: B
sentence: Put that in and have a look.

speaker: A
sentence: It is right. I will send it now.

speaker: B
sentence: Look for the done sign.

speaker: A
sentence: It says 'done'. That is good.

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, the money is on its way.

speaker: A
sentence: Let us see the amount now?

speaker: B
sentence: Right, go back to the first page.

speaker: A
sentence: I see it. The number is lower now.

speaker: B
sentence: Is it still enough for this month?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, but not much more. I will go at a quiet rate.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. Any more to give?

speaker: A
sentence: No, that is all. Thanks for your help.

speaker: B
sentence: No problem at all.

speaker: A
sentence: Right, I will put in the account number now.

speaker: B
sentence: Take your time. No need to be quick.

speaker: A
sentence: The number is in. Now the amount.

speaker: B
sentence: Is that the full payment for this month?
zh: 这是这月的整笔付款吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, the full number. Here it goes.

speaker: B
sentence: Please see the name and number again.
zh: 请再核对一下户名和账号。

speaker: A
sentence: All good. I will say yes now.

speaker: B
sentence: Keep an eye on the green light.

speaker: A
sentence: It says done. The money is on its way.
zh: 显示完成了。钱已经转出。

speaker: B
sentence: Good work. That is the last step.
zh: 干得好。这是最后一步了。

speaker: A
sentence: Let me see the balance now.

speaker: B
sentence: It went down, but still safe.

speaker: A
sentence: Will that be all for tonight?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, that is all. Thank you.

speaker: A
sentence: Do not mention it.

speaker: B
sentence: And you. okay.

speaker: A
sentence: I will put the page away now.

speaker: B
sentence: Keep in mind to go out.

speaker: A
sentence: Right, I am out. All done.

speaker: B
sentence: Great. rest up after this.

speaker: A
sentence: I will turn off the light now.

speaker: B
sentence: Good idea. Rest your eyes.
zh: 好主意。让眼睛休息一下。

speaker: A
sentence: The house payment is done. That is a weight off.
zh: 房租交了。心里一块石头落地了。

speaker: B
sentence: Quite. You kept to the last day.
zh: 确实。你赶在了最后一天。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I almost let it go. What a simple man I am.
zh: 是啊，我差点忘了。我真傻。

speaker: B
sentence: But you did it. That is what is important.
zh: 但你办到了。这才是重要的。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I will keep my eyes open from now.
zh: 说得对。以后我会多留神。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now get some sleep.

speaker: A
sentence: I will. rest up, and thanks for your help.
zh: 好的。好好休息，谢谢你的帮助。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Good night.

speaker: A
sentence: My old shoes are broken. The base is coming off.
zh: 我旧鞋坏了，鞋底都裂了。

speaker: B
sentence: Oh, that is bad. Do you need new shoes for your journey?
zh: 哦，那糟了。你旅行得买双新的吧？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I am looking at some now. What about this grey one?
zh: 对，我正在看。这双灰色的怎么样？

speaker: B
sentence: The look is all right. But the notes say it runs small.

sentence: Right. I'll go a size up then. How about this black one?

speaker: B
sentence: That is a bit dear. For that price, you might get a better one.
