speaker: A
sentence: True. I like these white ones. The price is right and the size is good.

sentence: Great. Go for it then. You will have them for the journey.

sentence: What does the clock say for time?

sentence: Good. You will have them for the journey.

sentence: Go soft. Do not cut the box.

sentence: No trouble. There we go.

sentence: Have a look at the size. Is it 42?

sentence: Yes, it is still there. The shoes are safe.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now, what about the old ones?

speaker: A
sentence: They are in the waste box. No more use.
zh: 扔垃圾桶了，不能再穿了。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. A new start for your feet.
zh: 对，你的脚要重新开始了。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. I will take them for a long walk tomorrow.
zh: 是的，明天我要穿着走远路。

speaker: B
sentence: Make a picture of your feet in them. I would like to see.
zh: 拍张你穿着鞋的照片，我想看看。

speaker: A
sentence: I will send you a picture now.

speaker: B
sentence: Do that. I am waiting.

speaker: A
sentence: Here it is. What is your idea?
zh: 发过去了。你觉得怎么样？

speaker: B
sentence: They look good on you. Very clean.
zh: 你穿着挺好看的，很干净。

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks. I am happy with them.

speaker: B
sentence: What was the last amount you gave?

speaker: A
sentence: Two hundred thirty eight, with a note.

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good price for a good shoe.
zh: 这鞋质量不错，价格公道。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. I will keep them for a long time.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now get some sleep. It is late.

speaker: A
sentence: I will put them in the box now.
zh: 我现在把鞋放回盒子里。

speaker: B
sentence: Keep the note for the order.

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I will put it in the box too.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Then you will have no trouble if something goes wrong.
zh: 好，这样万一有问题也不怕。

speaker: A
sentence: True. But I do not see any trouble.
zh: 也是，不过我觉得不会出岔子。

speaker: B
sentence: You may not be certain. It is wise to be safe.
zh: 你也许不确定。保险点总没错。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I will do that.

speaker: B
sentence: So, are you ready for the journey?
zh: 那，旅行准备得怎么样了？

speaker: A
sentence: Almost. Just need to put my things in the bag now.
zh: 差不多了，就差把东西装进包里了。

speaker: B
sentence: Well then, have a good sleep. rest up.
zh: 那行，睡个好觉。好好休息。

speaker: A
sentence: I will see when the car comes now.
zh: 我现在看看快递什么时候到。

speaker: B
sentence: The guide says it will come tomorrow afternoon.

speaker: A
sentence: That is good. I will be here then.

speaker: B
sentence: After you get the shoes, how about a walk?
zh: 等你拿到鞋后，我们出去走走？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I would like to have a go.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I will come at three.

speaker: A
sentence: Right. alright then.

speaker: B
sentence: The car is here. I see a box at the door.
zh: 快递到了，门口有个箱子。

speaker: A
sentence: Quick, get it inside and open it.

speaker: B
sentence: The box is not damaged. That is good.

speaker: A
sentence: Cut the band. Let us see the shoes.

speaker: B
sentence: Oh, the box inside is clean and white.
zh: 哦，里面的鞋盒干干净净的。

speaker: A
sentence: Take them out. Are they the right size?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, 42. Let me put them on.

speaker: A
sentence: Are they all right? Not too tight?

speaker: B
sentence: They are soft and a good size. That is all right.

speaker: A
sentence: Great. You are ready to go.
zh: 太好了，你准备好出发了。

speaker: B
sentence: I will take a picture for my friend. He will be happy.
zh: 我拍张照给朋友，他肯定高兴。

speaker: A
sentence: Send it. Then put the old ones in the waste box.
zh: 发吧。然后把旧鞋扔垃圾桶。

speaker: B
sentence: Done. New shoes for the journey. Good night.
zh: 搞定。旅行有新鞋了。晚安。

speaker: A
sentence: I put in my name and word, but it will not let me in.
zh: 我输入了用户名和密码，但进不去。

speaker: B
sentence: What is the trouble? Is the word wrong?
zh: 出什么问题了？密码不对吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it says the word is not right. I have to get in the system today.
zh: 是的，它说密码不对。我今天必须登录系统。

speaker: B
sentence: I see. Do you have your account name with you?
zh: 明白了。你手边有账户名吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it is my work box.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. I will send a note to that box to let you put in a new word.
zh: 好的。我会向那个邮箱发一封邮件，让你设置新密码。

speaker: A
sentence: Will that take long? I have a thing to send in before the end of the day.
zh: 那要很久吗？我今天之前要交一份东西。

speaker: B
sentence: No, it will be quick. Let me send it now.
zh: 不会，很快的。我现在就发。

speaker: A
sentence: I see it in my box. I will go to the net.
zh: 我在收件箱里看到了。我去上网。

speaker: B
sentence: Take your time. Let me see if you have any trouble.
zh: 慢慢来。让我看看你有没有问题。

speaker: A
sentence: Right, I have the page open now.
zh: 好的，我现在打开了那个页面。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Put in a new word that is not like the old one.
zh: 好的。输入一个跟旧密码不同的新密码。

speaker: A
sentence: I have put in a new one. It says it is done.
zh: 我输入了新密码。它说已完成。

speaker: B
sentence: Great. Now go back to the sign-in page and test it.
zh: 很好。现在回到登录页面试试。

speaker: A
sentence: I am in! Thank you for your help.
zh: 我登进去了！谢谢你的帮助。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. Go back to the sign-in page and give it a go.
zh: 好了。回到登录页，试试看。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for helping me.
zh: 我进来了！谢谢你的帮忙。

speaker: B
sentence: Happy to help. Did you put the new word in a place?
zh: 很高兴能帮忙。你把新词记在什么地方了吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Not now. I will put it in my book.
zh: 还没。我这就记在本子上。

speaker: B
sentence: Good idea. That way you will not have this trouble again.
zh: 好主意。这样你就不会再遇到这个麻烦了。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I have it now. It is safe in my book.
zh: 是的，现在记下了。在本子上很安全。

speaker: B
sentence: Great. Is there anything more?

speaker: A
sentence: No, that is all. You have been a great help.
zh: 没有了，就这些。你帮了大忙。

speaker: B
sentence: My pleasure. Have a good day and do well with your work.
zh: 不客气。祝你有美好的一天，工作顺利。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. You too. sure.

speaker: B
sentence: Right, the new word is in your book now. That is good.
zh: 好，新词现在记在本子上了。那很好。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I will not make the same error again.
zh: 是的，我不会再犯同样的错误了。

speaker: B
sentence: Let us go through the steps again to be certain.
zh: 我们再过一遍步骤，确保没问题。

speaker: A
sentence: No need. I have it all in my head and in my book.
zh: 不用了。我都记在脑子里和本子上了。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. Then you are ready to get on with your work.
zh: 那行。那你就可以继续工作了。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I will do that now. Thank you for your time.
zh: 是的，我这就去。谢谢你花时间帮我。

speaker: B
sentence: Not at all. I am happy it all went well.
zh: 别客气。很高兴一切顺利。

speaker: A
sentence: One last thing: if you have any trouble, do come back to us.
zh: 最后一件事：如果还有问题，随时找我们。

speaker: B
sentence: I will keep that in mind. Thanks again.

speaker: A
sentence: You are welcome. Have a good day now.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. Your new word is ready.
zh: 好的，你的新密码已经准备好了。

speaker: A
sentence: I have put it in my book.
zh: 我已经把它记在本子上了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Do you have any other questions?
zh: 很好。你还有其他问题吗？

speaker: A
sentence: No, that is all. I am ready to go in.

speaker: B
sentence: Go on. Let me have word if you need more.
zh: 请便。如果需要什么，随时告诉我。

speaker: A
sentence: Right, I am in. The page is open.
zh: 好了，我进来了。页面打开了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now you can put in your work.
zh: 很好。现在你可以提交你的东西了。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I see the button. Here goes.
zh: 是的，我看到按钮了。开始吧。

speaker: B
sentence: Take your time. No need to be quick.

speaker: A
sentence: Done. It says 'sent' on the glass.
zh: 完成了。玻璃上显示‘已发送’。

speaker: B
sentence: That is great. So you are ready.
zh: 太好了。那你都准备好了。

speaker: A
sentence: I am. I will keep this new word safe.
zh: 是的。我会把这个新密码收好。

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good idea. Put it down if you like.
zh: 好主意。如果想的话，写下来。

speaker: A
sentence: I have done that. It is in my book now.
zh: 我已经写了。现在在我的本子里。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. Then you will have no more trouble.
zh: 好的。那你就不会再遇到麻烦了。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. So what is the new word?

speaker: B
sentence: It is the year 2024.

speaker: A
sentence: That is a good one. Hard to see through.
zh: 这个不错，不容易被猜到。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, I put numbers in it.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. Now you may go in the system.
zh: 很好。现在你可以进入系统了。

speaker: B
sentence: I will do it now.

speaker: A
sentence: Go on. I will be here.

speaker: B
sentence: It works! I am in.

speaker: A
sentence: Well done. So your work is done?
zh: 干得好。那你的工作完成了？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, I will send the paper now.
zh: 是的，我现在就发送文件。

speaker: A
sentence: Right, so the paper is sent?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it went through well without trouble.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. Now you have a new secret word.
zh: 很好。现在你有新密码了。

speaker: B
sentence: I will keep it safe this time.

speaker: A
sentence: Do you have a place to put it?

speaker: B
sentence: I will put it down in my book.

speaker: A
sentence: That is a good idea.

speaker: B
sentence: I will not make the same error again.
zh: 我不会再犯同样的错误了。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. Anything more?

speaker: B
sentence: No, that is all. Thank you for your help.

speaker: A
sentence: Right. Now you have a new secret word.
zh: 好了，现在你有了新密码。

speaker: B
sentence: Well, i will keep it safe this time.

speaker: A
sentence: Got a bit of paper for that?

speaker: B
sentence: Well, i will put it down in my book.

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I will do that right away.

speaker: B
sentence: Is the system working well for you?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, all is good. I will send the paper.
zh: 是的，一切顺利。我这就提交文件。

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. Say if you need more help.
zh: 很好。需要更多帮助就说一声。

speaker: A
sentence: Done. The paper is sent.

speaker: B
sentence: Well done. That is all for you.

speaker: A
sentence: I will put my new word in writing.

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good idea. Put it on paper.

speaker: A
sentence: I have a little book here. I will put it in.
zh: 我这儿有个小本子。我把它写上去。

speaker: B
sentence: Then you will not have this trouble again.
zh: 这样你就不会再遇到这个麻烦了。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I will keep it safe.

speaker: B
sentence: Is there anything more I can do for you?
zh: 还有其他我能帮你的吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Well, thank you for helping me.

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Have a good day.

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks for your help.
zh: 不用了，就这些。多谢你帮忙。

speaker: B
sentence: No problem at all.

speaker: A
sentence: You too. sure.

speaker: B
sentence: Goodbye. Take care.

speaker: A
sentence: Good afternoon. I am here for the flat.

speaker: B
sentence: Right, come in. I am Brown.

speaker: A
sentence: The steps are a bit much. But the place looks good from here.
zh: 台阶有点多，不过从这儿看房子还不错。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, the view is better from the top. This way.
zh: 是的，楼上的视野更好。这边走。

speaker: A
sentence: The living room gets much sun. That is a good thing.
zh: 客厅采光很好，这是个加分项。

speaker: B
sentence: It does. South-facing, so warm all day.

speaker: A
sentence: How much for the house a month?

speaker: B
sentence: Twelve hundred. Water and heating are in that.
zh: 一千二，水费和暖气都算在里面。

speaker: A
sentence: That is a bit high for me. I was hoping for nine hundred.
zh: 这对我来说有点高，我本以为九百。

speaker: B
sentence: Nine hundred is too low for this part. All the house things are new.
zh: 在这个地段九百太低了，家具都是新的。

speaker: A
sentence: I see they are new. But my money is short.
zh: 我看得出来是新的，但我手头紧。

speaker: B
sentence: How much can you give then?

speaker: A
sentence: Would one thousand be possible?

speaker: B
sentence: One thousand... I would have to say no to that.

speaker: A
sentence: What if I give more for the first payment?

speaker: B
sentence: What do you say?

speaker: A
sentence: I put down two months now, but the price is one thousand a month.
zh: 我现在付两个月，但每月价格是一千。

speaker: B
sentence: Two months now? That is two thousand up front.
zh: 先付两个月？那就是两千块现钱。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. And the rest month by month. That is right, is it not?
zh: 对，剩下的按月付。这样挺公平的，对吧？

speaker: B
sentence: That is right. But I still need one year on the paper.
zh: 行。但我还是要在纸上写一年。

speaker: A
sentence: A year is too long for me. I may move for work after six months.
zh: 一年对我来说太长了，六个月后我可能因为工作要搬。

speaker: B
sentence: If you go after six months, I have to get a new man. That is trouble.
zh: 你六个月就走，我还得再找人，挺麻烦的。

speaker: A
sentence: I will keep the place clean and in good order. No damage.
zh: 我会保持房子干净整洁，不会有损坏。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. Six months then. But you give me all six months now.
zh: 好吧，那就六个月。但你要一次性付清六个月房租。

speaker: A
sentence: Six thousand at one time? That is a great number for me.
zh: 一次性六千？对我来说太多了。

speaker: B
sentence: I see your point. But I have my rules.
zh: 我明白你的意思，但我有我的规矩。

speaker: A
sentence: What about three months now and three after?
zh: 先付三个月，后面三个月再付怎么样？

speaker: B
sentence: Three months now is still three thousand. That is less hard.
zh: 先付三个月就是三千，压力小点。

speaker: A
sentence: I would be happy with that. And you get your money safe.
zh: 这样我也乐意，你的钱也稳当。

speaker: B
sentence: That is right. Three thousand now, three thousand in three months.
zh: 行吧，先付三千，三个月后再付三千。

speaker: A
sentence: Great! I will get the money tomorrow.

speaker: B
sentence: No need. I take card or net payment.
zh: 不用，我收刷卡或网络支付。

speaker: A
sentence: Even better. I will do the payment now then.

speaker: B
sentence: Let me get the payment box. One second.

speaker: A
sentence: Take your time. I will look at the room again.

speaker: B
sentence: Here is the box. You put your card in.
zh: 刷卡机来了，您把卡插进去。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. Let me do that now.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. The payment went through.

speaker: A
sentence: Right. So when may I come in?
zh: 好的，那我什么时候能搬进来？

speaker: B
sentence: Seven days from now from ten in the morning. I will be here.
zh: 下周六上午十点起就行，我在这儿等你。

speaker: A
sentence: That is good. I will come on day six morning.
zh: 那好，我第六天早上过来。

speaker: B
sentence: Do you have a car for your things?

speaker: A
sentence: No, just bags. I do not have much.
zh: 没有，就几个包，东西不多。

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. The lift is working, so no trouble.
zh: 那没问题，电梯能用，不费劲。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. One more thing: is the net connection ready?
zh: 好的，还有件事：网线通了吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it is on. The name and key are on the box.
zh: 通了，账号密码在盒子上写着。

speaker: A
sentence: Great. I will need that for my work.
zh: 太好了，我工作需要上网。

speaker: B
sentence: I see. Then you will be happy here.
zh: 明白，那你在这儿会住得舒服。

speaker: A
sentence: I would say so. The room gets good light.
zh: 我也觉得，这房间采光好。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. It is a good place. be safe of it.

speaker: A
sentence: May we have another look at the cooking room?
zh: 我们能再看一眼厨房吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Right. This way. The water is warm, and the fire is clean.
zh: 好的，这边走。水是热的，火也干净。

speaker: A
sentence: The ice box is new. That is good.

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. I put it in last month. It keeps things cold well.
zh: 对，上个月装的，制冷很好。

speaker: A
sentence: What about the washing machine? Does it work?

speaker: B
sentence: It does. I will let you see. You put the clothes in, put your finger on this, and it goes.
zh: 好用，我演示给你看。衣服放进去，按这个键就行。

speaker: A
sentence: That is simple. I like that.

speaker: B
sentence: The place is ready for you. No troubles so far.
zh: 房子都准备好了，目前没啥问题。

speaker: A
sentence: I am happy with it. But the price is still a bit high for me.
zh: 我挺满意的，但价格对我来说还是有点高。

speaker: B
sentence: I gave you a good price. This part is in need.
zh: 我已经给你好价了，这地段抢手。

speaker: A
sentence: I see. But I am learning, so my money is short.
zh: 我懂，但我在学习，所以手头紧。

speaker: B
sentence: What is your top number?

speaker: A
sentence: I was hoping for nine hundred a month.
zh: 我本来希望九百一个月。

speaker: B
sentence: Nine hundred is too low for this place.
zh: 九百太低了，这房子不行。

speaker: A
sentence: What if I give you a thousand?

speaker: B
sentence: A thousand is still low, but I might say yes if you give the money for six months at one time.
zh: 一千还是低，但如果你一次性给六个月的钱，我可能同意。

speaker: A
sentence: Six months all at one time? That is six thousand. Hard for me.
zh: 一次性付半年？那就是六千，对我来说难。

speaker: B
sentence: That is the best I can do.
zh: 这是我能给的最好条件了。

speaker: A
sentence: Let me see... I will take it. Six months, a thousand a month.
zh: 让我想想……我租了。半年，每月一千。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Then it is fixed.

speaker: A
sentence: Let us see the rooms again.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. Take your time.

speaker: A
sentence: The room window gets good light.

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it faces south. Warm in winter.

speaker: A
sentence: Does the payment for the room cover heating?
zh: 房间的费用包含暖气吗？

speaker: B
sentence: No, that is separate. About fifty a month.
zh: 不，另外算，大概每月五十。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. And the water and electric?

speaker: B
sentence: Those are on you as well. Not much.

speaker: A
sentence: Quite right. The place is clean and quiet.
zh: 没错。这地方干净又安静。

speaker: B
sentence: That is what I was going for. Happy you like it.
zh: 我就是想这样。很高兴你喜欢。

speaker: A
sentence: So the payment is twelve hundred a month?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, that is the price. Good value for this part.
zh: 对，就是这个价。这地段很值了。

speaker: A
sentence: I have little money. Is nine hundred possible?

speaker: B
sentence: Nine hundred? That is too low. The house things are all new.
zh: 九百？太低了。家里的东西都是新的。

speaker: A
sentence: What about one thousand? I give the first month and a safe money.
zh: 一千怎么样？我付首月并给一笔押金。

speaker: B
sentence: One thousand is still low. But I might do one thousand fifty.
zh: 一千还是低。但一千零五十可以考虑。

speaker: A
sentence: One thousand fifty... That is still a bit much. What about one thousand, and I give you six months all at one time?
zh: 一千零五十……还是有点吃力。一千怎么样，我一次性付半年？

speaker: B
sentence: Six months all at one time? That is six thousand. That would help me.
zh: 一次性付半年？那就是六千。这倒帮了我。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. I can get the money together. I would take good care of the place.
zh: 对。我能凑到钱。我会好好爱护房子的。

speaker: B
sentence: That is right. One thousand a month, six months up front. It is a go.
zh: 行。一千一个月，半年预付。成交。

speaker: A
sentence: May we see the room again? I would like to be certain.
zh: 我们再看一眼房间吧？我想确认一下。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. This way. Sun comes in all afternoon.
zh: 好的。这边请。下午阳光一直照进来。

speaker: A
sentence: The window is good. And the bed is new, yes?
zh: 窗户不错。床是新的，对吧？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, new bed, new table. I put them in last month.
zh: 对，新床新桌子。上个月刚换的。

speaker: A
sentence: The cooking room is clean. That is important for me.
zh: 厨房很干净。这对我来说很重要。

speaker: B
sentence: I keep it clean. The last man was a cook. No trouble.
zh: 我保持得很干净。上一个租户是厨师，没出过问题。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. Then I am happy. Let us make the paper work.
zh: 好。那我满意了。我们来办手续吧。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. Let me get the paper from the drawer.
zh: 好的。我从抽屉里拿合同出来。

speaker: A
sentence: Take your time. I will have a last look at the room.
zh: 不着急。我最后再看一眼房间。

speaker: B
sentence: Here it is. Two copies. Please go through it.

speaker: A
sentence: The price for the room is one thousand a month, six months up front. That is right.
zh: 房间的价格每月一千，半年预付。没错。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. The first payment is for one moon of the room. I have the money ready.
zh: 是的。首付是一个月的房间使用费。钱我已经准备好了。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. Put your name at the end of every page.
zh: 好的。每页末尾签上你的名字。

speaker: B
sentence: Done. Here is the money. Six thousand for the house, one thousand as a safe note.
zh: 签好了。这是钱。六千房费，一千押金。

speaker: A
sentence: I will see. ... Seven thousand. That is right.
zh: 我数一下……七千。数目对了。

speaker: B
sentence: Here is your key. The one for the front door, the small one for your room.
zh: 这是你的钥匙。大门那把，小的是你房间的。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. I will come on the day after the last day of the week with my things.
zh: 谢谢。我会在一周最后一天之后的那天带我的东西过来。

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. The room will be ready for you.
zh: 没问题。房间会给你准备好。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. I will be here about ten in the morning.
zh: 好的。我大概早上十点到。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. See you then. Take care of the key.
zh: 好。到时候见。保管好钥匙。

speaker: A
sentence: Good evening. Do you have a booking?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, under my name. Seven thirty, two of us.
zh: 有的，我提前订了，七点半，两位。

speaker: A
sentence: Right, this way. Your window table is ready.
zh: 好的，请跟我来，靠窗的桌子准备好了。

speaker: B
sentence: Oh good — my friend likes a window seat.
zh: 太好了，我朋友喜欢坐窗边。

speaker: A
sentence: Here you are. I will leave two lists with you.
zh: 这边请，我给你们放两份菜单。

speaker: B
sentence: Thank you. This place looks very good.

speaker: A
sentence: We hope so. Take your time with the list.
zh: 希望您喜欢，慢慢看，不用着急。

speaker: B
sentence: Quick question — what is good tonight?

speaker: A
sentence: The fish came in today. Very good. And the cold meat plate is popular.
zh: 鱼是今天到的，非常新鲜；凉菜那道卤肉也很受欢迎。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. One thing — my friend does not eat cilantro.
zh: 好的，有一点要说——我朋友不吃香菜。

speaker: A
sentence: No cilantro. I will make a note. Anything else?
zh: 不放香菜，我记下来，还有别的要求吗？

speaker: B
sentence: She can not eat very spicy food. A little is fine, but not a lot.
zh: 她不能吃太辣的，少辣可以，但不能多。

speaker: A
sentence: I can ask the cook to go easy on the spicy for any dish. Just say the word.
zh: 每道菜都可以让厨师少放辣，您告诉我哪道要备注。

speaker: B
sentence: Let me look at the list first. Give me five minutes.
zh: 我先看一下菜单，给我五分钟。

speaker: A
sentence: Of course. I will come back when you are ready.
zh: 当然，您准备好了叫我就行。

speaker: B
sentence: Right — the cold plate first. The meat one, easy on the sharp.
zh: 好，先来个凉菜——卤肉那道，少辣。

speaker: A
sentence: Cold meat plate, easy on the sharp. Got it.

speaker: B
sentence: And the fish for a warm plate. No cilantro, as I said.
zh: 热菜要那道鱼，不放香菜，就像我说的。

speaker: A
sentence: Fish, no cilantro. Any other warm plates?
zh: 鱼不放香菜，还要别的热菜吗？

speaker: B
sentence: What is the stir-fried vegetables? The one on the board.
zh: 那个油炒蔬菜是什么？就是黑板上写的那道。

speaker: A
sentence: That is a green vegetable, cooked in good oil. A little sharp at the end.
zh: 那是空心菜，用好油炒的，最后有一点点辣。

speaker: B
sentence: Sounds good. We will have one. Keep the sharp small.
zh: 听起来不错，来一份，辣味少放点。

speaker: A
sentence: And tonight the beef is very good — the cook did it a special way.
zh: 今晚的牛肉也很好——厨师用了特别的做法。

speaker: B
sentence: The beef? How much more would that be?

speaker: A
sentence: Sixty eight. It comes with a warm sauce on the side.

speaker: B
sentence: All right. Add the beef. My friend loves beef.
zh: 行，加一道牛肉，我朋友最爱吃牛肉了。

speaker: A
sentence: Beef with warm sauce. And to drink?
zh: 牛肉配热蘸酱，饮料要什么？

speaker: B
sentence: Just water — two, no ice.

speaker: A
sentence: Right. Rice for two as well?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, two rice. That should be everything.

speaker: A
sentence: Let me read it back — cold meat plate easy sharp, fish no cilantro, vegetable small sharp, beef with sauce, two rice, two water.
zh: 我复述一下——凉菜卤肉少辣、鱼不放香菜、空心菜少辣、牛肉配热酱、两碗饭、两杯水。

speaker: B
sentence: That is right. You got it all.

speaker: A
sentence: I will put the order in now. The cold plate will come first, about five minutes.
zh: 我现在去下单，凉菜大概五分钟先上。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. We are in no hurry tonight.
zh: 好的，我们今晚不赶时间。

speaker: A
sentence: Here is your water.

speaker: B
sentence: Thank you. This room has a nice feeling.
zh: 谢谢。这个地方氛围挺好的。

speaker: A
sentence: We like it. We have been here eight years.
zh: 我们也喜欢，这家已经开了八年了。

speaker: B
sentence: Eight years! We walked past before but never came in.
zh: 八年！我们之前路过几次但一直没进来。

speaker: A
sentence: Well, you are here now. I will check on your order.
zh: 现在来了就好，我去看看您的菜。

speaker: B
sentence: Take your time.

speaker: A
sentence: Here is your cold plate — meat, easy sharp. I told the cook no cilantro for every dish.
zh: 凉菜来了——卤肉少辣，我跟厨师说了每道菜都不放香菜。

speaker: B
sentence: You remembered everything. Thank you.
zh: 你把所有备注都记住了，谢谢。

speaker: A
sentence: Of course. I hope you enjoy it.

speaker: B
sentence: This cold plate is very good. The colour alone looks right.
zh: 这凉菜看着就好，光颜色就对了。

speaker: A
sentence: The cook uses an old way for the cold plate. Been the same for years.
zh: 厨师做凉菜用的是老方子，多年没变过。

speaker: B
sentence: My friend already cleaned half the plate. That is the best sign.
zh: 我朋友已经吃掉一半了，这是最好的评价。

speaker: A
sentence: Ha! I will let the cook know.

speaker: B
sentence: Not too sharp at all — just enough. She was worried.
zh: 辣度刚好，一点不过头——她之前还担心呢。

speaker: A
sentence: Here is the fish plate. Mind — the dish is warm.

speaker: B
sentence: Oh, it smells very good.

speaker: A
sentence: Fresh today. No cilantro, as you asked.
zh: 今天到的鱼，香菜没放，按您说的。

speaker: B
sentence: The fish is soft. And the sauce has a good depth.

speaker: A
sentence: That is the cook's own sauce. He has been making it since we opened.
zh: 那是厨师自己调的酱，从开店就用到现在。

speaker: B
sentence: I can tell. It is different from other places.
zh: 能尝出来，跟其他地方不一样。

speaker: A
sentence: Here is the vegetable. Small sharp, as you asked.
zh: 空心菜来了，少放辣，按您说的。

speaker: B
sentence: The oil smells like it was made here.
zh: 这个油香，感觉是自己做的。

speaker: A
sentence: It is. Old way. Been the same since we opened.
zh: 没错，老方法，从开店就是这个味道。

speaker: B
sentence: You keep saying that. This place has its own way of doing things.
zh: 你一直提这个，这家店有自己的坚持。

speaker: A
sentence: Eight years of the same way. Some things should not change.
zh: 八年如一，有些东西就是不该变。

speaker: B
sentence: I agree. And here is the beef — we almost forgot.
zh: 我同意。牛肉来了，差点忘了还有这道。

speaker: A
sentence: Here is the beef plate. Warm sauce on the side.

speaker: B
sentence: My friend stopped eating the fish to look at it.
zh: 我朋友放下鱼筷子看这道了。

speaker: A
sentence: The cook will be happy to hear that.
zh: 厨师知道了会很高兴的。

speaker: B
sentence: Can we have more rice? One more cup, please.

speaker: A
sentence: Of course. Right away.

speaker: B
sentence: I said we would not eat too much tonight.

speaker: A
sentence: Ha. You said that five minutes ago.

speaker: B
sentence: Exactly. And now we need more rice.
zh: 就是啊，结果还是要加饭。

speaker: A
sentence: Here is your extra rice. And more water?

speaker: B
sentence: Please. This meal is going very well.
zh: 要，谢谢，这顿饭吃得非常好。

speaker: A
sentence: I am glad. Is everything to your taste?
zh: 我很高兴听到，每道都合口味吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Better than I hoped. The beef is the best thing on the table.
zh: 比我预期的还好，牛肉是这桌最好的。

speaker: A
sentence: It is the cook's favourite to make. He puts a lot of time into it.
zh: 这是厨师最喜欢做的一道，他花了很多心思。

speaker: B
sentence: Tell him it worked. My friend put her bowl down and just ate the beef for five minutes.
zh: 告诉他成功了——我朋友放下碗，光吃牛肉吃了五分钟。

speaker: A
sentence: Ha! I will. Do you have room for something sweet?
zh: 哈！我会转告，还有地方吃点甜的吗？

speaker: B
sentence: What do you have?

speaker: A
sentence: Cold sweet rice in a small cup, and a fruit plate with what is in season.
zh: 有小杯的甜米糊，还有一个当季水果拼盘。

speaker: B
sentence: My friend says sweet rice. She always goes for the sweet things.
zh: 我朋友说要甜米糊，她一向爱吃甜的。

speaker: A
sentence: Two cups?

speaker: B
sentence: Two cups. We said no dessert but here we are.
zh: 两杯，我们说好不吃甜品的，还是点了。

speaker: A
sentence: Ha. That is often how it goes.

speaker: B
sentence: Here are the sweet rice cups — cold and very sweet.

speaker: A
sentence: Glad you like it.

speaker: B
sentence: This has been a very good meal. Better than the last three places I brought her.
zh: 这顿饭吃得太满意了，比上次带她去的三家都好。

speaker: A
sentence: You are very kind. Would you like to see the paper now?
zh: 您太客气了，现在要看单子吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, when you are ready.
zh: 好，您准备好了就拿过来吧。

speaker: A
sentence: One moment.

speaker: B
sentence: The street lights look nice from here. My friend kept looking out all evening.
zh: 从这里看街灯很好看，我朋友一晚上一直往外看。

speaker: A
sentence: The window table is always the first to go. Good that you booked it.
zh: 靠窗的桌子总是最先订出去的，幸好你提前定了。

speaker: B
sentence: I almost forgot to book. Lucky I remembered this morning.
zh: 我差点忘记订，幸好早上想起来了。

speaker: A
sentence: Here is your paper. Two hundred and eight in all.
zh: 单子来了，一共二百零八。

speaker: B
sentence: Two hundred and eight? I thought it would be more.
zh: 二百零八？我以为要更多的。

speaker: A
sentence: The cold plate is on special today — thirty off. It worked in your favour.
zh: 今天凉菜特价，减了三十块，帮您省了点。

speaker: B
sentence: That is a nice surprise. Here is two fifty — keep the change.
zh: 意外之喜，给你二百五，零头不用找了。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you very much. Do you need a receipt?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes please — for the record.

speaker: A
sentence: One moment. Here is your receipt.

speaker: B
sentence: Thank you. My friend wants to come back next week.
zh: 谢谢，我朋友说下周还要来。

speaker: A
sentence: Please do. We are open every day.

speaker: B
sentence: Can you keep the window table for us? Same name.
zh: 能帮我们留住这个靠窗的桌子吗？同一个名字。

speaker: A
sentence: I will put it down now. What day?

speaker: B
sentence: Friday again. Seven thirty.

speaker: A
sentence: Window table, Friday, seven thirty. I have it.
zh: 靠窗桌，周五，七点半，记下了。

speaker: B
sentence: And please tell the cook — the beef was the best thing we have had in a long time.
zh: 还有请帮我转告厨师——牛肉是我们好久没吃到这么好的了。

speaker: A
sentence: I will tell him tonight. He will be very pleased.
zh: 我今晚就告诉他，他会很高兴的。

speaker: B
sentence: And no cilantro next Friday. My friend will remember if you forget.
zh: 下周五也别放香菜，我朋友记性好，你要是忘了她会说的。

speaker: A
sentence: Ha! I have it in the notes already. No cilantro.
zh: 哈！我备注里已经写了，不放香菜。

speaker: B
sentence: Perfect. Thank you for tonight.
zh: 太好了，感谢今晚的服务。

speaker: A
sentence: It was our pleasure. Have a good evening.
zh: 我们也很高兴招待您，晚上好。

speaker: B
sentence: Good night. See you Friday.

speaker: A
sentence: I am not well tonight.

speaker: B
sentence: What is wrong?

speaker: A
sentence: My dog is ill. It is at the animal hospital.
zh: 我的小狗病了，在宠物医院。

speaker: B
sentence: Oh, that is hard news. I am sad.
zh: 哦，这消息真让人难受。我很难过。

speaker: A
sentence: It would not take food or drink. It was ill two times.
zh: 它不吃不喝，还吐了两次。

speaker: B
sentence: You did well to take it to the doctor.
zh: 你做得对，带它去看医生了。

speaker: A
sentence: The doctor said it has to be there for the night.

speaker: B
sentence: I have no doubt they will see to it well.
zh: 我毫不怀疑他们会把它照顾得很好。

speaker: A
sentence: I keep crying. The house is so without things.
zh: 我一直在哭，房子空荡荡的。

speaker: B
sentence: I am with you. You are not on your own.
zh: 我陪着你呢。你不是一个人。

speaker: A
sentence: I keep smelling its cover. It makes me more sad.
zh: 我一直闻着它的毯子，反而更难过。

speaker: B
sentence: That is a hard thing. But you did all you could.
zh: 那确实难受。但你已经尽力了。

speaker: A
sentence: I keep thinking it is in pain. That is the worst part.
zh: 我总想着它在疼，这是最难受的。

speaker: B
sentence: The medical men will give it something for the pain.

speaker: A
sentence: I hope so. I do not like it to be in pain.

speaker: B
sentence: Would you like me to come over?

speaker: A
sentence: No, but thank you for asking.

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good idea. I will come with you tomorrow.

speaker: A
sentence: That would be good. I would not go on my own.
zh: 那挺好的。我不想一个人去。

speaker: B
sentence: Then that is fixed. Now, make a cup of tea for you.
zh: 那就说定了。现在，给自己泡杯茶吧。

speaker: A
sentence: I will. I have some tea with a flower smell.
zh: 好的。我有带花香味的茶。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. While the water gets warm, put on a light picture.
zh: 好。烧水的时候，放一部轻松的电影。

speaker: A
sentence: I would not like to see a picture.

speaker: B
sentence: Then have your tea. I am here.

speaker: A
sentence: You are kind. Your voice gives me a bit of comfort.
zh: 你真好。你的声音让我舒服了一点。

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. You are not on your own now.
zh: 那很好。你现在不是一个人了。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. I am not so shut in.

speaker: B
sentence: That is the way. You are strong.

speaker: A
sentence: I am not strong. But I am a little better.

speaker: B
sentence: One step at a time. How is the tea?

speaker: A
sentence: It is warm and soft. The room seems less hollow.
zh: 温温的，很柔和。让房间没那么空荡荡了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. A warm drink does that. Do you have a cover?
zh: 好。热饮就有这个效果。你有毯子吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. The small dog cover is here. I keep it near.
zh: 有。小狗的毯子在这儿。我放在身边。

speaker: B
sentence: It will be happy to look at you tomorrow.
zh: 它明天看到你会很高兴的。

speaker: A
sentence: I will take the warm cover with me.

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good idea. It will have your smell.
zh: 好主意。毯子上有你的味道。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. I hope it will be happy here.

speaker: B
sentence: Dogs get comfort from what is dear to them.
zh: 狗从熟悉的东西中得到安慰。

speaker: A
sentence: You are right. I will put it in my bag now.
zh: 你说得对。我现在就把它放进包里。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. And get some rest after that. Tomorrow is a new day.
zh: 好。之后好好休息。明天是新的一天。

speaker: A
sentence: I will do that. Thank you for your kind words.
zh: 我会的。谢谢你这么暖心的话。

speaker: B
sentence: No need for thanks. That is what friends are for.
zh: 不用谢。朋友就是干这个的。

speaker: A
sentence: I am still a bit sad, but not so much now.
zh: 我还是有点难过，但没刚才那么厉害了。

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. Let the sad feeling go bit by bit.
zh: 那就好。让难过一点点散掉。

speaker: A
sentence: I will make a cup of tea and see a light picture.
zh: 我打算泡杯茶，看部轻松的电影。

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good idea. A laugh will do you good.
zh: 好主意。笑一笑对你有好处。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I have a short play in mind.
zh: 嗯，我想到一部短的搞笑戏。

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. Have a laugh, then get a good rest.
zh: 很好。笑一笑，然后好好休息。

speaker: A
sentence: I will do that. You have been a great help.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. Give me a ring if you need a talk.
zh: 好的。想聊了就给我打电话。

speaker: A
sentence: I will put on the kettle now.

speaker: B
sentence: Do you have a good short play to see?
zh: 你有没有好看的短剧推荐？

speaker: A
sentence: It is about a man and his dog. Quite a laugh.
zh: 这是关于一个男人和他的狗。挺逗的。

speaker: B
sentence: That sounds right for me. I will get that one.
zh: 听起来很适合我。我就看那个。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. Keep your mind off things for a time.

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. I will put my box away and only see the play.
zh: 嗯。我把手机放一边，专心看剧。

speaker: A
sentence: That is the way. Let the story take you away.
zh: 这就对了。让故事带你走。

speaker: B
sentence: I hope the dog in the play gets better too.
zh: 希望剧里的狗也能好起来。

speaker: A
sentence: I have no doubt. It is a happy play.
zh: 我毫不怀疑。那是部开心的剧。

speaker: B
sentence: That was a good talk. I am better now.
zh: 谢谢你陪我聊。我现在好多了。

speaker: A
sentence: It was wise to get you on the line.

speaker: B
sentence: I am happy you did. How is your throat now?
zh: 还好你打了。现在嗓子怎么样？

speaker: A
sentence: Better. The tea helped a bit.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Would you like to talk more about the dog?
zh: 那就好。你还想聊聊小狗的事吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Not now. I will watch the play.

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good idea. Let your mind rest.

speaker: A
sentence: Will you be up late? I may send a word after.
zh: 你会熬夜吗？我晚点可能发个消息。

speaker: B
sentence: No, I will go to bed early. But you can send a word in the morning.
zh: 不，我会早睡。但你早上可以发个消息。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I will say how the dog is.
zh: 好。我会告诉你小狗的情况。

speaker: B
sentence: Thank you. You are a good friend.

speaker: A
sentence: That is a good time to get my word.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. What are friends for?
zh: 当然啦。朋友是做什么的？

speaker: A
sentence: The house is so quiet without him.

speaker: B

speaker: A

sentence: I will say it out.

sentence: Good, we have the answer.

speaker: A

speaker: B
sentence: I will make a note of that.

speaker: A
sentence: Then we are done. Back to work.

sentence: This looks like a word list.

speaker: B

sentence: Right. Let me make a note.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now we have the answer.

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. That was quick work.

sentence: Let us get back to work.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I have a clear head now.

speaker: A
sentence: I will go on with my writing.

sentence: Let me put in the word.

speaker: A
sentence: That is a long list of pages.

speaker: B
sentence: The third one seems good.

sentence: I will open it. One minute.

sentence: Too many hard words again.

sentence: What about putting a 'sense'?

sentence: Yes. That will make it clear.

sentence: Right, the second one is short.

sentence: I will give it a look.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now we have it.

sentence: Any time. Happy to give a hand.

speaker: A
sentence: Right, let us put in the word.

sentence: A list from a book of words.

speaker: B
sentence: That seems good. Let us see.

speaker: A
sentence: Too much hard talk. Not clear.

speaker: B
sentence: Put 'sense' after it and have another look.

speaker: A
sentence: This one is short and simple.

sentence: Say it out for me.

sentence: It says: 'a thing that makes a change'.

speaker: A
sentence: Right, got it. That is clear now.

speaker: B
sentence: Put it down so you keep it in mind.

speaker: A
sentence: I will put it on a note.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Then we can go on with the work.

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, that word was stopping me.

sentence: Wise. A note is a good friend.

sentence: Let us get a drink after work.

sentence: I will send you a word when I am done.

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. I will be here.

sentence: Morning! You are early today.

speaker: B
sentence: Morning. Friends are coming for dinner tonight — need to be home before twelve.

sentence: Let me guess — the fridge at home is empty again.

sentence: That bad?

sentence: You come in every Saturday with that same face.

sentence: I made a list this time. Milk, bread, eggs, salt...

sentence: You forgot the fruit.

speaker: B
sentence: I was getting to that.

sentence: The milk came in fresh this morning — back shelf.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. I will take two.

sentence: Two? You opening a tea house?

sentence: I want to make a thick white soup with the mushrooms.

sentence: I will swing by there. Thank you.

sentence: Fresh today. I pressed it this morning — still gives.

speaker: B
sentence: One bag, then.

speaker: A
sentence: The strawberry came in this morning too. Want a look?

speaker: B
sentence: strawberry? That was not on my list.

speaker: A
sentence: New season. Very sweet this time.

speaker: B
sentence: How much for a box?

speaker: B
sentence: I will take one. My friend loves these.

sentence: Now for eggs. I keep the good ones in the front row.

sentence: I need ten. Let me check each one.

speaker: B
sentence: You check every morning?

sentence: Someone has to.

speaker: B
sentence: These look good. All ten.

speaker: A
sentence: And eggs are on offer today — twenty off.

speaker: B
sentence: Really? I came on the right day.

sentence: Salt next. Third way, middle shelf.

sentence: Right, salt.

sentence: Same way. It is right next to the salt.

sentence: Saves me a trip. Good.

sentence: Got both.

sentence: Quick. You knew where to go.

sentence: You told me once. I kept it.

sentence: The round plants — did you get them?

sentence: Oh.

sentence: Third way, cold part on the left.

speaker: B
sentence: Back in a second.

speaker: B
sentence: These look good — firm and dry.

sentence: Good ones for soup. Not soft, not wet.

speaker: B
sentence: Am I missing anything else?

sentence: Let us see — milk, bread, red fruit, eggs, salt, dark sauce, round plants.

sentence: That is everything. Wait — green onions. For the soup.

sentence: Over there. Two groups should be enough.

speaker: B
sentence: These smell very fresh.

sentence: The delivery just came. Shall we go to the counter?

sentence: Yes. I think I have everything now.

sentence: Milk — two boxes.

speaker: B
sentence: Right.

sentence: Bread — one bag. strawberry — one box.

sentence: Eggs — ten. Salt, dark sauce — check.

sentence: Round plants — one bag. green onions — two.

sentence: With the egg offer... thirty two fifty all together.

speaker: B
sentence: That cost less than I thought.

speaker: A
sentence: The eggs bring it down. Good day to come in.

speaker: B
sentence: I will pay with my phone.

speaker: A
sentence: The machine is on the right.

sentence: Done.

sentence: All paid. Now let us put things in the bag.

sentence: Eggs on top — they go to bits so quick.

sentence: Sorry. Of course you do.

sentence: Milk goes in the corner — keeps it from rolling.

sentence: Smart.

sentence: Bread on the side. Do not press it.

sentence: Here. Nice and heavy.

speaker: B
sentence: Thank you. This will make a good meal.

sentence: Wait —

sentence: You do not need to do that.

sentence: Then I will not say no. Thank you.

sentence: How many friends are coming tonight?

sentence: Three. Should be enough food.

sentence: I hope so. The soup is the hard part.

sentence: Low heat. Put the green onions in at the very end.

speaker: B
sentence: I will keep that in mind.

sentence: okay next week.

sentence: Same time?

sentence: Maybe a bit later. I am not always this well ready.

sentence: You will come in looking lost again.

sentence: Very likely. Thank you for everything today.

speaker: A
sentence: You found the round plants yourself this time.

sentence: Barely.

sentence: One step at a time.

speaker: B
sentence: The soup will be good.

sentence: Tell your friends they are welcome here.

sentence: I will. They need food too.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. Next Saturday then.

speaker: B
sentence: Goodbye.

sentence: Enjoy the meal.

sentence: My phone is almost dead. Twenty parts in a hundred.

sentence: Already? You only charged it this morning.

sentence: I know. The old ones go fast.

speaker: B
sentence: Find your wire before it dies.

speaker: A
sentence: I am looking. It is always somewhere behind the seat.

speaker: B
sentence: Did you check under the side thing?

sentence: Found it. Behind the soft part, as always.

speaker: B
sentence: Some things never change.

sentence: The charging sign is on. Good.

sentence: Now we can talk. I was waiting for those pictures.

sentence: Right, the pictures. Let me open the picture book.

speaker: B
sentence: How many did you take today?

sentence: A lot. Mostly the evening sky and a small cat.

sentence: A cat? Where?

sentence: On the road near the restaurant. It was sitting on a box.

speaker: B
sentence: Send me that one first.

speaker: A
sentence: Sending now. It is a good one.

speaker: B
sentence: Oh! It is so small and round.

sentence: It came right up to me. No fear at all.

speaker: B
sentence: Can I use this as my screen picture?

sentence: Of course. Now the sky picture.

speaker: B
sentence: Oh, the color. What time was this?

speaker: A
sentence: Just before the light went. About six.

speaker: B
sentence: You caught it at the right moment.

sentence: I almost missed it. I was in the restaurant and saw the color through the door.

speaker: B
sentence: Worth going outside for.

speaker: A
sentence: My food went cold.

speaker: B
sentence: A small price.

speaker: A
sentence: My phone is at fifteen now. Going down fast.

speaker: B
sentence: Is it plugged in?

sentence: Yes, but the wire is short and I have to sit by the wall.

speaker: B
sentence: You need a longer wire.

speaker: A
sentence: I keep saying that.

speaker: B
sentence: Say it to the shop.

speaker: A
sentence: Ha. True. Now, I want to change my bell sound.

speaker: B
sentence: The one you have now is very loud.

speaker: B

sentence: This one sounds like morning birds.

speaker: B
sentence: Not bad. Try the next.

sentence: Oh, that one is too happy. Like a game.

speaker: B
sentence: The bird one was better.

sentence: Agreed. I will go back to the bird one.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now I can call you and not feel bad for the room.

speaker: B

speaker: A

speaker: B
sentence: Get one tomorrow at the corner shop.

speaker: A
sentence: Are you going out tomorrow?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, I thought we could meet at the open space near the trees.
zh: 是的，我想我们可以在树边的空地碰面。

speaker: A
sentence: The green place by the road?

speaker: B
sentence: That one. Bring your picture machine.

speaker: A
sentence: For the cat?

speaker: B
sentence: For everything. I want to try that water glass trick you showed me.
zh: 拍什么都行，我想试试你给我看的那个水杯技巧。

speaker: A
sentence: The one where you put the glass in front of the sun?
zh: 就是把水杯放在太阳前面那个？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. I tried it alone and it looked wrong.
zh: 对，我自己试过，拍出来不对。

speaker: A
sentence: You have to hold the glass very still and get low.
zh: 你要把杯子拿得很稳，还要蹲低一点。

speaker: B
sentence: Get low?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. Get on one knee. The picture comes out much better.
zh: 对，单腿跪下，拍出来好看很多。

speaker: B
sentence: That is going to look strange in public.
zh: 在外面这么做会很奇怪吧。

speaker: A
sentence: People who take pictures always look strange.
zh: 拍照的人看起来都奇奇怪怪的。

speaker: B
sentence: Fair point.

speaker: A
sentence: I will show you the right way tomorrow. It is easier in person.
zh: 我明天当面教你，当面教容易多了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. What time?

speaker: A
sentence: Morning is best. Before the sun gets high.
zh: 早上最好，在太阳变高之前。

speaker: B
sentence: Eight? Nine?

speaker: A
sentence: Nine is fine. I need time for food first.
zh: 九点可以，我要先吃个东西。

speaker: B
sentence: Nine at the green place. Done.

speaker: A
sentence: I will put it in my phone now so I do not forget.
zh: 我现在就存进手机，免得忘了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good idea. Your phone is at what now?
zh: 好主意，你手机到多少了？

speaker: A
sentence: Twenty-eight. Still going slow.

speaker: B
sentence: You should sleep soon anyway.

speaker: A
sentence: I know. I just want to check my messages first.

speaker: B
sentence: Anyone interesting?

speaker: A
sentence: My sister sent a picture of her new place.
zh: 我姐姐发来一张她新家的照片。

speaker: B
sentence: Nice?

speaker: A
sentence: Very. Big windows and a lot of light.
zh: 很好看，大窗户，光线很好。

speaker: B
sentence: Where did she move to?

speaker: A
sentence: Near the station. The trip to work is much shorter now.
zh: 在车站附近，她说上班路程短多了。

speaker: B
sentence: That is the best thing about a new place.
zh: 这是搬新家最好的事情之一。

speaker: A
sentence: She sounded happy in her message.
zh: 她消息里听起来很开心。

speaker: B
sentence: Did you write back?

speaker: A
sentence: Not yet. I will do it now.

speaker: B
sentence: I will wait.

speaker: A
sentence: Done. Told her the new place looks great.
zh: 发完了，跟她说新家看起来很棒。

speaker: B
sentence: Now put down the phone.

speaker: A
sentence: One more thing.

speaker: B
sentence: There is always one more thing with you.

speaker: A
sentence: I need to set my morning sound.
zh: 我要设置早上的闹钟声音。

speaker: B
sentence: What do you use now?

speaker: A
sentence: A very loud bell. It hits me like a wall.
zh: 一个很响的铃声，像撞墙一样。

speaker: B
sentence: That is why you are always in a bad way in the morning.
zh: 难怪你早上总是状态不好。

speaker: A
sentence: Ha. Maybe the bird sound for mornings too.
zh: 哈，也许早上也换成鸟叫声。

speaker: B
sentence: Much better idea.

speaker: A
sentence: Set. Now I can sleep.

speaker: B
sentence: Phone at thirty now?

speaker: A
sentence: Thirty. Close enough for tonight.

speaker: B
sentence: Leave it on the wire. It will charge while you sleep.
zh: 就挂在充电线上，睡觉的时候自己充。

speaker: A
sentence: Good idea. I always forget to do that.
zh: 好主意，我总忘了这么做。

speaker: B
sentence: Go. I will okay at nine tomorrow.

speaker: A
sentence: Nine. And bring something warm to drink.

speaker: B
sentence: I will. Goodnight.

speaker: A
sentence: Goodnight. And thanks for waiting for the pictures.
zh: 晚安，谢谢你等着看我的照片。

speaker: B
sentence: The cat made it worth the wait.
zh: 那只猫让等待变得值得了。

speaker: A
sentence: I thought you would say that.

speaker: B
sentence: Sleep well.

speaker: A
sentence: Good to okay, friend. Come in.
zh: 见到你真高兴，朋友。快进来。

speaker: B
sentence: You too. Here, some fruit for you.
zh: 我也是。给你带了点水果。

speaker: A
sentence: Oh, you need not have. Thanks.
zh: 哎呀，不用这么客气。谢谢。

speaker: B
sentence: Your place looks different. New seat?
zh: 你家看起来不一样了。新座位？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, got it last month. Take a seat.

speaker: B
sentence: I will. Tea would be good.

speaker: A
sentence: Here you are. How have you been?

speaker: B
sentence: Not bad. Work is the same old.

speaker: A
sentence: You look thin. Are you keeping well?
zh: 你看起来瘦了。身体还好吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, I'm off to do my training now. It is good.
zh: 嗯，我现在去锻炼。感觉挺好的。

speaker: A
sentence: That is good. I have not been doing much.
zh: 那就好。我最近没怎么动。

speaker: B
sentence: You come with me one day. It is a good thing.
zh: 你改天跟我一起去。那感觉真好。

speaker: A
sentence: I would like that. I need a change.

speaker: B
sentence: How is your family? All well?
zh: 家里都好吗？大家都好吧？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, all good. My sister got new work last week.
zh: 都挺好的。我姐上周换了新工作。

speaker: B
sentence: That is good news. What sort of work?

speaker: A
sentence: She works in a book store. She is happy there.
zh: 她在书店工作。她在那儿挺开心的。

speaker: B
sentence: Books are a good thing. I need to do more of that.
zh: 书是好东西。我得多做点这个。

speaker: A
sentence: You have time now. Come with me to the sea one day.
zh: 你现在有时间。改天跟我去海边吧。

speaker: B
sentence: The sea? I have not been for a long time.

speaker: A
sentence: It is quiet there. Good for the head.

speaker: B
sentence: I would like that. When are you free?
zh: 那好啊。你什么时候有空？

speaker: A
sentence: I am free on day seven. And you?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, that is good. Let us make a decision.
zh: 行，没问题。咱们定下来吧。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. I will send you a note about the time.
zh: 好。我到时候发消息告诉你时间。

speaker: B
sentence: I will look for it. Do you have a place in mind?
zh: 我会留意的。你有想好的地方吗？

speaker: A
sentence: There is a small town by the sea. I went there last year.
zh: 海边有个小镇。我去年去过。

speaker: B
sentence: Is it far? I would not be on the road all day.
zh: 离这儿远吗？我可不想一整天都在路上。

speaker: A
sentence: Not far. Two hours by rail. We can go and come back in one day.
zh: 不远。坐火车两小时。我们可以当天来回。

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good idea. I will take my camera.

speaker: A
sentence: I will make some food for the road. Nothing sharp.
zh: 那我做些吃的带上。不辣。

speaker: B
sentence: You are a good cook. I still have in mind the cold plate from last time.
zh: 你厨艺不错。我还记得上次的冷盘。

speaker: A
sentence: That was simple. I will do something new this time.
zh: 那次很简单。这次我弄点新的。

speaker: B
sentence: I am looking forward to it. Let us get some drink too?
zh: 我很期待。要不要也带点喝的？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, some tea and water will be enough. Keep it simple.
zh: 好，带点茶和水就行。简单点。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. Simple is best. What is the new thing you have in mind?
zh: 对，简单最好。你打算弄什么新花样？

speaker: A
sentence: I was thinking of a warm plate with eggs and greens. Soft and good.
zh: 我在想做个热盘，有鸡蛋和青菜。清淡好吃。

speaker: B
sentence: That sounds good. I will take some bread to go with it.
zh: 听起来不错。我带些面包来配。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. Then we have a full meal. I am happy you are coming.
zh: 好，那我们就凑齐一顿了。你能来我很高兴。

speaker: B
sentence: I am happy too. It has been a long time after we did something like this.
zh: 我也很高兴。我们好久没这样一起玩了。

speaker: A
sentence: So, what have you been up to these days?

speaker: B
sentence: Not much. Work is the same. But I started running in the morning.
zh: 没什么。工作还是老样子。不过我早上开始跑步了。

speaker: A
sentence: Running? That is new. How do you keep it up?
zh: 跑步？这可新鲜。你怎么坚持下来的？

speaker: B
sentence: I go slow. Only twenty minutes. It makes me happy.
zh: 我跑得慢。就二十分钟。跑完挺开心的。

speaker: A
sentence: I might give it a go. I need to move more.
zh: 我也许试试。我得多动动。

speaker: B
sentence: You can come with me one morning. We will go together.
zh: 你哪天早上可以跟我一起。咱们一块儿去。

speaker: A
sentence: That would be great. But I am not an early bird.
zh: 那太好了。不过我不是早起的人。

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. We start at eight. Not too early.
zh: 没问题。咱们八点开始。不算太早。

speaker: A
sentence: That is right. I will give it a go. What about your free days?
zh: 那行。我试试。你假期有什么计划？

speaker: B
sentence: I would like to go to the high land when the trees are red.
zh: 我想秋天去山里看红叶。

speaker: A
sentence: The high land is a good idea. I have been there before.
zh: 山里是个好主意。我以前去过。

speaker: B
sentence: Oh, you have? Which part did you see?

speaker: A
sentence: The water side. Red trees like fire. Very good.

speaker: B
sentence: That is what I am after. We could go together if you like.
zh: 那就是我想看的。你要是愿意，咱们可以一起去。

speaker: A
sentence: I would like that. Let me see my free days first.
zh: 那敢情好。我先看看我哪天有空。

speaker: B
sentence: Take your time. The trees will be red in two months.
zh: 不急。树叶还要两个月才红。

speaker: A
sentence: True. By the way, how is your new thing going? The one you said you were learning.
zh: 也是。对了，你那个新东西学得怎么样了？就是你说在学的那个。

speaker: B
sentence: It is going well. I am getting used to it now.
zh: 挺顺利的。我现在慢慢适应了。

speaker: A
sentence: Good for you. I might give it a go as well. It sounds interesting.
zh: 不错啊。我也许也试试。听起来挺有意思的。

speaker: B
sentence: You will like it. I will send you the first bit.
zh: 你会喜欢的。我把入门部分发给你。

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks. It is not hard to start. Just a bit of time every day.
zh: 谢了。入门不难，每天花点时间就行。

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. I have some free time after dark now.
zh: 那挺好。我现在天黑后有点空闲。

speaker: A
sentence: Night is best for me too. Quiet and no one to trouble you.
zh: 晚上对我也最合适。安静，没人打扰。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. So what is the first step? Do I need any special things?
zh: 对。那第一步是什么？需要什么特别的东西吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Just a box or a machine. I will send you a list of what you need.
zh: 就手机或电脑就行。我把需要的东西清单发给你。

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. I have them. Send it when you are in the house.
zh: 太好了。我都有。你进屋就发过来吧。

speaker: A
sentence: Will do. It is a good way to keep the mind sharp.
zh: 没问题。这是个让脑子保持灵活的好办法。

speaker: B
sentence: I could do with that. My brain is slow some days.
zh: 我正需要这个。有时候觉得脑子转得慢。

speaker: A
sentence: You will get used to it. The first week is the hardest.
zh: 你会习惯的。第一周最难。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I am ready for a new little test.
zh: 好的。我准备好迎接新的小挑战了。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. So how was your week?
zh: 好。那你这一周过得怎么样？

speaker: B
sentence: Not bad. Full but good. A strange thing came to me.
zh: 还行。忙但挺好。有件奇怪的事。

speaker: A
sentence: Oh? Say more. I like strange things.

speaker: B
sentence: I saw a man on the street who looked just like my old school man.
zh: 我在街上看见一个人，长得跟我以前的老师一模一样。

speaker: A
sentence: Did you say hello?

speaker: B
sentence: No. He was gone before I made up my mind.
zh: 没有。我还没拿定主意，他就走了。

speaker: A
sentence: That is a shame. It might have been him.

speaker: B
sentence: Quite. But it made me smile. I was thinking of school days.
zh: 确实。不过让我笑了。我想起了上学的时候。

speaker: A
sentence: School days. Long time back. Do you still see old friends?
zh: 上学的时候。好久以前了。你还见老同学吗？

speaker: B
sentence: A small number. We see one another one time a year. It is good to keep in touch.
zh: 有几个。我们一年见一次。保持联系挺好的。

speaker: A
sentence: I keep in touch with a small group from my school days.
zh: 我跟几个老同学还保持联系。

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. Do you see one another much?
zh: 那挺好的。你们常见面吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Not as much as I would like. Work gets in the way.
zh: 没我想的那么频繁。工作太忙了。

speaker: B
sentence: I see that. Time goes so quick now.
zh: 我懂。现在时间过得太快了。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. But I will go to the mountains this fall.
zh: 是啊。不过我今年秋天要去山里。

speaker: B
sentence: Oh, that sounds good. I would like to come with you.
zh: 哦，听起来不错。我想跟你一起去。

speaker: A
sentence: Would you? That would be great. We could see the red things on the trees.
zh: 真的吗？那太好了。我们可以看树上的红叶。

speaker: B
sentence: I am in. What day? I will make time.
zh: 算我一个。哪天？我会腾出时间。

speaker: A
sentence: I will. It will be a good rest from the town.
zh: 一定。会是个远离城镇的好休息。

speaker: B
sentence: I am looking forward to it. Another cup of tea?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, please. This tea is good.

speaker: B
sentence: I got it from a small store near the station.
zh: 我从车站附近的小店买的。

speaker: A
sentence: I will have to get some for me.

speaker: B
sentence: I will give you the name before you go.
zh: 你走之前我把名字告诉你。

speaker: A
sentence: By the way, do you still play that music thing?
zh: 对了，你现在还弹那个音乐玩意儿吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Not much. But I started again last week.
zh: 不常弹了。但上周我又开始练了。

speaker: A
sentence: That is great. We could have a music night one day.
zh: 那太好了。改天我们可以搞个音乐之夜。

speaker: B
sentence: That would be good. I have a new song to play.
zh: 那敢情好。我有一首新曲子要弹。

speaker: A
sentence: I would like to get that. What about the day after day five?
zh: 我想听听。第五天之后的那天怎么样？

speaker: B
sentence: Let me see my week. Yes, the last day is free.
zh: 让我看看这周安排。嗯，周六有空。

speaker: A
sentence: Is the same time good? Four?

speaker: B
sentence: That is all right. I will get my music thing.

speaker: A
sentence: And I will make some warm plates for us.

speaker: B
sentence: You are too kind. I will take a bottle of red.
zh: 你太客气了。我带瓶红酒来。

speaker: A
sentence: Great. I have to go now. Thanks for the tea.
zh: 太好了。我得走了。谢谢你的茶。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. okay on day seven then.

speaker: A
sentence: okay. be safe.

speaker: B
sentence: Right, I will be off now. Thanks for the music.
zh: 好了，我该走了。谢谢你的音乐。

speaker: A
sentence: My pleasure. I will send you that list of songs.
zh: 别客气。我把那几首歌的名单发给你。

speaker: B
sentence: Great. Let's do this again. Goodbye.
zh: 太好了。我们很快再聚。再见。

speaker: A
sentence: I will have a look at the news.

speaker: B
sentence: Right, do that before sleep.

speaker: A
sentence: That cat picture is quite good.

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, I saw it. A little thing, quite pleasing.
zh: 嗯，我看到了。小东西挺逗的。

speaker: A
sentence: I would like to put up a picture.

speaker: B
sentence: From your walk today?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, the field of flowers.

speaker: B
sentence: I will get it from the store.

speaker: A
sentence: The light is soft and good.

speaker: B
sentence: Put it up then. I will keep an eye.

speaker: A
sentence: Right, it is up now.

speaker: B
sentence: I see it. The colors are soft.

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, the sun was not too bright.

speaker: B
sentence: A good place for a quiet day.
zh: 是个适合安静待着的好地方。

speaker: A
sentence: I will go to sleep now. rest up.

speaker: B
sentence: Where are we?

speaker: A
sentence: A secret place outside the town.

speaker: B
sentence: Take me there another time.

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I will. You will like it.

speaker: B
sentence: Is it far from here?

speaker: A
sentence: Not far, an hour by rail.

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. I am free on day seven.
zh: 那挺好的。我第七天有空。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. We will go then.

speaker: B
sentence: I am tired now. rest up.

speaker: A
sentence: You too. rest up.

speaker: B
sentence: I will send you the place name.

speaker: A
sentence: Right, do that. I will put it in my notes.

speaker: B
sentence: It is a field with flowers, like a picture.
zh: 那是一片花田，像画一样。

speaker: A
sentence: Sounds soft. I would like to see it.
zh: 听起来很美。我想去看看。

speaker: B
sentence: We can take food and make a day of it.
zh: 我们可以带吃的，玩一整天。

speaker: A
sentence: Good idea. I will make some bread with meat.
zh: 好主意。我做些夹肉面包。

speaker: B
sentence: And I will get a bottle of drink.

speaker: A
sentence: Right. What time will we go?

speaker: B
sentence: How about ten in the morning?

speaker: A
sentence: That is good. I will be ready.

speaker: B
sentence: Great. I will send you the place on the net.
zh: 太好了。我把地点发给你。

speaker: A
sentence: Do that. I will keep an eye on my box.
zh: 发吧。我会盯着我的盒子看。

speaker: B
sentence: I have sent it now. Have a look.
zh: 我已经发过去了。你看看。

speaker: A
sentence: I see it. It is not far from my house.

speaker: B
sentence: No, it is a short walk. We will have a good time.
zh: 不远，走几步就到。我们会玩得很开心。

speaker: A
sentence: I will put a picture on the net.

speaker: B
sentence: What picture?

speaker: A
sentence: The field of flowers from today.

speaker: B
sentence: Oh, that was a good place.

speaker: A
sentence: I will put a note with it.

speaker: B
sentence: What will you say?

speaker: A
sentence: Something like 'a happy day'.
zh: 类似“快乐的一天”之类的。

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good note.

speaker: A
sentence: I have sent it. Look now.

speaker: B
sentence: I see it. It got a like from me.

speaker: A
sentence: Oh, you said something.

speaker: B
sentence: Where is this place?

speaker: A
sentence: A secret place. I will take you.

speaker: B
sentence: Well, is it far from here?

speaker: A
sentence: Not far. An hour by rail.

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. This end of the week?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, if the weather is good.

speaker: B
sentence: I will keep that day free.

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I will send you the time.

speaker: B
sentence: I am looking forward to it.

speaker: A
sentence: Is it a good idea to take a camera?

speaker: B
sentence: Good idea. The light will be soft.

speaker: A
sentence: I will get my old one.

speaker: B
sentence: Do you have food for the day?

speaker: A
sentence: I will make some bread with meat.

speaker: B
sentence: And a bottle of water.

speaker: A
sentence: That is enough. Simple is best.

speaker: B
sentence: I will take a cloth to rest on.

speaker: A
sentence: You see to everything.

speaker: B
sentence: We will have a good time.

speaker: A
sentence: Well, i will put a picture on the net.

speaker: B
sentence: Well, what picture?

speaker: A
sentence: The field of flowers I saw today.
zh: 我今天看到的那片花海。

speaker: B
sentence: That sounds good. Let me see.

speaker: A
sentence: Here it is. What is your idea?

speaker: B
sentence: Very good! Where is that place?

speaker: A
sentence: A secret place. I will take you one day.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I will come with you.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. I am tired now. I will go to sleep.

speaker: B
sentence: Same here. rest up.

speaker: A
sentence: I will send you the place after a bit.
zh: 我过一会儿把地址发你。

speaker: B
sentence: Do not keep it secret too long.

speaker: A
sentence: That is a word. Now I am going to rest.
