speaker: B
sentence: So that is why we did it. Happy day.
zh: 所以我们才这么干。快乐的日子。

speaker: A
sentence: I still do not get how you did it.
zh: 我还是没搞懂你们怎么做到的。

speaker: B
sentence: We kept a secret for weeks.

speaker: A
sentence: Did you get all these things in one go?
zh: 这些东西是一次性搞来的吗？

speaker: B
sentence: No, bit by bit, so no one would see.
zh: 不是，一点点弄的，免得被人发现。

speaker: A
sentence: And the cake? Who made that?

speaker: B
sentence: My sister. She is good at cakes.
zh: 我妹妹。她做蛋糕很在行。

speaker: A
sentence: She kept quiet too? That is hard.
zh: 她也守口如瓶？真不容易。

speaker: B
sentence: We all did that. It was the work of all of us.
zh: 我们都这样做了。这是我们所有人的工作。

speaker: A
sentence: I am touched. You went to such trouble.
zh: 我很感动。你们费了这么大劲。

speaker: B
sentence: You are good. Now let us be happy.
zh: 你很好。现在咱们开心吧。

speaker: A
sentence: I still can't get over it. How did you keep it secret?
zh: 我还是缓不过来。你们怎么瞒住的？

speaker: B
sentence: We had a secret group and only talked when you were not about.
zh: 我们建了个秘密群，只在你不在的时候聊。

speaker: A
sentence: And no one let slip? Not even a word?
zh: 没人说漏嘴？一个字都没漏？

speaker: B
sentence: Not a word. We were all very safe.
zh: 一个字都没有。我们都很小心。

speaker: A
sentence: I am surprised. You are all such good friends.
zh: 我真服了。你们都是这么好的朋友。

speaker: B
sentence: That is what friends do. Now come and see your presents.
zh: 朋友就该这样。快来看看你的礼物。

speaker: A
sentence: Oh, there are so many! Which one do I open first?

speaker: B
sentence: Start with the great one. It is from all of us.
zh: 先拆那个大的。那是我们大家送的。

speaker: A
sentence: This is too much. You did not have to do all this.
zh: 这也太隆重了。你们不必这样的。

speaker: B
sentence: We were happy to. Now be quiet and open it!
zh: 我们乐意。别说了，快拆开吧！

speaker: A
sentence: All right, all right. I will open it.

speaker: B
sentence: Go soft on the paper. Do not make holes in it.

speaker: A
sentence: Why? Would you like to keep it?

speaker: B
sentence: I might use it again for another present.
zh: 可能下次包礼物还能用。

speaker: A
sentence: You are a wise one. Here goes... Oh!
zh: 你真会过日子。那我拆了……哦！

speaker: B
sentence: Do you like it? We thought you would.
zh: 喜欢吗？我们猜你会喜欢。

speaker: A
sentence: That is the book I was after! How did you see that?
zh: 这是我一直想要的那本书！你怎么知道的？

speaker: B
sentence: Your sister let it out. She is not as safe as us.
zh: 你姐说漏嘴了。她可没我们这么小心。

speaker: A
sentence: I will have to give her a talking-to after.

speaker: B
sentence: Be kind. She only had a desire to help.
zh: 别这么说，她也是想帮忙。

speaker: A
sentence: I still can't get over it. How did you keep it quiet?
zh: 我还是没缓过来。你们怎么瞒得这么好？

speaker: B
sentence: We had a secret group. You did not look at my box.
zh: 我们建了个秘密群。你从不看我手机。

speaker: A
sentence: That is true. I am not one to look at things of others.
zh: 那倒是。我不是那种看别人东西的人。

speaker: B
sentence: That is why it worked. You are too good a man.
zh: 所以才能成。你人太好了。

speaker: A
sentence: So every time I came, you were not here?
zh: 所以我每次来，你们都不在？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, past the curtain. It was a bit of a laugh.
zh: 对，窗帘那边。还挺好玩的。

speaker: A
sentence: I saw the curtain move one time. I thought it was the wind.
zh: 我确实有次看到窗帘动了一下。还以为是风。

speaker: B
sentence: That was me. I almost gave it away.

speaker: A
sentence: Well, you did well in the end. I am very happy.
zh: 不过最后还是成功了。我很开心。

speaker: B
sentence: That is all. Happy day, friend.
zh: 那就够了。生日快乐，兄弟。

speaker: A
sentence: I will keep this day in mind.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now come, let us have cake.

speaker: A
sentence: Is that a sweet brown one?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, the one you like best. I made it.

speaker: A
sentence: You are a good cook. That is a happy chance.

speaker: B
sentence: Not so good as you say. But it is all right.
zh: 没你说的那么好。不过还行。

speaker: A
sentence: Let us get a plate for every person.
zh: 我们给每人拿个盘子好吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, I will get them from the back.

speaker: A
sentence: I will cut the cake. It is a great one.

speaker: B
sentence: Take your time. We have all day.

speaker: A
sentence: This is a great surprise. I did not see it coming.
zh: 这真是个大大的惊喜。我完全没想到。

speaker: B
sentence: We kept it secret for a week. Did you have any idea?
zh: 我们保密了一周。你一点都没察觉吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Not at all. You are good at keeping secrets.
zh: 完全没有。你们真会保密。

speaker: B
sentence: We kept away when you came near the house.
zh: 你走近房子时我们躲开了。

speaker: A
sentence: That is kind of you.

speaker: B
sentence: You are our friend. It is only right.
zh: 你是我们的朋友。这是应该的。

speaker: A
sentence: This day will keep with me.

speaker: B
sentence: Now let us have some cake and play.
zh: 现在我们来吃蛋糕、玩一玩吧。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, please. I am ready for a good time.
zh: 好的。我准备好开心一场了。

speaker: B
sentence: Happy day, old friend.

speaker: A
sentence: My machine is giving me trouble.

speaker: B
sentence: What is the trouble?

speaker: A
sentence: I have a paper I need this afternoon, but it will not open.
zh: 我有个下午要用的文件，打不开。

speaker: B
sentence: What error do you see?

speaker: A
sentence: A box says 'not able to get to this thing'.
zh: 弹窗说‘无法访问该东西’。

speaker: B
sentence: Is the record on your machine or the net?
zh: 记录在你的机器上还是网络上？

speaker: A
sentence: It is on my machine, in my work box.
zh: 在电脑上，我的工作文件夹里。

speaker: B
sentence: Right, let us start again first.
zh: 好，我们先重新开始一下。

speaker: A
sentence: Will that make it worse?

speaker: B
sentence: No, it is a safe step. It will not damage the paper.
zh: 不会，这是安全步骤，不会损坏文件。

speaker: A
sentence: Right, I will do it. Give me a second.

speaker: B
sentence: Take your time. Say when it is back.

speaker: A
sentence: It is on now. What now?

speaker: B
sentence: Go to your work box and open the paper again.
zh: 去你的工作文件夹，再打开文件。

speaker: A
sentence: Still no. Same error box.

speaker: B
sentence: Right, let us look at the list of running works.
zh: 好，我们看看正在运行的程序列表。

speaker: A
sentence: How do I see that?

speaker: B
sentence: Put your fingers on control, other, and cut keys all at the same time.
zh: 同时按控制、其他和剪切这三个键。

speaker: A
sentence: Done. I see a long list.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. End every work that is not marked 'system'.
zh: 很好。结束所有没有标‘系统’的程序。

speaker: A
sentence: One by one? That will take time.
zh: 一个一个来？那要花时间了。

speaker: B
sentence: Right, but it is safe. I will keep here.
zh: 对，但很安全。我呆在这儿。

speaker: A
sentence: All done. Have a go now?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, give it two quick touches.

speaker: A
sentence: It is asking if I would like to open it safe.
zh: 它问我要不要以安全方式打开。

speaker: B
sentence: Say yes. That is a good sign.

speaker: A
sentence: Done. It is open now. All my words are there.
zh: 好了。打开了。我写的内容都在。

speaker: B
sentence: Great. Now make a copy of it.
zh: 太好了。现在把它复制一份。

speaker: A
sentence: Where do I put the copy?

speaker: B
sentence: A different place, like your table top.

speaker: A
sentence: Right, I have done that. What now?

speaker: B
sentence: Let the machine have a quick look for errors.
zh: 让机器快速查看一下错误。

speaker: A
sentence: How do I do that?

speaker: B
sentence: Go to this box, right touch on your first store.
zh: 进入‘此箱’，右键点主存储。

speaker: A
sentence: I see 'properties'. Is that it?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, then go to 'box' and have a look.
zh: 对，然后点‘工具箱’，运行检查。

speaker: A
sentence: It says 'see now'. Do I put my finger on it?
zh: 它写着‘现在查看’。我按它吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, and put a mark in every box.

speaker: A
sentence: Done. It says it will do it when I start again.
zh: 好了。它说下次启动时执行。

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. Let the machine do its work.
zh: 没问题。让机器做它的工作。

speaker: A
sentence: Right, what now?

speaker: B
sentence: Shut down again, then turn it on.

speaker: A
sentence: I will do that now.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. What do you see?

speaker: A
sentence: It is starting up, same as before.

speaker: B
sentence: Now go back to your papers.

speaker: A
sentence: I am there. It is still not opening.

speaker: B
sentence: Give it a right touch.

speaker: A
sentence: I get a list with 'open with'.
zh: 出来一个列表，有‘打开方式’。

speaker: B
sentence: Take the first on the list.

speaker: A
sentence: I did that. It says 'locked'.

speaker: B
sentence: Right, that is why. Let us let it go.
zh: 对了，这就是原因。我们放开它。

speaker: A
sentence: Well, how do I do that?

speaker: B
sentence: Open the list of running works. Stop that one.
zh: 打开运行中的工作列表。停止那个。

speaker: A
sentence: I see a list of work. Which one?
zh: 我看到一堆工作。哪一个？

speaker: B
sentence: Look for the one with your name on it.
zh: 找跟你名字一样的那个。

speaker: A
sentence: I see it. I will end it now.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now see if you can make the thing open again.
zh: 好。现在看看你能不能让它再打开。

speaker: A
sentence: It is opening! Yes, it works now.
zh: 它在打开了！好了，现在能用了。

speaker: B
sentence: Great. Keep a copy to be safe.
zh: 太好了。留一份副本以防万一。

speaker: A
sentence: Well, i will do that now.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. After that, give it a full power off and on.
zh: 好。之后，彻底关机再开机。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I am turning it off now.

speaker: B
sentence: Give it a minute before you start it again.

speaker: A
sentence: I will be here. It is starting now.

speaker: B
sentence: Now open it again.

speaker: A
sentence: It is opening. No error this time.
zh: 它在打开。这次没有报错。

speaker: B
sentence: Is the inside all there?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, everything is here. It is all good.

speaker: B
sentence: Well done. Now make a copy to another place.
zh: 做得好。现在复制一份到别处。

speaker: A
sentence: I am doing that now. Where do I put it?

speaker: B
sentence: Put it on the table or another place.
zh: 放桌面或者另一个地方。

speaker: A
sentence: Done. It is on the table now.
zh: 好了。现在桌面上有一份了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now see if the hard box is all right.
zh: 好的。现在看看硬盘有没有问题。

speaker: A
sentence: How do I do that, okay.

speaker: B
sentence: Go to 'This Box', put the button on the store, and take 'Details'.
zh: 打开‘此电脑’，右键点击硬盘，选择‘属性’。

speaker: A
sentence: I am here. What now?

speaker: B
sentence: Go to the list of things for work and put a mark at 'Test'. Let it do its work.
zh: 去工作用品列表，在‘测试’处做个标记。让它运行。

speaker: A
sentence: It is running now. No errors came up.
zh: 正在运行。没有发现错误。

speaker: B
sentence: Great. Then your machine is all right. You are good to go.
zh: 太好了。那你的电脑没问题了。你可以放心用了。

speaker: A
sentence: Would you like me to make a copy of the paper now?
zh: 你要我现在复制一份文件吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, put it on another store or send it to your net space.
zh: 是的，放到另一个盘或者传到你的网盘里。

speaker: A
sentence: Right, I will do that. What about the sharp bits?
zh: 好，我照做。那辣的东西呢？

speaker: B
sentence: Keep it soft for the food, but the machine is all right.
zh: 菜要清淡，但电脑没问题了。

speaker: A
sentence: I see. So the trouble is over?
zh: 明白了。所以问题解决了？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, a lock in the system made the error. Starting again put it right.
zh: 是的，系统锁导致了错误。重启解决了。

speaker: A
sentence: That is a weight off my mind. Thank you for your help.
zh: 这下我放心了。谢谢你的帮助。

speaker: B
sentence: Not at all. If it goes wrong again, give us a ring.
zh: 不客气。如果再出问题，给我们打电话。

speaker: A
sentence: I will. Have a good day.

speaker: B
sentence: You too. sure.

speaker: A
sentence: I will do that now, okay.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Say if it is all right.
zh: 好的。如果没问题了告诉我一声。

speaker: A
sentence: The paper is open and all there.

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. Make a copy to be safe.
zh: 那就好。做个备份以防万一。

speaker: A
sentence: I will put it on the cloud as well.

speaker: B
sentence: Wise. Then you are ready.
zh: 明智之举。那你就准备好了。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for your time and help.

speaker: B
sentence: That is my work. Have a good day.
zh: 这是我的工作。祝你今天愉快。

speaker: A
sentence: Well, you too. sure.

speaker: B
sentence: Good day.

speaker: A
sentence: Well, well, i will do that now.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Let me say if it goes well.
zh: 好的。如果顺利就告诉我。

speaker: A
sentence: The round thing is all right. No errors.
zh: 那个圆盘没问题。没有错误。

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good sign. Your machine is good.
zh: 这是个好兆头。你的机器没问题。

speaker: A
sentence: I have a copy on the cloud now.
zh: 我现在在云盘里存了一份。

speaker: B
sentence: Then you are ready for your meeting.
zh: 那你就为会议做好准备了。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I am ready. Thank you again.
zh: 是的，我准备好了。再次感谢。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Any time.

speaker: A
sentence: I will keep your number near.
zh: 我会把你的号码放在手边。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Have a good day.

speaker: A
sentence: I have a pain in my foot.

speaker: B
sentence: Which part of the foot?

speaker: A
sentence: Here, the right foot.

speaker: B
sentence: Is your head all right?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, my head is all right.

speaker: B
sentence: And your hands?

speaker: A
sentence: Hands are okay, no pain.

speaker: B
sentence: So it is only the foot.

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, the right foot is the trouble.

speaker: B
sentence: Let me have a look at your foot.

speaker: A
sentence: It is the leg, here.

speaker: B
sentence: Is there pain when I put my hand here?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, a sharp pain there.

speaker: B
sentence: No soft growth, that is good.

speaker: A
sentence: So it is a small twist, not broken.
zh: 所以只是轻微扭伤，没骨折。

speaker: B
sentence: Right, you will be well in a day or two.

speaker: A
sentence: But what about the test tomorrow?

speaker: B
sentence: Put a cold cloth on it tonight.

speaker: A
sentence: Cold cloth? I will do that.

speaker: B
sentence: Keep your foot up when you rest.

speaker: A
sentence: May I put weight on it?

speaker: B
sentence: Not much. Let it be soft.

speaker: A
sentence: I see. And if it still gives pain?

speaker: B
sentence: Come back to me in the morning.

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. I will do that.

speaker: B
sentence: Now, let me see your foot.

speaker: A
sentence: It is a bit red here.

speaker: B
sentence: Is it sharp when I put my hand here?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, that is the bad place.

speaker: B
sentence: It is a small twist, not broken.
zh: 只是轻微扭伤，没伤到骨头。

speaker: A
sentence: What is the name of this part?

speaker: B
sentence: That is where the leg turns.

speaker: A
sentence: And these are the toes.

speaker: B
sentence: So, head, hands, feet.

speaker: A
sentence: You have them in your head now.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. What is it like when you put weight on it?
zh: 好的。你踩上去感觉怎么样？

speaker: A
sentence: It is not sharp, but it is a pull when I do that.
zh: 不是刺痛，但踩的时候有拉扯感。

speaker: B
sentence: That is normal for a small twist. Rest it for a day.
zh: 轻微扭伤这样正常。休息一天。

speaker: A
sentence: Will I be ready for the test tomorrow?

speaker: B
sentence: Put a cold cloth on it tonight. If it still gives you pain, come back.
zh: 今晚用冷毛巾敷一下。还疼就再来。

speaker: A
sentence: A cold cloth will make the red part go down.
zh: 冷毛巾能让红肿消下去。

speaker: B
sentence: Do I have to keep my foot up?

speaker: A
sentence: A: Yes, put it on a cushion when you are seated.
zh: 对，坐着的时候搁在垫子上。

speaker: B
sentence: How long do I keep the cloth on?

speaker: A
sentence: A: Ten minutes at a time, two or three times.

speaker: B
sentence: No running or jumping till it is better.

speaker: A
sentence: What about walking to the school?

speaker: B
sentence: Walk slow. Stop if it gives pain.

speaker: A
sentence: A: I will do that. Thank you.

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. be safe of that foot.

speaker: A
sentence: okay then.

speaker: B
sentence: Is it up?

speaker: A
sentence: A bit, but not much.

speaker: B
sentence: Can you move your toes?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, they move well.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. That is a good sign.

speaker: A
sentence: Does it give pain when my hand is here?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, that is the sharp point.

speaker: A
sentence: It is a small twist. No broken bones.

speaker: B
sentence: So I can still take the test tomorrow?

speaker: A
sentence: We will see. Let it rest first.

speaker: B
sentence: Would you like a cold cloth on it?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, that is a good idea.

speaker: B
sentence: How long do I keep it on?

speaker: A
sentence: Ten minutes, then take it off.

speaker: B
sentence: Will that make the pain go away?

speaker: A
sentence: It will help. Not all the pain.
zh: 会好一些，但不会完全不疼。

speaker: B
sentence: What about the test in the morning?

speaker: A
sentence: If it still gives you pain, put it off.
zh: 如果还疼，可以申请缓考。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I will see how it is in the morning.

speaker: A
sentence: So, what part of the body is this?
zh: 那，这个是身体的哪个部位？

speaker: B
sentence: That is the part between the leg and the foot, I would say.
zh: 我觉得那是腿和脚之间的部分。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. And this one?

speaker: B
sentence: That is the foot, with toes at the end.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. Now point to your head.

speaker: B
sentence: Here. No pain there.

speaker: A
sentence: Well, and your hands?

speaker: B
sentence: Two hands are all right. See?

speaker: A
sentence: So the trouble is only in the foot.

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. Foot, lower leg, toes. I will keep them in mind.
zh: 对。脚、小腿、脚趾。我会记住的。

speaker: A
sentence: Now let me see your foot. Is it red or fat?
zh: 让我看看你的脚。有没有发红或肿起来？

speaker: B
sentence: Not red. But a little fat here, near the bone.
zh: 没红。但骨头旁边这里有点肿。

speaker: A
sentence: Is it sharp when I put my finger here?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes! That is the sharp pain I had.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. That is the point. Turn it bit by bit.
zh: 好的。这是那个点。一点一点转。

speaker: B
sentence: Oh. Pain when I go this way.

speaker: A
sentence: Not too bad. The bone is safe. Only the soft parts.
zh: 不算严重。骨头没事，只是软组织。

speaker: B
sentence: So I can still run tomorrow?

speaker: A
sentence: Better not. Rest it with cold cloth tonight.
zh: 最好别跑。今晚用冷毛巾敷一下。

speaker: B
sentence: Right, leg. I will be safe of you.
zh: 好，腿。我会好好照顾你的。

speaker: A
sentence: Let us go over the names again.

speaker: B
sentence: Head, hand, foot. I have them now.

speaker: A
sentence: Which part is damaged?

speaker: B
sentence: The part between the foot and the leg.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. And the other two?

speaker: B
sentence: Head is good. Hands are good.

speaker: A
sentence: So you will keep them safe tomorrow.
zh: 那你明天要保护好它们。

speaker: B
sentence: I will. No running, only rest.

speaker: A
sentence: If it still gives you pain, come back to me.

speaker: B
sentence: Thank you. Head, hand, foot. All clear.

speaker: A
sentence: Right, what part of the foot is the pain?

speaker: B
sentence: The place where leg bones join on the outer side.
zh: 腿外侧骨头相接的地方。

speaker: A
sentence: Is it sharp or not?

speaker: B
sentence: Like a twist, sharp when I put weight on it.
zh: 像扭了一下，踩地就刺痛。

speaker: A
sentence: Let me put my hand here. Is this the place?
zh: 我按一下这里。是这儿吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, that's the worst bit.

speaker: A
sentence: No growth. It is a small turn.

speaker: B
sentence: Well, so I can still take the test tomorrow?

speaker: A
sentence: Rest it with a cold cloth tonight. See how it is in the morning.
zh: 今晚冷敷休息，明天早上看情况。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I will keep that word in mind.

speaker: A
sentence: I am back! It smells good.

speaker: B
sentence: Take a seat, love. The soup is warm.
zh: 快坐下，宝贝。汤还热着呢。

speaker: A
sentence: Long day. The work is done.

speaker: B
sentence: Well done. Have some greens.

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks, Mother. I am away from the first day of the week for three days.
zh: 谢谢妈。我从一周的第一天起出门三天。

speaker: B
sentence: Oh? Where to?

speaker: A
sentence: A town in the north. Work business.
zh: 北部的一个城镇。工作的事。

speaker: B
sentence: It's cold up north. Take a thick coat.

speaker: A
sentence: I will put the water pipe right before I go.
zh: 好的。走之前我把水管弄好。

speaker: B
sentence: Let that be for now. Get your food down.
zh: 现在别管那个。先把饭吃了。

speaker: A
sentence: The pipe is making a sound again.

speaker: B
sentence: I will see to it after the meal. First, your food.
zh: 吃完饭我来弄。先吃你的饭。

speaker: A
sentence: How did the test go today?

speaker: B
sentence: Not so good. The numbers were hard.

speaker: A
sentence: We will go over it at the end of the week. I will give you a hand.
zh: 周末我们一起复习。我帮你。

speaker: B
sentence: That is kind of you. Your brother needs help with his numbers.
zh: 你真好。你弟弟数学需要帮忙。

speaker: A
sentence: I see. I will see him before I go.
zh: 我知道。走之前我会见他。

speaker: B
sentence: Let us get some things from the store on the third day of the week in the morning.
zh: 我们周三早上从商店买点东西吧。

speaker: A
sentence: Good idea. I will make a list after the meal.
zh: 好主意。吃完饭我列个单子。

speaker: B
sentence: Any special needs for the work food?
zh: 出差吃的有什么特别要求吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Not at all. Keep it simple. No sharp bits.
zh: 没什么。简单点就行。别太辣。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I will get some soft bread and cheese for you.
zh: 好。我给你买点软面包和奶酪。

speaker: A
sentence: That sounds good. And some fruit too, if it's not dear.
zh: 听起来不错。再买点水果，如果不贵的话。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I saw apples at a good price today.
zh: 行。今天我看到苹果价格不错。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. I am ready. Thanks, Mother.
zh: 好的。我准备好了。谢谢妈妈。

speaker: B
sentence: Have more. You look thin.

speaker: A
sentence: I am well, Mother. I had much work today.
zh: 我没事，妈。今天工作多了点。

speaker: B
sentence: Did you get the last bit done?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, all done. The group was happy.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Your father said the water pipe is still letting water drop.
zh: 那就好。你爸说水管还在滴水。

speaker: A
sentence: I will put it right before I go. Do not be troubled.

speaker: B
sentence: And your brother? How was his test?

speaker: A
sentence: He said numbers are hard. I will give him a hand on the rest day.
zh: 他说数学难。休息日我帮他看看。

speaker: B
sentence: That is kind. He will be pleased.

speaker: A
sentence: Would we get some more soup?

speaker: B
sentence: There is some left. Here, take more meat as well.

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks, Mother. This is my last night meal before the journey.
zh: 谢谢妈。这趟出差前最后一顿晚饭了。

speaker: B
sentence: Then we will have a good meal on day four. Little bags of meat and greens.
zh: 那周四给你包顿好的，饺子。

speaker: A
sentence: That sounds great. I will get the things for the inside.
zh: 太棒了，里面的东西我来准备。

speaker: B
sentence: No need. I will do it. You just rest and get your things together.
zh: 不用，你只管收拾行李，我来弄。

speaker: A
sentence: I will get the water pipe fixed before I go.
zh: 我走之前把水龙头修好。

speaker: B
sentence: Do not trouble. Your father will do it.

speaker: A
sentence: No, I said I would do it. It will only take a short time.
zh: 不，我说了要修，很快就好。

speaker: B
sentence: Well then, if you are certain. I will get the things for you.
zh: 行，你要是坚持，我给你拿东西。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. And on the day off, may we go to the food store?
zh: 谢谢。那休息日咱们去食品店？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, we need milk, bread, and some greens.
zh: 好，要买牛奶、面包和青菜。

speaker: A
sentence: I will make a list. Also, get some fruit for the journey.
zh: 我列个单子。再买点水果路上吃。

speaker: B
sentence: Good idea. I will put in some apples and oranges.
zh: 好主意，我放几个苹果和橘子。

speaker: A
sentence: And for the little brother, a sweet thing from the new town.
zh: 对了，给弟弟带点那边的点心。

speaker: B
sentence: He will be happy. You are a good brother.
zh: 他肯定高兴。你真是个好哥哥。

speaker: A
sentence: So, how was your day at work?

speaker: B
sentence: Good. We are done with the work. No more late nights.
zh: 挺好，工作收尾了，不用再熬夜了。

speaker: A
sentence: That is a weight off your mind. Have some more meat.

speaker: B
sentence: Thanks, mother. But I have news. I have to go away for work the week after this one.
zh: 谢谢妈。不过有个事，我下周要出差。

speaker: A
sentence: Oh? For how long?

speaker: B
sentence: Three days. From day five to day one.
zh: 三天。从第五天到第一天。

speaker: A
sentence: Then we will get your things ready. Do you have a warm coat?
zh: 那得赶紧收拾行李。你有厚外套吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, I will take it. The weather there is cold, Father said.
zh: 有的，我带上。爸说那边冷。

speaker: A
sentence: He is right. I will put some tea bags in your bag.
zh: 没错。我给你包里放点茶包。

speaker: B
sentence: You are the best. How did the boy do in his test?
zh: 妈最好了。弟弟考试怎么样？

speaker: A
sentence: He said the test on numbers was hard.

speaker: B
sentence: I saw him working on it all week.

speaker: A
sentence: He is not good with numbers, is he?
zh: 他是不是不太擅长数字？

speaker: B
sentence: Not quite. But he does his best.
zh: 确实不太行。不过他挺努力的。

speaker: A
sentence: I may give him a hand on the last day of the week.
zh: 我可以在周末最后一天帮他一把。

speaker: B
sentence: That would be great. He needs a push.
zh: 那太好了。他需要人推一把。

speaker: A
sentence: I will put the juice right before I go.
zh: 我走前会把水龙头弄好。

speaker: B
sentence: The one in the cooking room? It is still dropping water.
zh: 厨房那个吗？还在滴水呢。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. I have it in my room.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Then we can take the family to the store on the day of rest.
zh: 好。那周日咱们全家去超市。

speaker: A
sentence: Let us go in the morning?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, before the others come.

speaker: A
sentence: I will make a list tonight.

speaker: B
sentence: Get some meat for the cold days.

speaker: A
sentence: And some greens for the soup.

speaker: B
sentence: You and your greens. Right.

speaker: A
sentence: What about the fish? Is it good here?

speaker: B
sentence: The man at the turn has good fish.

speaker: A
sentence: Then we go there first.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I will get my coat ready.

speaker: A
sentence: I will get the list from my bag.

speaker: B
sentence: No need. I have it here, on the table.

speaker: A
sentence: Oh, good. Then we are ready.

speaker: B
sentence: Almost. Your father said he would come too.

speaker: A
sentence: Father? That is new. He does not come to the market.
zh: 我爸？稀罕。他从来不去菜场。

speaker: B
sentence: He would like some strong tea from that old place.
zh: 他想从那个老店买点浓茶。

speaker: A
sentence: Ah, that place. I will take him there.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Then I can get more things without his waiting.
zh: 好。那我就能多买点，不用他等着。

speaker: A
sentence: You two are together. I am only the helper.
zh: 你俩是一伙的。我就是个帮手。

speaker: B
sentence: A good helper. Now, take your greens.

speaker: A
sentence: I will have these greens. But I have a question.
zh: 我把青菜吃完。但我有个问题。

speaker: B
sentence: Go on. What is it?

speaker: A
sentence: I go after the middle-day meal on day five, back on day one.
zh: 我周五午饭后走，周一回来。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. On the night before you go, we make balls of paste for you.
zh: 对。你走的前一晚我们包饺子给你饯行。

speaker: A
sentence: That sounds good. And I will put the water pipe right before I go.
zh: 听着不错。我走之前把水管弄好。

speaker: B
sentence: No need for trouble. Your father will do it.

speaker: A
sentence: I said I would. It is not a great thing.
zh: 我说了要修。不是什么大事。

speaker: B
sentence: Well, if you say so. But do not work too hard.

speaker: A
sentence: I will not. Let me take these plates to the water drain.
zh: 不会的。我把盘子端到水槽去。

speaker: B
sentence: Good boy. I will clean the table.

speaker: A
sentence: The water pipe is making a sound again. I will look at it tomorrow.
zh: 水管又在响了。我明天看看。

speaker: B
sentence: You have a long day tomorrow. Rest first.
zh: 你明天要赶路，先休息吧。

speaker: A
sentence: I am not tired. I will put the food in boxes first.

speaker: B
sentence: Here is a bag of fruit for your way. Take it.
zh: 这袋水果你路上吃。拿着。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you, mother. You are kind.

speaker: B
sentence: Go to bed now. rest up.

speaker: A
sentence: rest up, Mother. okay in the morning.

speaker: B
sentence: Good night, son. Sleep well.

speaker: A
sentence: You too, Mother. I will put the pipe right before I go.
zh: 您也是，妈。我走之前把水管修好。

speaker: B
sentence: Do not be troubled. Your father will do it.

speaker: A
sentence: I'm back. Let me put this bag down.

speaker: B
sentence: Good timing. I just started cleaning this room.
zh: 来得正好，我刚在擦这间屋子。

speaker: A
sentence: The sun is so bright today. Look at this room!
zh: 今天太阳真亮，你看这屋子。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it is a bit mixed up. We have work to do.
zh: 是啊，有点乱，咱们得干活了。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. Where do we start? The room for cooking first?
zh: 行。从哪儿开始？先做饭的房间？

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good idea. I will do the plates.

speaker: A
sentence: I will get the food ready for after.
zh: 那我把食材准备好，晚点用。

speaker: B
sentence: Let us have a cup of tea first?

speaker: A
sentence: Right. A short rest before the work.

speaker: B
sentence: I'll put the kettle on. You take a rest.
zh: 我来烧水，你坐下歇会儿。

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks. The tea will give us a start.

speaker: B
sentence: Here you go. Not too warm now.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. So, after this, we clean the front room?
zh: 好。喝完这个，咱们打扫客厅？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. The dust on the boards is thick.

speaker: A
sentence: I will get a wet cloth for that.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. Let us start with the front room then.

speaker: A
sentence: I'll take the cloth and you get the dust thing.
zh: 我拿抹布，你拿那个吸尘的。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. I will give the boards a quick clean.

speaker: A
sentence: The sun is bright. Dust will be clear.
zh: 太阳很亮，灰尘会很清楚。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. I will do the floor after you do the boards.
zh: 对，你擦完架子我来吸地。

speaker: A
sentence: These books on the shelf need a new order.
zh: 架子上的书得重新摆一下。

speaker: B
sentence: Put them in a line by size? Or by shade?
zh: 按大小排还是按色调排？

speaker: A
sentence: By size, I would say. That looks clean.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I will put them in order now.

speaker: A
sentence: The floor is done. What about the window?
zh: 地吸完了，窗户要不要擦？

speaker: B
sentence: The window is good. Let's do the sleeping room after.
zh: 窗户可以。接下来弄卧室吧。

speaker: A
sentence: Good idea. The bed needs new covers.

speaker: B
sentence: I will get the clean ones from the drawer.

speaker: A
sentence: You take that end. I take this one.

speaker: B
sentence: Pull it tight. Good. Now the covers for the head rest.

speaker: A
sentence: These are soft. They will be good for sleep.

speaker: B
sentence: The box for clothes is not in order. Are we to put it right?
zh: 衣柜有点乱，要不要理一下？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. Fold the shirts and put them in groups.
zh: 好。把衬衫叠好，一摞一摞放。

speaker: B
sentence: I will do the top shelf. You do the lower one.

speaker: A
sentence: Right. This room looks much better now.
zh: 行。这房间现在好看多了。

speaker: B
sentence: Let's take a rest now. I made some tea.

speaker: A
sentence: That sounds good. My back is a bit stiff.

speaker: B
sentence: Take this seat by the window. The sun is warm.
zh: 坐窗边吧，太阳暖洋洋的。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. This tea is just what I needed.

speaker: B
sentence: After this, we will do the living room floor.
zh: 喝完这个，我们把客厅地板拖了。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. Let's get the cloth and bucket.

speaker: B
sentence: I will put warm water and soap in the bucket.
zh: 我来往桶里倒温水和肥皂。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I will put the seats out of the way.

speaker: B
sentence: The floor has some marks near the table.

speaker: A
sentence: I will give that part a good clean.

speaker: B
sentence: Let us start from the far end and come back.

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. That way we do not walk on wet floor.
zh: 对，这样不会踩到湿地面。

speaker: B
sentence: I will do the first part. You take over after.

speaker: A
sentence: Right. The water is a good heat.

speaker: B
sentence: Done. The floor is clean and bright now.
zh: 好了。地板现在又干净又亮。

speaker: A
sentence: Good work. The place looks much better now.
zh: 干得好。现在这地方看着好多了。

speaker: B
sentence: Let us have a rest before the room?
zh: 房间之前，要不要歇一下？

speaker: A
sentence: Good idea. I will make us some tea.

speaker: B
sentence: I would like that. My back is a bit tired.

speaker: A
sentence: Take a seat. The water will be ready in a minute.

speaker: B
sentence: Here is your tea. Go slow, it is warm.

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks. This is a good rest.

speaker: B
sentence: After tea, we will do the sleeping room. The bed needs new covers.
zh: 喝完茶，我们弄卧室。床单该换了。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I will get the clean ones from the box.
zh: 好。我去柜子里拿干净的。

speaker: B
sentence: And I will take the old covers off. Ready when you are.
zh: 我把旧床单撤了。你好了就开干。

speaker: A
sentence: Here are the clean covers. They smell good.
zh: 干净床单来了。闻着挺好。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Let us put them on together. One side for you, one for me.
zh: 好。咱俩一起套吧。你一边，我一边。

speaker: A
sentence: Pull your side tight. I will do the same here.
zh: 你那头拉紧。我这头也一样。

speaker: B
sentence: Done. That looks smooth. Now the head rests.
zh: 好了。挺平整。现在弄头靠。

speaker: A
sentence: Here are the covers. Put the ends in.
zh: 枕套在这儿。把角塞进去。

speaker: B
sentence: Like this? Good. The room looks much better now.
zh: 这样？不错。房间现在顺眼多了。

speaker: A
sentence: Right, put the books back on the shelf?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, in order by size. It will look clean.

speaker: A
sentence: All done. The room is ready for men.
zh: 齐活。这房间可以待客了。

speaker: B
sentence: Let us go and have a rest in the living room.

speaker: A
sentence: Let us put the kettle on.

speaker: B
sentence: Good idea. I would like a cup of tea.

speaker: A
sentence: Me too. Let us take the seats by the window.

speaker: B
sentence: The sun is warm here. Quite a rest.
zh: 这儿太阳暖洋洋的。真放松。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. The house is clean now. No more work.
zh: 是啊。房子干净了。不用再忙了。

speaker: B
sentence: What time will your friends come?

speaker: A
sentence: About six. We have two hours still.
zh: 大概六点。还有两个小时。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I will make some small cakes.

speaker: A
sentence: Oh, you are good. I will give you a hand.
zh: 哦，你真好。我帮你打下手。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. Let us go then.

speaker: A
sentence: I will get the powder. Where is it?

speaker: B
sentence: Top shelf, left side. I put it there yesterday.
zh: 上层架子，左边。我昨天放那儿的。

speaker: A
sentence: Got it. How much do we need?

speaker: B
sentence: Two cups will be enough. And some sugar.

speaker: A
sentence: Sugar is in the tin. I will get it.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Do we have eggs?

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, six in the box. Three for the cakes.
zh: 有，盒子里六个。三个做蛋糕。

speaker: B
sentence: I will do the eggs. You mix the powder.

speaker: A
sentence: Right. A bit of milk to make it soft.

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good idea. I will get the milk.

speaker: A
sentence: The mix is ready. What now?

speaker: B
sentence: Put it in the tin. I will heat the oven.
zh: 倒进烤盘里。我去预热烤箱。

speaker: A
sentence: Would you like some nuts on top?
zh: 要不要在上面放点坚果？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, that will make it hard and good to the teeth.

speaker: A
sentence: Done. How long in the oven?

speaker: B
sentence: About twenty minutes. Let's clean this room while we have time.
zh: 大概二十分钟。趁这工夫把房间收拾了吧。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I will wash the plates.

speaker: B
sentence: The plates are clean. What about the floor?

speaker: A
sentence: I will get the brush. You move the seats.
zh: 我去拿扫帚。你把座位挪开。

speaker: B
sentence: That is right. The floor is cleaner now.

speaker: A
sentence: Let us put the cakes on a plate?
zh: 我们把蛋糕放到盘子里吧？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, and get the butter out. The men will be here before long.
zh: 好，再把黄油拿出来。人快到了。

speaker: A
sentence: Oh, my box is ringing. It is them.
zh: 哦，我的盒子响了。是他们。

speaker: B
sentence: What do they say?

speaker: A
sentence: They are sad. They may come another day.
zh: 他们难过。可以改天再来。

speaker: B
sentence: Well then. More cake for us.
zh: 那好吧。咱们多吃点蛋糕。

speaker: A
sentence: True. Let's have a cup of tea and rest.

speaker: B
sentence: Good idea. I will put the kettle on.

speaker: A
sentence: Which tea would you like?

speaker: B
sentence: The one with flowers. It is soft and sweet.

speaker: A
sentence: Sky looks grey. What is your idea?
zh: 天灰蒙蒙的，你有什么想法？

speaker: B
sentence: Clouds are moving quick. It may rain after some time.
zh: 云走得急，过一阵可能要下雨。

speaker: A
sentence: The earth is dry now, but the air is wet.
zh: 地面还是干的，但空气潮潮的。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, the weather said rain after the middle of the day.

speaker: A
sentence: So I need a coat and an umbrella?

speaker: B
sentence: I would take a light coat. That thin one over there.
zh: 我会拿那件薄外套，就那边那件。

speaker: A
sentence: But it's twenty degrees. Won't I be too warm?
zh: 可今天二十度呢，穿那个不会热吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Better warm than wet. You can take it off inside.
zh: 湿了可比热了难受，进屋还能脱。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I'll take that one and the umbrella.
zh: 好的。我拿那件，再带把伞。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. The umbrella is by the door. I'll get it.

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks. The wind is getting up now.
zh: 谢了。这会儿风越来越大了。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, I saw the trees shaking. Put the coat on before you go out.
zh: 嗯，我看见树在晃。出门前把外套穿上。

speaker: A
sentence: I will. Will the rain come before five?

speaker: B
sentence: Hard to say. The clouds are moving quick, so it may come early.
zh: 难说。云走得快，可能来得早。

speaker: A
sentence: Then I'll keep the umbrella in my bag, ready.
zh: 那我伞放包里，随时能拿出来。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Your bag has a side pocket for it.
zh: 好。你包侧面有个口袋放伞。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I put it there. The coat is light but warm.

sentence: No time. I will get one on the road. okay.

sentence: Yes, I have it here.

sentence: Take it to the front. They will give you a card.
zh: 拿到前台去，他们会给你一张卡。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. I will do that.

speaker: B
sentence: The lift is on the left. Take it to the third floor.

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks. I see the lift now.

speaker: B
sentence: That is all right. I have to go back to the car.
zh: 没关系。我得回车上去了。

speaker: A
sentence: That is kind of you. Thanks.

speaker: B
sentence: That is all right. Good will with your meeting.

speaker: A
sentence: The car is moving now. I hope I am on the right one.

speaker: B
sentence: You are on the right one. I saw you get on 3.
zh: 没错，我瞧见你上的是3路。

speaker: A
sentence: That is a help. I am new to this road.

speaker: B
sentence: No need to be troubled. I will say when we get near.
zh: 别担心。到站前我会提醒你。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. How many stops to the town middle?
zh: 谢谢。到市中心还有几站？

speaker: B
sentence: Five more. After that is the market.

speaker: A
sentence: I will keep an eye on the glass then.

speaker: B
sentence: You may do that. Or push the bell when you see the town house.
zh: 也行。或者看到市政大楼就按铃。

speaker: A
sentence: Good idea. I will do that.

speaker: B
sentence: The town house has a clock. You will see it.
zh: 市政厅有个钟，你会看到的。

speaker: A
sentence: I see the clock now. Is this the stop?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, this is it. Push the bell.

speaker: A
sentence: I will. Thank you for your help.

speaker: B
sentence: No trouble. Have a good day at work.

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks. I hope I am not late.

speaker: B
sentence: You are on time. The clock says ten to nine.
zh: 来得及。钟显示八点五十。

speaker: A
sentence: That is good. The door is opening.

speaker: B
sentence: Step down with care. The road is wet.

speaker: A
sentence: I will. sure and thanks again.

speaker: B
sentence: sure. Keep to the left side.

speaker: A
sentence: Which way is the office from here?

speaker: B
sentence: Turn left at the road meeting. It is the tall building.
zh: 路口左转，就是那栋高楼。

speaker: A
sentence: I see it. That is the one with glass walls.
zh: 看见了，就是那个玻璃墙的。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. You will be there in two minutes.

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I will go quick.

speaker: B
sentence: Do not run. The floor is wet.

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I will take my time.

speaker: B
sentence: That is wise. Have a good meeting.

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. You are very kind.

speaker: B
sentence: No trouble. Off you go now.

speaker: A
sentence: I am at the door now.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Push the door, it is not locked.

speaker: A
sentence: It is open. I am inside.

speaker: B
sentence: The meeting room is on the first floor, second door on the right.
zh: 会议室在一楼，右手第二间。

speaker: A
sentence: I see a sign. Room 102.

speaker: B
sentence: That is the one. Go in and take a seat.

speaker: A
sentence: Some are in there now.

speaker: B
sentence: They are early. You are on time.

speaker: A
sentence: I will take a seat at the back.

speaker: B
sentence: Good idea. The front is for the head man.
zh: 好主意，前面是老板的位子。

speaker: A
sentence: The head man is not here now.

speaker: B
sentence: He will be here quick. He is not late.

speaker: A
sentence: I hope the talk is short. I have much to do.
zh: 希望会议简短，我还有很多事。

speaker: B
sentence: It will be quick. Only news on the new work.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. I did my part last night.
zh: 那就好，我昨晚准备好了。

speaker: B
sentence: Then you have nothing to fear. Just say what you did.
zh: 那你没什么好怕的，照实说就行。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I will keep it simple.

speaker: B
sentence: The meeting is done. You did well.

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks. I was on edge, but it went well.
zh: 谢谢，我本来紧张，但挺顺利的。

speaker: B
sentence: First time on this line, and you made it.
zh: 第一次坐这条线，你也赶到了。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. I will take this line another time.

speaker: B
sentence: Now you see the way. No more fear.
zh: 现在你认路了，不用怕了。

speaker: A
sentence: True. But I still keep my hand near the bell.
zh: 没错，不过我还是会手放铃边。

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good way for a person who goes by car.
zh: 这对任何坐马车的人来说都是个好习惯。

speaker: A
sentence: Let us get a drink before you go back?
zh: 你回去前要不要喝杯东西？

speaker: B
sentence: I would like that. A cup of tea will be good.

speaker: A
sentence: There is a place near here. Come on.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. But I have only ten minutes before my train comes.
zh: 行，不过十分钟后车就来了，我只能待一小会儿。

speaker: A
sentence: That is enough for a quick cup. They do take-away here.
zh: 那够喝杯快的，这家店有外带杯。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. One tea, no sugar, and I am off again.
zh: 好的。一杯茶，不加糖，喝完我就走。

speaker: A
sentence: Good morning. One ticket to the near town, please.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. The 9:20 train. That gives you forty minutes.
zh: 行。九点二十的车，你还有四十分钟。

speaker: A
sentence: Will I make it? I'm a bit on edge.

speaker: B
sentence: Time is no trouble. Here is your ticket and your card. Door 3.
zh: 时间没问题。这是你的票和证件。三号门。

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks. Which way is the door?

speaker: B
sentence: Go straight past the store. You will see the glass.
zh: 直走，过了商店。能看到屏幕。

speaker: A
sentence: Got it. I'll head there now.

speaker: B
sentence: Keep your ticket ready. They will look at it at the door.

speaker: A
sentence: Will do. Thanks.

speaker: B
sentence: Have a good journey. Your train is on time.

speaker: A
sentence: I'm at the door now. The train is here.

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, get on and take a seat. I will be on the train too.
zh: 对，上去找个位子。我也在这趟车上。

speaker: A
sentence: Oh, you are the worker from the ticket place!

speaker: B
sentence: That's right. I work on the train as well. Let me help with your bag.
zh: 没错，我也在车上服务。包我来帮你放。

speaker: A
sentence: That is very kind. I was troubled by the time.
zh: 你太好了。我刚才还担心时间。

speaker: B
sentence: No need to be troubled. The train is not late on this line.
zh: 不用操心，这条线从来不晚点。

speaker: A
sentence: That is good. I will see a friend for the first time.
zh: 那就好。我第一次去看一个朋友。

speaker: B
sentence: A first time is special. Is your friend at the station?
zh: 第一次总是特别的。你朋友在车站接你吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, he will be at the door when I get off.

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. You will have a happy time. Look at the fields out there.
zh: 真好，你会玩得很开心的。看外面的田野。

speaker: A
sentence: Oh, they are so green. Is that a river?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it goes to the town after this. Some go fishing there.
zh: 对，一直流到下一个镇子。有人在那儿钓鱼。

speaker: A
sentence: I would like to go fishing some day. But not today.
zh: 以后我也想钓鱼。但不是今天。

speaker: B
sentence: Today you see a friend. That is better than fish.
zh: 今天你要见朋友，比钓鱼强。

speaker: A
sentence: Right! How long till we get there?

speaker: B
sentence: About twenty minutes. Do you have a bag to get down?
zh: 大概二十分钟。你有包要拿下来吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, the blue one up there. I will get it after a short time.
zh: 有的，上面那个蓝色的。我一会儿就拿。

speaker: B
sentence: I will give you a hand if it is not light.
zh: 要是重的话，我帮你搭把手。

speaker: A
sentence: That is kind. It is not a great weight, but thanks.
zh: 你真好。不算太重，但谢啦。

speaker: B
sentence: No trouble. So, what will you and your friend do today?
zh: 不麻烦。那你和朋友今天打算干什么？

speaker: A
sentence: He said we would go for a walk by the water and have a meal.
zh: 他说我们会去河边走走，然后吃顿饭。

speaker: B
sentence: The weather is good for that.

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, good it is not raining. I was troubled about that.
zh: 是啊，幸好没下雨。我之前还挺担心的。

speaker: B
sentence: Rain would be a shame. But look, the sun is out now.
zh: 下雨就可惜了。不过你看，现在出太阳了。

speaker: A
sentence: Oh yes! I see the high land far off. Are we near?
zh: 哦，是的！我看见远处的高地。快到了吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Not far now. About ten minutes. That high bit is where the town starts.
zh: 不远了，大概十分钟。那片高地就是镇子的起点。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. I will get my bag down then.

speaker: B
sentence: Take your time. The train will stop for a bit.

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I hope my friend is on time.

speaker: B
sentence: I have no doubt he will be. This is a happy day for you.
zh: 他肯定会的。今天对你来说是个开心的日子。

speaker: A
sentence: I will give him a ring when I get off.
zh: 我下车就给他打个电话。

speaker: B
sentence: Good idea. The net is good here.

speaker: A
sentence: What is that building with the high point?
zh: 那个有高尖的建筑是什么？

speaker: B
sentence: That is the old church. They have a market there on the day before the first day of the week.
zh: 那是老教堂，一周的第一天前一天有集市。

speaker: A
sentence: I would like to see that one day.

speaker: B
sentence: You will have time. Your friend will take you about.
zh: 你有的是时间，你朋友会带你逛的。

speaker: A
sentence: I hope so. He said he has a thought for today.
zh: 希望如此，他说今天有想法。

speaker: B
sentence: Then you are in good hands. I see the station now.
zh: 那你就交给他了。我看到车站了。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I see it too. Time to get ready.
zh: 嗯，我也看到了。该准备下车了。

speaker: B
sentence: Have a great time with your friend. sure!
zh: 祝你跟朋友玩得开心，好的！

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for your help. I am better now.
zh: 谢谢你的帮忙，我现在好多了。

speaker: B
sentence: No trouble. Do you have a bag for your things?
zh: 不客气。你有袋子装东西吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I have a small bag here. It has my book and water.
zh: 有，我有个小包，里面装了书和水。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. The train will stop in ten minutes.
zh: 好的，火车十分钟后到站。

speaker: A
sentence: I will get my bag down now. Is the door on this side?
zh: 我现在就把包拿下来。门在这边吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, the door on the right. Watch your step.

speaker: A
sentence: I will. The air outside smells sweet.
zh: 我会的。外面的空气闻起来很香。

speaker: B
sentence: That is the flowers from the gardens near the station.
zh: 那是车站附近花园里的花香。

speaker: A
sentence: What a good start to the day! I will come again.
zh: 多么美好的一天开始！我还会再来的。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome any time. Go safe!

speaker: A
sentence: The train is slowing down now.

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, we are almost there. Five more minutes.

speaker: A
sentence: I see a tall building with a clock on top.
zh: 我看到一座高楼上有个钟。

speaker: B
sentence: That is the station clock. You will be on time.
zh: 那是车站的钟，你会准时到的。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. My friend said he would be at the door.
zh: 太好了，我朋友说会在门口等我。

speaker: B
sentence: He will be happy to okay. First time here?
zh: 他见到你会很高兴的。第一次来这儿？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I have only seen pictures of this town.
zh: 嗯，之前只看过这座小镇的照片。

speaker: B
sentence: It is a good place. The old streets are quiet.
zh: 这地方不错，老街很安静。

speaker: A
sentence: I will get my friend to take me there.
zh: 我会让朋友带我去看看。

speaker: B
sentence: Good idea. Now get your bag ready.
zh: 好主意。现在把包准备好。

speaker: A
sentence: I have my bag here. Is the door near?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, go down the steps and turn left.

speaker: A
sentence: I see the steps now. Thank you for your help.
zh: 看到台阶了。多谢你帮忙。

speaker: B
sentence: My pleasure. Have a good time with your friend.
zh: 不客气。祝你跟朋友玩得开心。

speaker: A
sentence: I will. The town looks good from the window.
zh: 会的。从窗户看这小镇挺漂亮。

speaker: B
sentence: See the market square. It is full of flowers.
zh: 等你看到集市广场再说，那儿全是花。

speaker: A
sentence: Flowers? My friend did not say that.

speaker: B
sentence: He may be keeping it as a surprise.

speaker: A
sentence: That is kind of him. I will go now.

speaker: B
sentence: Safe journey. Give my love to the town.
zh: 一路顺风。替我向小镇问好。

speaker: A
sentence: I will. The streets look clean and quiet.
zh: 会的。街道看起来很干净安静。

speaker: B
sentence: That is the old part. Not many carts go there.

speaker: A
sentence: Is it better to walk or take a car from the station?
zh: 我该走路还是从车站坐车？

speaker: B
sentence: Walk. Ten minutes, you will see the stores.
zh: 走路吧，十分钟，还能看看店铺。

speaker: A
sentence: Good idea. I have only a small bag.

speaker: B
sentence: There is a book store on the turn. My best one.
zh: 拐角有家书店，我最喜欢的。

speaker: A
sentence: I like books. I may go in before I see him.
zh: 我喜欢书。也许见面前进去逛逛。

speaker: B
sentence: Do that. He will be late, I am certain.

speaker: A
sentence: Have you seen him before?

speaker: B
sentence: No, but friends are late for a surprise now and then.
zh: 不认识，但朋友为了惊喜有时迟到。

speaker: A
sentence: I will take a look at the book store.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. On the left, past the flower store.

speaker: A
sentence: Flowers? I did not see them from the train.

speaker: B
sentence: They are small, but the owner is kind.

speaker: A
sentence: I will say you sent me.
zh: 我就说是你介绍我来的。

speaker: B
sentence: Do that. He will give you a good price.
zh: 说吧。他会给你个好价钱。

speaker: A
sentence: That was a good talk. I am better now.
zh: 刚才聊得很好。我现在好多了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now go and have your day out.
zh: 好。现在去享受你的一天吧。

speaker: A
sentence: I will. Thank you for your help.

speaker: B
sentence: No trouble. Have a good time with your friend.
zh: 不客气。和你朋友玩得开心。

speaker: A
sentence: I will send you a picture of the flowers.
zh: 我会给你发一张花的照片。

speaker: B
sentence: I would like that. Safe journey back.
zh: 那我等着。回程一路平安。

speaker: A
sentence: The train back is at six, yes?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, from the same door. Do not be late.

speaker: A
sentence: I will keep an eye on the time.

speaker: B
sentence: Good man. Now off you go.

speaker: A
sentence: sure. And thanks again.

speaker: B
sentence: Right then. Off you go. Your friend is waiting.
zh: 好了。走吧。你朋友在等着呢。

speaker: A
sentence: I see him! He is waving. Thank you for everything.
zh: 我看到他了！他在挥手。谢谢你的一切。

speaker: B
sentence: My pleasure. Have a great day. Good day!
zh: 我的荣幸。祝你今天愉快。再见！

sentence: Good morning, I am calling.

sentence: How are you today?

sentence: I am quite well, thank you.

sentence: It is nice to okay.

sentence: I would like to talk a bit.

speaker: A
sentence: That is fine, go on.

speaker: B
sentence: What is the weather like?

sentence: It is quite cold today

speaker: B
sentence: I will get a coat then.

speaker: A
sentence: That is a good idea.

speaker: B
sentence: Shall we talk about work?

speaker: A
sentence: I am not sure, what do you think?

speaker: B
sentence: It is up to you, of course.

speaker: A
sentence: Right, I will start then.

speaker: B
sentence: I would like to hear about your work.

speaker: A
sentence: It is going well, I think.

speaker: B
sentence: That is good to hear.

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, they are quite good.

speaker: B
sentence: I am glad to hear that.

sentence: We have a new project now.

sentence: It is about a new thing

speaker: B
sentence: That sounds interesting.

sentence: That is fine, I think.

sentence: I think it is quite bad.

sentence: We should be careful.

sentence: Well, that is a good idea.

sentence: I will be careful, do not worry.

sentence: That is fine

sentence: We should talk about something happy.

speaker: A
sentence: What do you think about the garden?

sentence: I think it is quite good.

sentence: I would like to see it now.

sentence: Shall we have a look at the garden?

sentence: Right, I will show you.

speaker: B
sentence: That is a nice tree.

sentence: I think it is quite tall.

sentence: We should take a photo.

sentence: That is a good idea, okay.

sentence: Well, i think it is quite good.

sentence: We should talk about the weather.

speaker: B
sentence: I think it is quite cold.

sentence: Yes, it is very cold.

sentence: We should go inside.

sentence: Shall we go inside now?

sentence: Well, that is fine.

sentence: I would like to go inside.

sentence: I think it is time to eat.

sentence: What do you think about the food?

speaker: B
sentence: I think it is quite good, okay.

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it is very good.

speaker: B
sentence: We should eat now.

speaker: A
sentence: Shall we eat now?

speaker: B
sentence: Right, I would like some food now.

speaker: A
sentence: I would like some hot food.

sentence: That is fine, I will get some.

sentence: Shall we eat at the table?

sentence: Yes, that is a good idea.

sentence: I would like to okay more often.

sentence: Well, well, that is a good idea.

sentence: I will call you tomorrow.

sentence: I am very happy to talk to you.

sentence: Well, yes, that is a good idea.

sentence: That is very kind of you.

sentence: I would like to see your face more often.

sentence: I would like to talk to you on the machine.

sentence: We should use the box to talk more often.

sentence: Yes, that is a good idea, okay.

sentence: I will talk to you every day on the box.

zh: 那我们下次可以长聊一会儿。

speaker: A
sentence: That is a good idea, I like talking to you.
zh: 这是个好主意，我喜欢跟你聊天。

speaker: B
sentence: I must go now, it is time to eat.
zh: 我现在得走了，已经到吃饭的时间了。

speaker: A
sentence: Okay, have a good meal.
zh: 好吧，你吃饭的时候慢慢吃。

speaker: B
sentence: You too, be safe of yourself.

speaker: A
sentence: I will, thank you for talking.
zh: 我会的，谢谢你今天跟我聊天。

speaker: B
sentence: It was nice talking to you, sure.

speaker: A
sentence: okay next week then.

speaker: B
sentence: I am looking forward to it, goodbye.

speaker: A
sentence: Hey — is the net down?

speaker: B
sentence: Not on my side. Works fine here.

speaker: A
sentence: Mine just stopped. The play starts in two minutes.
zh: 我的刚断，比赛还有两分钟开始。

speaker: B
sentence: Hold on. I am coming.

speaker: A
sentence: Do not take too long. I can not miss the start.

speaker: B
sentence: Let me see your screen.

speaker: A
sentence: It says no net. But I am standing right next to the box.
zh: 显示无连接，但我就站在路由器旁边。

speaker: B
sentence: You are on the wrong net.

speaker: A
sentence: What? They all look the same.
zh: 什么？这几个看起来都一样。

speaker: B
sentence: Look at the name. You are on the next house.
zh: 看名字，你连的是隔壁家的。

speaker: A
sentence: Their secret word used to work.

speaker: B
sentence: They must have changed it. Take off this one and pick ours.
zh: 他们一定换了密码，断开这个，选我们的。

speaker: A
sentence: Which one is ours?

speaker: B
sentence: The one in the middle. You see the numbers at the end?
zh: 中间那个，看到最后面那些数字了吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Five two four... yes. Got it.

speaker: B
sentence: Now put in the secret word.

speaker: A
sentence: Is it still the same as when we set it up?
zh: 还是我们设置时的那个密码吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. Same as before.

speaker: A
sentence: Going in now.

speaker: B
sentence: The secret word starts with a big letter.
zh: 密码开头有一个大写字母。

speaker: A
sentence: Oh. Let me do it again.

speaker: B
sentence: Take your time.

speaker: A
sentence: The play starts in one minute.
zh: 比赛还有一分钟开始了。

speaker: B
sentence: Then type faster.

speaker: A
sentence: Done. Come on...

speaker: B
sentence: Is it going through?

speaker: A
sentence: The circle is going round.

speaker: B
sentence: Good sign.

speaker: A
sentence: It says wrong secret word.

speaker: B
sentence: Did you use the big letter?

speaker: A
sentence: I thought I did.

speaker: B
sentence: Let me type it.

speaker: A
sentence: Here.

speaker: B
sentence: Big letter first, then the numbers. Going slowly.
zh: 先大写字母，然后数字，慢慢来。

speaker: A
sentence: What is taking so long?

speaker: B
sentence: I am being careful. Three wrong tries and it blocks us for five minutes.
zh: 我在谨慎，错三次要被锁五分钟。

speaker: A
sentence: What? We already tried twice.
zh: 什么？我们已经试了两次了。

speaker: B
sentence: I know. That is why I am going slowly.
zh: 我知道，所以我在慢慢来。

speaker: A
sentence: The play has started.

speaker: B
sentence: I know. Two seconds.

speaker: B
sentence: There.

speaker: A
sentence: Is it...

speaker: B
sentence: Wait for it.

speaker: A
sentence: Come on, come on...

speaker: B
sentence: There. It is through.

speaker: A
sentence: YES.

speaker: B
sentence: Open the play thing.

speaker: A
sentence: It is going. I can see the numbers!
zh: 在加载！我能看到比分了！

speaker: B
sentence: You missed the first two minutes.

speaker: A
sentence: What happened?

speaker: B
sentence: Nothing. Still no score.

speaker: A
sentence: Oh, thank goodness.

speaker: B
sentence: You owe me a cold drink.

speaker: A
sentence: Done. I will get it now.

speaker: B
sentence: Quick. I want to watch too.

speaker: A
sentence: Cold water or the sweet kind?

speaker: B
sentence: Sweet.

speaker: A
sentence: Here. And thank you.

speaker: B
sentence: Do not join strange nets in the future. That is how this happened.
zh: 以后别随便连陌生网络，就是这样断掉的。

speaker: A
sentence: I thought it was ours.

speaker: B
sentence: Always check the name.

speaker: A
sentence: I will from now on.

speaker: B
sentence: Is the picture clear?

speaker: A
sentence: Very clear. No waiting at all.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Move your seat a bit to the right.
zh: 好，你的椅子往右移一点。

speaker: A
sentence: Does that make a difference?

speaker: B
sentence: If the sign is low, yes. But yours is full, so not really.
zh: 信号弱的时候有区别，但你已经满格了，所以没差。

speaker: A
sentence: Then why did you tell me to move?

speaker: B
sentence: Old way of doing things.

speaker: A
sentence: Your old way almost made me miss the ball.
zh: 你的老习惯差点让我错过进球。

speaker: B
sentence: It has not gone in yet. Watch.

speaker: A
sentence: Does this happen a lot? Net going off?

speaker: B
sentence: Not often. Last time was on a rainy night.
zh: 不常有，上次是在下雨天晚上。

speaker: A
sentence: Rain can do that?

speaker: B
sentence: Heavy rain can. The sign comes from outside.
zh: 大雨会，信号是从外面来的。

speaker: A
sentence: I never thought about where the sign comes from.
zh: 我从来没想过信号从哪里来。

speaker: B
sentence: Most people do not.

speaker: A
sentence: Should I keep the secret word written somewhere?
zh: 我应该把密码写在某个地方吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Your phone should have it now after going through.
zh: 连上之后你的手机应该自动保存了。

speaker: A
sentence: So I just pick the name next time?
zh: 以后我只要选名字就能连上了？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. Unless someone changes the secret word.
zh: 是的，除非有人改了密码。

speaker: A
sentence: Who would change it?

speaker: B
sentence: Me.

speaker: A
sentence: What? Why?

speaker: B
sentence: Every few months. For safety.

speaker: A
sentence: Tell me before you change it next time.

speaker: B
sentence: I left a note on the table last time.
zh: 上次我在桌子上留了一张纸条的。

speaker: A
sentence: I thought that was a shopping list.

speaker: B
sentence: It said new secret word at the top.
zh: 纸条最上面写着「新密码」。

speaker: A
sentence: I only read the numbers.

speaker: B
sentence: Those numbers were the price of eggs.
zh: 那些数字是鸡蛋的价格。

speaker: A
sentence: No wonder it did not work.

speaker: B
sentence: Next time I will call you.

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. Please. No more notes.
zh: 好，请这样做，别留纸条了。

speaker: B
sentence: Done.

speaker: A
sentence: The net is very good now.

speaker: B
sentence: It always is once you are on the right one.
zh: 一旦连上正确网络就一直很稳定。

speaker: A
sentence: Half time soon.

speaker: B
sentence: I will get some small food.

speaker: A
sentence: There are small round things in the cook place.

speaker: B
sentence: From that place near the bus stop?
zh: 是公交站旁边那家店买的？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. I went this morning.

speaker: B
sentence: These are good.

speaker: A
sentence: I know. I had three on the way home.
zh: 我知道，回家的路上我已经吃了三个了。

speaker: B
sentence: Three.

speaker: A
sentence: Do not judge me. The play is on.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I will stay for the second part.
zh: 好吧，我留下来看下半场。

speaker: A
sentence: I thought you would.
zh: 我就知道你会留下来的。

speaker: B
sentence: You said I owe you a cold drink once.
zh: 你说过你欠我一杯冷饮来着。

speaker: A
sentence: That was the other way round.

speaker: A
sentence: Morning. You are here early.

speaker: B
sentence: Good morning. First day on my own.
zh: 早上好。第一天自己干活。

speaker: A
sentence: Here is some water. New week, new start.
zh: 来杯水。新的一周，新的开始。

speaker: B
sentence: Thanks. I am a bit on edge, to be true.

speaker: A
sentence: No need. You will do well.

speaker: B
sentence: I hope so. What is the first thing?
zh: 希望如此。第一件事是什么？

speaker: A
sentence: Here is the paper. First writing by twelve.
zh: 这份文件给你。中午前出初稿。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I will have a look now.

speaker: A
sentence: Use the old paper as a guide. Any question, say so.
zh: 用旧文件做参考。有问题就说。

speaker: B
sentence: Got it. I will start right away.

speaker: A
sentence: I will open it now.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Take your time.

speaker: A
sentence: The numbers here seem off.

speaker: B
sentence: Which part? Let me see.

speaker: A
sentence: This line, the growth rate is wrong.

speaker: B
sentence: Oh, I see the error. The box is wrong.
zh: 哦，我看到错误了。格子引用错了。

speaker: A
sentence: So we put the right one in. That is fixed.
zh: 那我们填上正确的。这就改好了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. What about the rest of the list?

speaker: A
sentence: All clear. I will send it to you in a bit.
zh: 都清楚了。我一会儿发给你。

speaker: B
sentence: Take your time. No need to be quick.

speaker: A
sentence: Here is the first attempt. Have a look.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. Let me go through it.

speaker: A
sentence: The numbers all match now. Good work.
zh: 数字现在都对上了。干得好。

speaker: B
sentence: Thanks. I am happy with it.

speaker: A
sentence: You may send it to the chief now.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I will send it now.

speaker: A
sentence: One minute. Let me see first.

speaker: B
sentence: What is it? Something wrong?

speaker: A
sentence: No. Only the day on the front page.
zh: 没有。只是封面上的日子。

speaker: B
sentence: Ah, yes. That is from last seven days.

speaker: A
sentence: I will put down this day.

speaker: B
sentence: Good eye. I did not see that.

speaker: A
sentence: All done. Ready to send now.

speaker: B
sentence: Send it. I will say if any word comes back.
zh: 发吧。有回复我会告诉你。

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks. I will go back to my table.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I have another bit of work for you after that.
zh: 好。那之后我还有件事给你。

speaker: A
sentence: What is it? More numbers?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, but a short list. Names and numbers.

speaker: A
sentence: That is good. I will do it now.

speaker: B
sentence: No need to go quick. Take a rest first.

speaker: A
sentence: I will get a drink first then.

speaker: B
sentence: Good idea. The water is in the back room.

speaker: A
sentence: Got it. Back in a minute.

speaker: B
sentence: Take your time. No need to go quick.

speaker: A
sentence: Here I am. What is the list?

speaker: B
sentence: A short list of new hands. Names and numbers.
zh: 新员工名单，姓名和电话。

speaker: A
sentence: Is it right to put them in the box?
zh: 把它们放进盒子里可以吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, and make a paper copy for the office wall.

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I will do that now.

speaker: B
sentence: Good man. I will be at my table if you need me.

speaker: A
sentence: I have the list here. All names are clear.
zh: 名单在我这儿。名字都清楚。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now put them in the box, one by one.
zh: 好。现在一个一个放进盒子里。

speaker: A
sentence: May I put them in order by first letter?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, that is best. A to end, like the book of names.
zh: 对，这样最好。按字母顺序，像电话簿一样。

speaker: A
sentence: Done. The box is full. What now?

speaker: B
sentence: Make a copy for the wall. Use the great printer.
zh: 打印一份贴墙上。用那台大打印机。

speaker: A
sentence: The printer has no paper. I will get more.
zh: 打印机没纸了。我去拿一些来。

speaker: B
sentence: There is a box under my table. Take what you need.
zh: 我桌子底下有一箱。需要多少拿多少。

speaker: A
sentence: Got it. I will put the list on the wall now.
zh: 拿到了。我现在就把名单贴墙上。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. That is all for now. You did well today.
zh: 好。暂时就这些。你今天干得不错。

speaker: A
sentence: What comes after this?

speaker: B
sentence: We have a meeting at 11. Get ready.
zh: 十一点有个会。准备一下。

speaker: A
sentence: What is the meeting about?

speaker: B
sentence: The new work rules. They will give a talk.
zh: 新工作规章。他们会做个说明。

speaker: A
sentence: Should I take notes?

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, please. That would be a great help.
zh: 好的，麻烦了。那会帮大忙。

speaker: A
sentence: I have my book here. Ready.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Let us go to the room now.
zh: 好。我们现在去会议室吧。

speaker: A
sentence: Right. I will come with you.

speaker: B
sentence: After the meeting, we can have a quick rest.
zh: 开完会，我们可以小歇一下。

speaker: A
sentence: The meeting was short. How are you?

speaker: B
sentence: Right. But I have a question about the new rules.
zh: 还行。不过我对新规章有个问题。

speaker: A
sentence: Go on. What is the trouble?

speaker: B
sentence: The part about time records. Is it for all days?
zh: 关于考勤那部分。是所有日子都要吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, every day. But you can do it on your little box.
zh: 是的，每天。但你可以在你的小盒子上操作。

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. I will put a note in my hand box.
zh: 那就好。我在手盒里记个提醒。

speaker: A
sentence: Wise. Now, let us get back to your first work.
zh: 聪明。现在我们继续做你的第一份工作吧。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I have the numbers ready for the paper.
zh: 好。纸上的数字我已经准备好了。

speaker: A
sentence: Let me see. Yes, these are all right. Good work.
zh: 让我看看。嗯，这些都没问题。干得好。

speaker: B
sentence: Thank you. I will send it now.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. Now, let us go through the last part together.
zh: 好。现在我们一起过最后一部分。

speaker: B
sentence: Which part is that?

speaker: A
sentence: The notes at the end. They need a short statement.
zh: 最后的备注。需要一段简短说明。

speaker: B
sentence: I see. What sort of statement?

speaker: A
sentence: Just a line about the growth numbers. Keep it simple.
zh: 就一行关于增长数字的。简单写。

speaker: B
sentence: Are numbers up from last month? Is that right to say?
zh: ‘数字较上月上升’这样说可以吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, that is good. Put 'by about ten parts in a hundred'.
zh: 可以，很好。加上‘约百分之十’。

speaker: B
sentence: Done. Anything more?

speaker: A
sentence: No, that is all. You are ready to send.
zh: 没了，就这些。你可以发了。

speaker: B
sentence: Great. I will send it now.

speaker: A
sentence: Good. While you do that, I will get the papers for tomorrow.
zh: 好。你发的时候，我去准备明天的文件。

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I have sent it. All done.
zh: 好的。已经发了，全部搞定。

speaker: A
sentence: Good work. First list on your own, and no trouble.
zh: 干得漂亮。第一次独立做文件，没出岔子。

speaker: B
sentence: Thanks. It was not so hard with your help.
zh: 谢谢。有你帮忙，倒也不难。

speaker: A
sentence: You will get used to it. Any questions before the end of the day?
zh: 慢慢就习惯了。下班前还有问题吗？

speaker: B
sentence: No, I am all right. Only need to put these in order.
zh: 没了，我没事。只需要把这些按顺序放好。

speaker: A
sentence: Take your time. I will leave then.

speaker: B
sentence: I will leave. Have a rest up.
zh: 我先走了。晚上好好休息。

speaker: A
sentence: You too. I will be here at nine.

speaker: B
sentence: Great. I will have tea ready.

speaker: A
sentence: That is kind. I will take some sweet cakes.

speaker: B
sentence: Good. I like a bit of sweet with my tea.
zh: 太好了。我喝茶喜欢配点甜的。

speaker: A
sentence: Any sort you like? I will get a mix.
zh: 你喜欢哪种？我买混合的。

speaker: B
sentence: Simple ones are good. Not too sweet.

speaker: A
sentence: Got it. okay in the morning.

speaker: B
sentence: sure. Well done today.

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks. It was a good first day.

speaker: B
sentence: Right. I will lock up. You go on.

speaker: A
sentence: Are you certain? I have time.

speaker: B
sentence: No need. See you tomorrow. Get some rest.
